title: Who is to take care of your children?
text: When the days of maternity leave are racing towards an end it is time to make up your mind

title: Who is to take care of your children?
text: Who is to look after your child now? There are plenty alternatives: you could for example choose to continue staying at home or, if you are dying to get back to work, maybe start off with part time? Other options are day care centres or child minders

title: Who is to take care of your children?
text: The decision might not be as easy as you first thought

title: Who is to take care of your children?
text: In this short arguing essay I am going to deal with the different matters of child minding with the main question: Stay at home with your child or use day care centres

title: Who is to take care of your children?
text: Of course there are not always as easy as to only make up your mind

title: Who is to take care of your children?
text: Maybe you have only got one or two options due to the supply or the standards of day care in your area of living

title: Who is to take care of your children?
text: Maybe you have relatives or friends who are willing to help you out or maybe it is as simple as this: you do not have any work to go back to

title: Who is to take care of your children?
text: There are as a matter of fact innumerable ways to solve this problem

title: Who is to take care of your children?
text: As I cannot deal with them all here and now I will return to my main question at issue: day care or house wife (man)

title: Who is to take care of your children?
text: To me the answer seems clear but I will try to give you some of my arguments

title: Who is to take care of your children?
text: At a day care centre (which by the way sounds much more institutional than the Swedish word "dagis") the child will automatically learn to manage without "mummy and daddy" but still look forward to being picked up by the end of the day

title: Who is to take care of your children?
text: It is more fun to come home and find your own toys and books after a day away from home

title: Who is to take care of your children?
text: At day care the matters of sharing things and playing together with other children comes naturally and, from my point of view, this makes the child more outgoing and open minded

title: Who is to take care of your children?
text: This, as well as the fact that the child gets used to trusting other adults, are very strong pro-day care arguments

title: Who is to take care of your children?
text: Even though there are no doubts as to my own opinion I can understand people who argue staying at home with your child is the only right thing

title: Who is to take care of your children?
text: I can understand their views but I do not fully agree

title: Who is to take care of your children?
text: One might not think it is fair to a small child leaving her in someone else's care, away from home

title: Who is to take care of your children?
text: The home is a protected and secure place for a child, yes, but what happens when one day it is time to go to school and mummy will no longer be there? Is that fair to your child? Another point is that if you stay at home with your child you will get a better understanding and contact with her, being able to follow her every move and achievement

title: Who is to take care of your children?
text: I agree but only because you do not see your little ones for seven hours it does not mean you are missing out on their childhood or that you are being a bad parent

title: Who is to take care of your children?
text: You still have lots of time to spend with your child

title: Who is to take care of your children?
text: When it comes to seeing other children one might argue a mother (or father of course) can attend lots of activities with the child were other children are included and in that way introduce "playmates" to the child

title: Who is to take care of your children?
text: It is not the same thing though, as learning to deal with friends and not-so-good-friends on your own in day care centres

title: Who is to take care of your children?
text: That brings up another good thing about day care; they also do lot of activities such as going to swimming pools, theatres or simply different playgrounds

title: Who is to take care of your children?
text: How fun for the children and how easy for you! Of course nobody should choose day care only because it is easy

title: Who is to take care of your children?
text: You have to feel confident about someone else taking care of your precious child and you must not have bad conscience when you finally have made your mind up

title: Who is to take care of your children?
text: Fortunately different solutions suit different people and we all have to accept that

title: Who is to take care of your children?
text: You never know what will happen in the future but I might become a proud house wife

title: Who is to take care of your children?
text: I just want to kill the myth about mothers being obliged to stay at home nursing children in stead of making a career

title: Who is to take care of your children?
text: You do not have to make the choice between your children and your work, not with the exceptional day care facilities we have in Sweden today

title: Who is to take care of your children?
text: It might sound like day care is "the hard way"; to find friends, taking turns, not getting all the attention but being one in the group and getting the help needed

title: Who is to take care of your children?
text: The hard way so is it, but it will all come to use for the child in the future and in the end your child will be happier and more open

title: Who is to take care of your children?
Sweden should leave the European Union
text: My intention with this short essay is to as far as possible make clear some of the mistakes that were made by Swedish authorities and politicians when Sweden entered the EU in 1995

title: Sweden should leave the European Union
text: There are many things to mention for or against our membership in the EU, but the main issue in this essay will be about the Swedish food industry and agriculture

title: Sweden should leave the European Union
text: As these were some of the most important topics discussed before the referendum in 1994

title: Sweden should leave the European Union
text: Mrs Marit Paulsson, also known as the mother of Sweden gave such promises and blessings about the protection of Swedish food and agriculture that at the end of the debate just before the day of the referendum people voted yes to EU

title: Sweden should leave the European Union
text: Without the confidence that many Swedes had in Mrs Paulsson, the result of the referendum would have turned out as no to the EU

title: Sweden should leave the European Union
text: However things went wrong already from the beginning that is, when the Prime Minister Ingvar Carlsson finally signed the document that made Sweden a member of the EU, he did it in blank

title: Sweden should leave the European Union
text: This meant that the only demand Sweden had to express before joining the EU, was to keep the restrictive law against free sale of alcohol

title: Sweden should leave the European Union
text: As a consequence of that no decisions were taken about how to finance the transition for Swedish farmers and food manufactures into the legislation of EU

title: Sweden should leave the European Union
text: Consequently, this meant that the whole food industry was left to its destiny without any kind of economic help

title: Sweden should leave the European Union
text: Since the bureaucratic regulations of EU are very strict and must be obeyed, thousands of farmers, food companies and retailers had to close down their business because they could not afford to rebuild their barns and companies into a EU-standard as was demanded by Swedish authorities

title: Sweden should leave the European Union
text: Still today as many as five peasants a day have to close down their business in lack of financial resources

title: Sweden should leave the European Union
text: However in Finland the government and the parliament claimed that the EU should pay all expenses for rebuilding their food industry in an adjustment to the standard regulations of EU, which the EU also did after hard negotiations

title: Sweden should leave the European Union
text: In addition it must be pointed out that in no other European country have the authorities demanded food industry and the peasants to make such big changes inside their companies as has been done in Sweden

title: Sweden should leave the European Union
text: Despite the grants-in-aid some farmers get from the EU is their present situation much worse than it was before the entrance into the EU

title: Sweden should leave the European Union
text: The monopolisation of the Swedish food industry has grown strongly since we participated the European Union

title: Sweden should leave the European Union
text: This has gone on in a sharp contrast to what was said before the referendum

title: Sweden should leave the European Union
text: Instead of getting a freer market for the Swedish peasants which was predicted by Marit Paulsson in particular

title: Sweden should leave the European Union
text: We now have to witness the beginning of a system similar to that of the previous political, bureaucratic and inefficient agricultural system of the former Soviet Union

title: Sweden should leave the European Union
text: This is a system that hardly none of us really would want to have

title: Sweden should leave the European Union
text: Although, this is what EU is all about, an immense bureaucratic apparatus whose only function nowadays is to support a lot of bureaucrats

title: Sweden should leave the European Union
text: Furthermore many of them are completely corrupt

title: Sweden should leave the European Union
text: Before our entrance into the European Union, I run a small but successful business in close relationship with two other companies from the same trade

title: Sweden should leave the European Union
text: We were in the business of importing and selling Grouse and Reindeer from Russia and China

title: Sweden should leave the European Union
text: Unfortunately, the EU bureaucrats did not allow us to continue with this import from a land outside the EU we therefore had to close down our companies in lack of wares to sell

title: Sweden should leave the European Union
text: As a result of this, a few wealthy food companies started to buy most of the smaller companies which could not afford to stay in business

title: Sweden should leave the European Union
text: We now have a very serious problem with a monopolised food industry

title: Sweden should leave the European Union
text: Consequently this means that there is not much of control left for quality and from what country the meat comes from originally

title: Sweden should leave the European Union
text: This means that in future when most production of Swedish meat has disappeared from the market, there will be huge quantities of foreign uncontrolled meat passing the Swedish border every day

title: Sweden should leave the European Union
text: Furthermore, there will be no way we can manage to control hormone treatment and diseases that can have affected the animals before they were slaughtered

title: Sweden should leave the European Union
text: The mere suspicion about how these animals are treated should be enough reason for Sweden to leave the EU

title: Sweden should leave the European Union
text: But, if we think it is not worth protecting our many years long tradition of healthy food and a beautiful agricultural countryside and if we think it is worth paying twenty-five billion kronor each year to the EU and get so little in return, then we should continue to be a member of the European Union

title: Sweden should leave the European Union
text: Of course there are some advantages of being a part of a European Assembly like the EU

title: Sweden should leave the European Union
text: We now have a free and open market for education, trade and no tolls between the membership-countries as we had earlier

title: Sweden should leave the European Union
text: Nowadays it is also possible for people to move around and work within the EU countries without any bigger problems, something that many young people today choose to do

title: Sweden should leave the European Union
text: The European Union is also an important organisation for keeping peace in Europe which also was its intention from the very beginning

title: Sweden should leave the European Union
text: The first steps were taken towards the organisation as we can see it today when Ministers of France and Germany met to discuss a peace treaty in Paris in 1947

title: Sweden should leave the European Union
text: Moreover, Swedish Parliament have been able to cut our defence cost heavily since 1995 due to our closer relationship with NATO

title: Sweden should leave the European Union
text: We now know that NATO most likely would help us in a critical situation

title: Sweden should leave the European Union
text: As a conclusion of what has been said I should want to give some further comments to this essay

title: Sweden should leave the European Union
text: As has already been mentioned about food quality and hard terms for the peasants

title: Sweden should leave the European Union
text: It must also be emphasised that we still should consider ourselves as a independent nation

title: Sweden should leave the European Union
text: But, what will be left of our independence when all important decisions about our future will be taken by powerful bureaucrats in Brussels

title: Sweden should leave the European Union
text: My personal opinion is that we never should have had such a hurry in applying for a membership to the EU

title: Sweden should leave the European Union
text: If we had been wise like the Norwegians were, then we would have waited with our application

title: Sweden should leave the European Union
text: We were simply not prepared to meet all the forthcoming changes, nor were we enough stable seen from a economically point of view

title: Sweden should leave the European Union
text: As the situation now appears we can only hope that our future prospects in the European Union are going to look better

title: Sweden should leave the European Union
Stop animal experimentation!
text: Much have been said about animal experimentation and if it is right or not

title: Stop animal experimentation!
text: In the name of science, millions of animals have been tortured and killed to answer the questions in the minds of scientists

title: Stop animal experimentation!
text: Has this been successful? Maybe in some areas, but not really to the extent were you can say that animal experimentation is absolutely essential for science

title: Stop animal experimentation!
text: But that is not the main reason why we should put an end to animal testing

title: Stop animal experimentation!
text: There are many reasons, and I will present some of them below

title: Stop animal experimentation!
text: To begin with, we have the religious aspect to consider

title: Stop animal experimentation!
text: People in general hopefully feel some kind of responsibility towards other human beings

title: Stop animal experimentation!
text: But in the Bible, God says that man has a responsibility to everything on Earth

title: Stop animal experimentation!
text: That of course includes animals

title: Stop animal experimentation!
text: We should take care of all living creatures on this planet, instead of extinct rare species for economic reasons

title: Stop animal experimentation!
text: The extinction of the white tiger and the rhino is two examples of this

title: Stop animal experimentation!
text: Once a species has disappeared, it will never return

title: Stop animal experimentation!
text: Some might say that we should benefit from the animals and take whatever they can bring us, including the answers they can produce in testing

title: Stop animal experimentation!
text: But if we have a responsibility, we should know better

title: Stop animal experimentation!
text: If we, the humans, can claim that we are the superior race on this planet, we should also realise that being superior is the same as having the responsibility

title: Stop animal experimentation!
text: When we know that, and treat the animals with respect, we would feel better about ourselves

title: Stop animal experimentation!
text: We could go to sleep at night and feel that we indeed have shown respect to every living creature among us

title: Stop animal experimentation!
text: Everyone wants to feel good and have a clear conscience

title: Stop animal experimentation!
text: This should be a very good reason to stop animal experimentation

title: Stop animal experimentation!
text: If this reason is not enough, and people still wonder why this experimentation should be stopped, I would like to point out that animals feel emotions not unlike our own

title: Stop animal experimentation!
text: Of course this is not the common opinion, but ask anyone who has a pet at home

title: Stop animal experimentation!
text: This person would probably tell you that his or her dog doesn't like this or that, or that his cat was unhappy when it was left alone one day, or something else

title: Stop animal experimentation!
text: Our pets love us, and we love them

title: Stop animal experimentation!
text: Why should it be different with the animals in the laboratories, can it be true that these animals cannot feel as well? It is without a shadow of a doubt that I can say that animals do have feelings, they can feel joy and pain just as we can

title: Stop animal experimentation!
text: Still we torture them with cosmetics in their eyes and we inject them with poisonous substances

title: Stop animal experimentation!
text: It is claimed that this is for the good of the humans

title: Stop animal experimentation!
text: But do we feel better? Is it worth it? People who don't agree to these questions buy products that are not tested on animals

title: Stop animal experimentation!
text: This group of people is getting larger every day

title: Stop animal experimentation!
text: This should tell us something

title: Stop animal experimentation!
text: More people are buying products that are not affecting our environment badly, so if the environment is important to us, the creatures living in it should be just as important

title: Stop animal experimentation!
text: Some objects to the animal experimentation in the cosmetic business, but not the scientific

title: Stop animal experimentation!
text: The scientific experimentation on animals could help us find the cure for some terrible disease, cancer or aids for example

title: Stop animal experimentation!
text: The animals' lives are not as important as human lives

title: Stop animal experimentation!
text: But that is still not a good reason, and this is because the testing on animals is not essential

title: Stop animal experimentation!
text: There are many ways of finding a cure or conclusion to scientific problems, without using animals

title: Stop animal experimentation!
text: Then why don't they use these ways of testing? Sadly enough, the answer to that question is money

title: Stop animal experimentation!
text: It is much cheaper to use animals than to do experimentation in other ways

title: Stop animal experimentation!
text: On top of that, the people who perform the experiments don't care if the animals are suffering

title: Stop animal experimentation!
text: If we all think about what we appreciate in life, we probably think of goodness and love

title: Stop animal experimentation!
text: The only thing I want to point out is that this goodness and love should concern all living beings

title: Stop animal experimentation!
text: And as humans, we are all responsible for what goes on in our world

title: Stop animal experimentation!
text: Take a look around

title: Stop animal experimentation!
text: Have we done well so far? It's time we take this responsibility seriously, and stop the unnecessary animal experimentation

title: Stop animal experimentation!
Nature Vs The human being
text: Nature gives us many wonderful things like trees, flowers and fresh air

title: Nature Vs The human being
text: All this to make us feel good and to have a beautiful environment

title: Nature Vs The human being
text: And how do we, people, repay? Apparently by throwing rubbish, that takes several years to break down, on the ground and by polluting the air, since I lately have been feeling that I have to wade my way through piles of litter on my way to school

title: Nature Vs The human being
text: Today's people seem totally to have lost respect for nature

title: Nature Vs The human being
text: Nobody any longer seems to care whether our planet is going to look like a rubbish-heap or not

title: Nature Vs The human being
text: I also cannot understand why some people appear to have this urge to destroy everything that is beautiful

title: Nature Vs The human being
text: First of all, not many things make me angry, but I get furious when I see people who throw aluminiumcans or plastic bags on the ground and then just walk away like nothing has happened

title: Nature Vs The human being
text: But something has happened

title: Nature Vs The human being
text: Why cannot these people see what they are doing, meaning, why do they not understand that they have taken this world yet another step closer of total destruction? But anger is not the only sort of emotion this kind of behaviour awakens in me; I also feel sadness and despair

title: Nature Vs The human being
text: Sadness, for I realize that few people care for the well being of our beautiful planet and despair because there is nothing I can do about it

title: Nature Vs The human being
text: During this last century we, that is human beings, have done more harm to our planet than during all thousands of years before the 20th century

title: Nature Vs The human being
text: So why do people continue behaving like this? One argument is that there are not enough litterbins around

title: Nature Vs The human being
text: But, I do not see that as a good excuse

title: Nature Vs The human being
text: What you can do is simply to put the rubbish in your bag or pocket and throw it either when you find a litterbin or when you arrive at home

title: Nature Vs The human being
text: What is even more alarming is when people, while travelling, throw their plastic bags from the car window after finishing their meals

title: Nature Vs The human being
text: Absolutely nothing justifies that sort of behaviour, if the leftovers smell bad, put them in the trunk instead

title: Nature Vs The human being
text: What is it that makes us so irresponsible and lazy? Do we really think that the aluminiumcans or plastic bags are going to disappear by themselves? Or do we even expect someone else to pick it up? I think that the problem is that we simply have stopped reflecting on such things

title: Nature Vs The human being
text: We no longer have bad conscience about throwing litter on the ground and some people might not even be aware of what they are doing, meaning that human beings do not care what happens to the earth anymore

title: Nature Vs The human being
text: Second, when you see people behaving like this you are, however, not surprised when you hear about littering on an even larger scale, that is, for example dumping

title: Nature Vs The human being
text: People, with power in executive positions, dump tons of poisonous barrels into our oceans and seas with only one argument, namely: What cannot be seen is not going to hurt anyone

title: Nature Vs The human being
text: Money, even if these people are reluctant to admit such a thing, is what really makes them to do idiotic things like that

title: Nature Vs The human being
text: Money, not for the whole world to benefit from, but for themselves

title: Nature Vs The human being
text: This short-term thinking affects our whole planet and there must be other options

title: Nature Vs The human being
text: Finally, I also do not understand why the human being keeps seeing itself as superior to every other form of life? What allows us to treat nature, animals and the air we breathe this way? Absolutely nothing

title: Nature Vs The human being
text: We are only making things worse for ourselves

title: Nature Vs The human being
text: One day there will no longer be any beautiful flowers or trees to look at, we will have exterminated many kinds of animals and there will no longer exist such a thing as fresh air

title: Nature Vs The human being
text: What will we do then? Not much, because it will be too late to do anything

title: Nature Vs The human being
text: It is today that we have to wake up and react

title: Nature Vs The human being
text: We must start to care of our local environment and stop throwing cigarette ends and aluminiumcans, even if it sounds like minor faults compared to dumping, on the ground

title: Nature Vs The human being
text: We only have one chance, so we better start saving our planet now

title: Nature Vs The human being
Preserve the Swedish Monarchy
text: Today Sweden is a monarchy whose royal title is inherited

title: Preserve the Swedish Monarchy
text: There are some arguments against keeping it this way, but none of which I see are strong enough

title: Preserve the Swedish Monarchy
text: The strongest arguments against keeping the monarchy are that the royal family does not do anything important, nothing that contributes anything to the country

title: Preserve the Swedish Monarchy
text: They simply stay on because of the tradition of having a Swedish monarch and live of the tax-payer's money

title: Preserve the Swedish Monarchy
text: This is not the way I see it

title: Preserve the Swedish Monarchy
text: The main argument for dissolving the monarchy is that it costs a lot of money which is paid by the people through taxes

title: Preserve the Swedish Monarchy
text: They argue that our money should be used to something more useful than to give money to the already rich

title: Preserve the Swedish Monarchy
text: What they do not think about is that if we don't have a monarch as head of state, there will be another head of state who has to do the same rate of representation of the country which will cost the tax-payers as much money

title: Preserve the Swedish Monarchy
text: The royal family does not use the appanage for their own private needs or luxuries, which is paid for by their private wealth, but rather to finance their representative work

title: Preserve the Swedish Monarchy
text: The royal appanage has also decreased during the past few years

title: Preserve the Swedish Monarchy
text: I think our King and Queen are doing a splendid job as representatives of Sweden

title: Preserve the Swedish Monarchy
text: They are popular with most Swedes because they are down-to-earth and takes their task seriously instead of living the jet-set life they could do

title: Preserve the Swedish Monarchy
text: If we should have a President as head of state the representative part of the presidency would be a disturbing factor in his political work

title: Preserve the Swedish Monarchy
text: In that case it is better to have, as Sweden has, a Prime Minister in a monarchy who can concentrate only on politics and solely be a part of the actual governing of the country and let the King or Queen deal with the representative tasks

title: Preserve the Swedish Monarchy
text: The royal couple are not totally unaware of what is happening throughout the nation

title: Preserve the Swedish Monarchy
text: They often attend inaugurations and various events where they show their support for the different local areas

title: Preserve the Swedish Monarchy
text: It happens that they visit different places of work where they talk to the people working there in an everyday way

title: Preserve the Swedish Monarchy
text: The Queen is also very engaged in charity work, especially helping children who have difficulties of different kinds

title: Preserve the Swedish Monarchy
text: In Sweden we have a great historical heritage of monarchs that dates back over a thousand years

title: Preserve the Swedish Monarchy
text: Many were powerful and influential, some of which gained a high international status and successfully enlarged the Swedish kingdom

title: Preserve the Swedish Monarchy
text: I see no reason for ending that long tradition of monarchs now

title: Preserve the Swedish Monarchy
text: Karl XVI Gustav is a national symbol and will remain as one for the rest of his life and will then pass on his title to his daughter Victoria

title: Preserve the Swedish Monarchy
text: It is a comfort to know what will happen to the royal family and that something will stay the same in Sweden while so many other things change

title: Preserve the Swedish Monarchy
text: There will not be the same thing with a President, who will not be the same person for a longer period of time

title: Preserve the Swedish Monarchy
text: It will always be an uncertianty about how he will manage his job as representative of Sweden

title: Preserve the Swedish Monarchy
text: Some Presidents will probably perform this task in an admirable way, but some will manage less good

title: Preserve the Swedish Monarchy
text: The ones who are not good at representative tasks will in a way make Sweden look bad outwards

title: Preserve the Swedish Monarchy
text: Therefore it is better to rely on a professional in this area, that is our king, who has had this as a job all his adult life and obtained a lot of experience and is used to be in the centre of attention

title: Preserve the Swedish Monarchy
text: The Swedish royal family has a lot of contacts abroad, mainly with other royal families, which can come in handy in times of crises and they might then be able to turn to other countries for assistance

title: Preserve the Swedish Monarchy
text: One can argue that if the King and Queen are doing a bad job you cannot replace them by choosing another monarch, but today a monarch can only do things within a certain limit

title: Preserve the Swedish Monarchy
text: He has advisers who will put an end to extreme behaviour

title: Preserve the Swedish Monarchy
text: The monarch has no real power anylonger, so he cannot make decisions that will affect many others

title: Preserve the Swedish Monarchy
text: I do not see any strong reasons for replacing our monarch who is doing a fine work as our head of state and makes a great national symbol for the rest of the world to see

title: Preserve the Swedish Monarchy

title: CAPITAL PUNISHMENT: Judicial murder
text: I will argue against this "cruel and unusual form of punishment" ( the Constitution of the United States of America)

title: CAPITAL PUNISHMENT: Judicial murder
text: Because of the fact that this is a very complex issue, I have chosen to discuss only the most important aspects of this matter

text: When I saw the prisoner step aside to avoid the puddle I saw the mystery, the unspeakable wrongness, of cutting a life short when it is in full tide

CAPITAL PUNISHMENT: Judicial murder
text: ( In two minutes, with a sudden snap, one of us would be gone - one mind less, one world less

title: CAPITAL PUNISHMENT: Judicial murder
text: " George Orwell: "A hanging", Adelphi, 1931 The history of the death penalty speaks for itself in a way

title: CAPITAL PUNISHMENT: Judicial murder
text: In the 18th century, this was a spectacular event that took place in the town's square

title: CAPITAL PUNISHMENT: Judicial murder
text: Parents brought their children to see the criminal die

title: CAPITAL PUNISHMENT: Judicial murder
text: In the 19th century the prisoners were executed within the walls of the prison, with only a few witnesses, and today the executions are taking place inside the prisons with very few witnesses, and as secretly as possible

title: CAPITAL PUNISHMENT: Judicial murder
text: This change has occurred mainly because it is now established that capital punishment does not have an exemplary effect, and also because this is too cruel and horrible to show in public

title: CAPITAL PUNISHMENT: Judicial murder
text: During the 20th century more than one hundred million people have been killed by another person

title: CAPITAL PUNISHMENT: Judicial murder
text: This means that the human ability to kill has passed epidemics and natural disasters when it comes to extinguishing mankind

title: CAPITAL PUNISHMENT: Judicial murder
text: To me there is in principle no possibility of justifying capital punishment

title: CAPITAL PUNISHMENT: Judicial murder
text: There is something so cruel about the kind of death involved that it rules out any possibility of justification

title: CAPITAL PUNISHMENT: Judicial murder
text: My main reason for not accepting this form of "judicial murder" is moral

title: CAPITAL PUNISHMENT: Judicial murder
text: There is never morally justifiable to kill another person

title: CAPITAL PUNISHMENT: Judicial murder
text: One of the most basic Human Rights is the Right to Life

title: CAPITAL PUNISHMENT: Judicial murder
text: To me no man or woman can take upon themselves the role of God, to wipe out someone else's life

title: CAPITAL PUNISHMENT: Judicial murder
text: Who is that person (or group of people) who think that they have the right to decide that someone has to die? How do these people make sure that they do not make the wrong decision in some way? What if the person on trial is innocent? Between the years of 1900 and 1985 350 innocent convicted prisoners were in "Death Row" in the United States of America

title: CAPITAL PUNISHMENT: Judicial murder
text: 23 of these innocent people were executed before they could be released

title: CAPITAL PUNISHMENT: Judicial murder
text: As long as such horrible mistakes can be made, justice should not allow capital punishment

title: CAPITAL PUNISHMENT: Judicial murder
text: To execute someone is irrevocable and, since we can not say for sure that someone is guilty, we can not risk that one more innocent could die

title: CAPITAL PUNISHMENT: Judicial murder
text: I believe that Society today is to blame for the increasing rate of violent crimes, but I also think that what we make wrong we have to correct

title: CAPITAL PUNISHMENT: Judicial murder
text: Nobody is a natural born killer, because a killer is a product of an unhappy childhood, possibly a scattered family, and a very disturbed mind

title: CAPITAL PUNISHMENT: Judicial murder
text: Of course this person has committed a horrific crime and there are no excuses for this, but maybe we can find an explanation in this person's past, and in Society as well

title: CAPITAL PUNISHMENT: Judicial murder
text: People murdering and committing other violent crimes are people with a mental disease, and as long as people like this will continue to exist, it is everyone's fault that things does not get better

title: CAPITAL PUNISHMENT: Judicial murder
text: We all have a responsibility for eachother

title: CAPITAL PUNISHMENT: Judicial murder
text: Everyone should feel guilty when a murder is committed, because something is wrong with our world, and who can fix it if we can not? Capital punishment is not going to make things better in any way

title: CAPITAL PUNISHMENT: Judicial murder
text: To violate the basic Human Rights in the way the death penalty does, will only make way for more violence

title: CAPITAL PUNISHMENT: Judicial murder
text: Capital punishment is a kind of legalised murder, and if the authorities in a country allow this, they might as well legalize murder on the street as well

title: CAPITAL PUNISHMENT: Judicial murder
text: Two mistakes do not correct one of them

title: CAPITAL PUNISHMENT: Judicial murder
text: This is a problem we all have to deal with, and we all have to take our responsibility to find a better solution than murder

title: CAPITAL PUNISHMENT: Judicial murder
About LEGALIZING ABORTIONS
text: In this essay I will deal with the issue if abortion should be legal or not

title: About LEGALIZING ABORTIONS
text: Abortion is a big issue today

title: About LEGALIZING ABORTIONS
text: A lot of women get involuntarily pregnant

title: About LEGALIZING ABORTIONS
text: Every day almost a hundred abortions is made in the Swedish hospitals and every fourth pregnancy is terminated by an abortion

title: About LEGALIZING ABORTIONS
text: Although it is legal in Sweden it is not legal in all countries, and there are a lot of different opinions about whether it should be legal or not and why

title: About LEGALIZING ABORTIONS
text: Some people think that abortion is the same as murder and that it definitely should be illegal, and some people, like myself, think that it has to be legal

title: About LEGALIZING ABORTIONS
text: Why I think so is what I want to show you in this essay

title: About LEGALIZING ABORTIONS
text: In 1975 abortions became legal in Sweden

title: About LEGALIZING ABORTIONS
text: The Law about abortion admit free abortion until the eighteenth week

title: About LEGALIZING ABORTIONS
text: If a woman wants to have one later than that she has to get a permission from the National Board of Health and Welfare

title: About LEGALIZING ABORTIONS
text: Sweden has, however, a low number of abortions in comparison with Catholic countries, where contraceptives are forbidden

title: About LEGALIZING ABORTIONS
text: In many parts of the world abortion is illegal, like in Latin America

title: About LEGALIZING ABORTIONS
text: That often leads to an extremely high number of illegal abortions that are dangerous for the women

title: About LEGALIZING ABORTIONS
text: In fact, the most common cause of death for women under twenty-five in Latin America is the complications after an illegal abortion

title: About LEGALIZING ABORTIONS
text: Important questions to consider before legalizing abortions are: "When does life begin?" and "When is the embryo an actual human with human rights?"

title: About LEGALIZING ABORTIONS
text: The scientists have different answers to these questions, and I think that it is up to each individual to have his or her own opinion about it

title: About LEGALIZING ABORTIONS
text: I think, like many anti-abortionists, that life begins with the fertilization, but I do not think that the fetus is a human with human rights until it has left the mother's body

title: About LEGALIZING ABORTIONS
text: Even when the child is born its rights have to be protected by the parents, because it is not able to make its own decisions

title: About LEGALIZING ABORTIONS
text: When a child is put up for adoption, it is always the choice of the parents or of the National Board of Health and Welfare, and they are supposed to act in the best interest of the child

title: About LEGALIZING ABORTIONS
text: I think that this should be the case with abortions to, because sometimes it can be in the best interest of the child not to be born at all; for example if the mother is a drug-addict, has HIV, is too young, has a mental disease or has been raped

title: About LEGALIZING ABORTIONS
text: Of course there must be strict regulations and strict control of the reasons for an abortion, and my suggestion is that the National Board of Health and Welfare in each country appoints some kind of "ethnic committee", that investigate and decides in all cases of abortion

title: About LEGALIZING ABORTIONS
text: This strict control is even more important now with the new development in the fetal diagnosis area

title: About LEGALIZING ABORTIONS
text: The new technology gives us the possibility to see exactly how our children are going to look like, and if they are going to be normal and healthy, but it is also dangerous for countries that have free abortion, because parents could then choose not to have a child just because they know that it is going to be handicapped in some way

title: About LEGALIZING ABORTIONS
text: It is, however, very hard to draw the line where a handicap is a reason for an abortion or not

title: About LEGALIZING ABORTIONS
text: I think that as long as a handicap or a sickness does not threaten the life of the child it is not a reason for an abortion

title: About LEGALIZING ABORTIONS
text: This will be a typical question for the "ethnic committee" to decide, and in some extent for the doctor, since he must decide if a life is in danger

title: About LEGALIZING ABORTIONS
text: My suggestion is that the "ethnic committee" create a law that says that fetal diagnosis is illegal until the week when free abortion not is an option anymore (in week eighteen in Sweden, for example), then it is up to the doctor if he thinks that it is necessary to use fetal diagnosis and perhaps operate on the fetal inside the mother or even remove it

title: About LEGALIZING ABORTIONS
text: All these new possibilities make free abortion, in the form we have it now impossible in the future

title: About LEGALIZING ABORTIONS
text: But, I still think that a woman should have the right to have an abortion, if it is in the best interest of the child

title: About LEGALIZING ABORTIONS
text: The rules and regulations about this just have to be more specific and more complicated, but I believe that if we want to see a good solution to this problem we can find it, and then make abortions legal all over the world under controlled forms

title: About LEGALIZING ABORTIONS
Watchfulness Will Avoid Children Falling Into the Hands of Paedophiles.
text: Last week we could read about ten children, from three to eleven years old, who had been sexually abused by a 22-year-old man

title: Watchfulness Will Avoid Children Falling Into the Hands of Paedophiles.
text: I guess that we all reacted negatively and felt powerless

title: Watchfulness Will Avoid Children Falling Into the Hands of Paedophiles.
text: How could this happen? Many adults were nearby this catastrophe, but none of them reported it to the police

title: Watchfulness Will Avoid Children Falling Into the Hands of Paedophiles.
text: They claimed that they didn't know it was happening

title: Watchfulness Will Avoid Children Falling Into the Hands of Paedophiles.
text: Perhaps they didn't want to know

title: Watchfulness Will Avoid Children Falling Into the Hands of Paedophiles.
text: There were neighbours who had suspicions, they heard screams from the five-year-old boy, the paedophile's steph-son, but they just rang at the door

title: Watchfulness Will Avoid Children Falling Into the Hands of Paedophiles.
text: If a neighbour reacts on a child's scream, that he or she must ring at the door, then the scream is not a normal scream

title: Watchfulness Will Avoid Children Falling Into the Hands of Paedophiles.
text: They also observed that the paedophile always had the curtains drawn and that the little boy was never out playing with the other children

title: Watchfulness Will Avoid Children Falling Into the Hands of Paedophiles.
text: We've been aware of paedophiles before this case

title: Watchfulness Will Avoid Children Falling Into the Hands of Paedophiles.
text: Nobody wants them to destroy more lives than they have already done

title: Watchfulness Will Avoid Children Falling Into the Hands of Paedophiles.
text: If we have children ourselves, it feels very unpleasant to leave them at the nursery every morning

title: Watchfulness Will Avoid Children Falling Into the Hands of Paedophiles.
text: As adult, and fellow-being, I think it is important to react and be aware of this problem and not close our eyes and believe in fairy-tales

title: Watchfulness Will Avoid Children Falling Into the Hands of Paedophiles.
text: We live in the real world, and things aren't always so decent

title: Watchfulness Will Avoid Children Falling Into the Hands of Paedophiles.
text: If we see something that possibly can be about sexually abused children, we ought to report it at once, before it is too late, before it has hurt the child completely, for life

title: Watchfulness Will Avoid Children Falling Into the Hands of Paedophiles.
text: Even if we have slight evidence, or none, even if we only got some suspicions, I think it is our obligation to report it to the police

title: Watchfulness Will Avoid Children Falling Into the Hands of Paedophiles.
text: It is our resposibility, as adults, to stop a possible paedophile for the child's sake, for its best

title: Watchfulness Will Avoid Children Falling Into the Hands of Paedophiles.
text: We can never report it to early, but unfortunately, we can report it too late

title: Watchfulness Will Avoid Children Falling Into the Hands of Paedophiles.
text: So, for the child's best: observe, and don't be afraid of interfering (which we Swedish people usually have difficulties with)

title: Watchfulness Will Avoid Children Falling Into the Hands of Paedophiles.
text: If we report someone because we have our suspicions and it turns out that this reported man or woman is innocent, he or she would presumably feel offended

title: Watchfulness Will Avoid Children Falling Into the Hands of Paedophiles.
text: But, I want to claim this once again, if the whole matter is not reported at all, a life of a child can be totally ruined, and that is not easy to repair, if it can be repaired at all

title: Watchfulness Will Avoid Children Falling Into the Hands of Paedophiles.
text: The second argument of reporting to the police in the above matter, is that the person who reported it should feel better, and be proud of him- or herself, that he or she took the initiative instead of the opposite: being quiet and let the whole thing go on

title: Watchfulness Will Avoid Children Falling Into the Hands of Paedophiles.
text: Of course we all want to help, don't we

title: Watchfulness Will Avoid Children Falling Into the Hands of Paedophiles.
text: I wonder, how do the neighbours feel today, those who didn't report it even if they knew that they should have done it

title: Watchfulness Will Avoid Children Falling Into the Hands of Paedophiles.
text: The third argument is that if we all are more aware, and awake, and dare to report, the paedophiles would hopefully feel more watched and observed, and know that we are concerned about our children's security

title: Watchfulness Will Avoid Children Falling Into the Hands of Paedophiles.
text: It should be a warning effect with people's engagement and that could frighten the paedophiles

title: Watchfulness Will Avoid Children Falling Into the Hands of Paedophiles.
text: If we don't report cases with paedophiles involved, then they can do whatever they want to do, because then they think that we don't care, that we are afraid of knowing the truth

title: Watchfulness Will Avoid Children Falling Into the Hands of Paedophiles.
text: Of course we don't want to know what a paedophile can do with our children, of course we can't see at a person that he or she is a paedophile, but we can be more vigilant

title: Watchfulness Will Avoid Children Falling Into the Hands of Paedophiles.
text: Children do trust in us adults, and we must let them continue trusting us

title: Watchfulness Will Avoid Children Falling Into the Hands of Paedophiles.
text: Be watchful and talk to your children, ask them, tell them, inform them

title: Watchfulness Will Avoid Children Falling Into the Hands of Paedophiles.
text: If they know that we are open-minded, that we can report sick people, then they probably will tell us if there is a paedophile in the nearby

title: Watchfulness Will Avoid Children Falling Into the Hands of Paedophiles.
Keep the monopoly of Systembolaget
text: Systembolaget has had a monopoly of selling wine and liquor in Sweden since 1917

title: Keep the monopoly of Systembolaget
text: In other words, people have for over eighty years now gone to Systembolaget and bought alcoholic beverages

title: Keep the monopoly of Systembolaget
text: There has been a debate about whether we should abandon the monopoly of Systembolaget and let the food stores sell wine and liquor

title: Keep the monopoly of Systembolaget
text: This debate has been especially active since Sweden joined the European Union

title: Keep the monopoly of Systembolaget
text: But I still strongly think that we should keep the monopoly of Systembolaget

title: Keep the monopoly of Systembolaget
text: I like for us to continue with the tradition of going to Systembolaget if we want to by a bottle of wine or some other liquor

title: Keep the monopoly of Systembolaget
text: To begin with I think it is useful to have a look at the traditions of drinking alcohol in Sweden

title: Keep the monopoly of Systembolaget
text: Generally I think that we have got a tradition of only drinking alcohol in the weekends, but then we consume even more alcohol

title: Keep the monopoly of Systembolaget
text: That is in contrast with the French people who have got their tradition of having wine as a natural drink to a meal

title: Keep the monopoly of Systembolaget
text: When I worked in England as an au-pair I quite often went to the pub with my friends

title: Keep the monopoly of Systembolaget
text: I rarely saw any extremely drunk English people there

title: Keep the monopoly of Systembolaget
text: They seem to have a tradition of seeing friends at the pub instead of at home

title: Keep the monopoly of Systembolaget
text: It is a more natural thing for them to have just one or two beers or a cup of coffee and then go home

title: Keep the monopoly of Systembolaget
text: When I saw persons who were very drunk they were actually often Swedish tourists

title: Keep the monopoly of Systembolaget
text: What I mean is that sometimes people in other countries seems to have a more wholesome relationship towards alcohol than we have

title: Keep the monopoly of Systembolaget
text: Because of our tradition of drinking I think it is important that there is a limitation in how easy we can buy alcoholic beverages in Sweden

title: Keep the monopoly of Systembolaget
text: Undoubtedly this restriction is especially good for those who have serious problems regarding to alcohol, the alcoholics and others who drink alcohol in a destructive way

title: Keep the monopoly of Systembolaget
text: If we started to sell wine and liquor in ordinary food stores I think people in general would consume more alcohol

title: Keep the monopoly of Systembolaget
text: Consequently there would be larger social costs for the society

title: Keep the monopoly of Systembolaget
text: Because I see several problems that I think would appear as a consequence of abandoning the monopoly of Systembolaget

title: Keep the monopoly of Systembolaget
text: That is an increase of violence among people and more social maladjustment which gives larger unemployment

title: Keep the monopoly of Systembolaget
text: In addition another aspect on the issue is that youngsters would come in contact with alcohol in an earlier stage in there lives if liquor were sold in their nearest food store

title: Keep the monopoly of Systembolaget
text: Certainly there would be an age limit to buy alcohol as there is today, but it would anyway be much easier for young people, under the age limit, to get hold of alcohol

title: Keep the monopoly of Systembolaget
text: Their older friends can for example peddle liquors for them

title: Keep the monopoly of Systembolaget
text: Moreover I have a feeling that food stores would be less careful than Systembolaget in checking the identification of the young people much because of the profit thinking of the food stores

title: Keep the monopoly of Systembolaget
text: To sum up this I am of the opinion that since alcohol could be a terrible drug if we use it in the wrong way, that is to say in a way which can hurt people that are close to us, we ought to keep the monopoly of Systembolaget

title: Keep the monopoly of Systembolaget
text: Unfortunately we have a problem with liquor that are imported illegally in to Sweden

title: Keep the monopoly of Systembolaget
text: In an attempt to control the smuggled liquor the government tries to make the goods of the Systembolaget more accessible

title: Keep the monopoly of Systembolaget
text: They are considering to have Systembolaget open on Saturdays and to have Systembolag within food stores and also to improve the service

title: Keep the monopoly of Systembolaget
text: This new proposal from the government comes in the end of May this year

title: Keep the monopoly of Systembolaget
text: I think that this sounds like a relatively good proposal but I am indeed very sceptical to having Systembolaget open on Saturdays

title: Keep the monopoly of Systembolaget
text: All it takes for people is some planning, when and where they are going to make their purchase

title: Keep the monopoly of Systembolaget
text: Finally I would like to emphasize that in order to change our tradition of drinking alcohol, I think we should talk more about the subject in the schools

title: Keep the monopoly of Systembolaget
text: I think it is important to try to change the attitude towards alcohol that I think many young people of today have

title: Keep the monopoly of Systembolaget
text: I think that more information should be given to teenagers in schools about what alcohol can do to us if we use it the wrong way

title: Keep the monopoly of Systembolaget
text: Because I think if we want to change a tradition we must start with the younger generation

title: Keep the monopoly of Systembolaget
text: My very determined opinion is that we are not ready to abandon the monopoly of Systembolaget

title: Keep the monopoly of Systembolaget
text: It would in general make the health of the citizens of Sweden worse since I think that the consumption of alcohol would increase explosively

title: Keep the monopoly of Systembolaget
text: So let us continue to go to Systembolaget if we want to enjoy the pleasure of a glass of red wine to our Friday dinner

title: Keep the monopoly of Systembolaget
Let the girls talk
text: If you see a crowd with both boys and girls there are almost only the boys who are shouting at each other

title: Let the girls talk
text: But of course they are talking to each other as well but it is the boys who acts as the centre-figures

title: Let the girls talk
text: I think one important issue in school today would be to encourage girls to stand up for their own beliefs and make their voices to be heard

title: Let the girls talk
text: This could be a step in the right direction towards equality among men and women

title: Let the girls talk
text: The equality of which the importance we are well aware about in the society of today

title: Let the girls talk

title: Let the girls talk
text: I am certain that in most places of work the majority of the men are in higher salary than most of the women

title: Let the girls talk

title: Let the girls talk
text: To create an equal society within the two sexes we have to start with pieces of the hole matter

title: Let the girls talk
text: Therefore it is a great opportunity for me as an future teacher to start this process in school

title: Let the girls talk
text: I also urge to already working teachers if not dealing with this to do so at once

Why You and the Rest of the World Would Gain from a Vegetarian Diet
text: Why do you eat meat? Probably because you are used to it, you grew up eating fish and meat

title: Why You and the Rest of the World Would Gain from a Vegetarian Diet
text: So why bother to change your diet now? Because you and the rest of the world would gain from it and feel better

title: Why You and the Rest of the World Would Gain from a Vegetarian Diet
text: My first contact with vegetarianism was at school in my early teens

title: Why You and the Rest of the World Would Gain from a Vegetarian Diet
text: Our domestic-science book contained a page or two explaining what vegetarians and vegans eat, and reasons for people to stop eating meat and fish

title: Why You and the Rest of the World Would Gain from a Vegetarian Diet
text: Utterly boring recipes followed: different salads and baked potatoes with grated carrots

title: Why You and the Rest of the World Would Gain from a Vegetarian Diet
text: Turn a few pages and there you find a picture and a lovely recipe on chicken

title: Why You and the Rest of the World Would Gain from a Vegetarian Diet
text: That poor bird had probably lived a miserable life in a metal-grating cage

title: Why You and the Rest of the World Would Gain from a Vegetarian Diet
text: Why eat it? A few years later my mother went into fits when I declared I would no longer eat meat

title: Why You and the Rest of the World Would Gain from a Vegetarian Diet
text: Another few months and I could not face the fish on my plate

title: Why You and the Rest of the World Would Gain from a Vegetarian Diet
text: I was a vegetarian

title: Why You and the Rest of the World Would Gain from a Vegetarian Diet
text: My mother has now accepted my decision and knows a vegetarian diet will not do me any harm

title: Why You and the Rest of the World Would Gain from a Vegetarian Diet
text: She has also heard my reasons for being a vegetarian and she has no argument stronger than mine

title: Why You and the Rest of the World Would Gain from a Vegetarian Diet
text: Many meat eaters defend themselves with the fact that man has been a hunter and eaten meat for thousands of years

title: Why You and the Rest of the World Would Gain from a Vegetarian Diet
text: Yes, true, I am not going to deny that

title: Why You and the Rest of the World Would Gain from a Vegetarian Diet
text: But does it give us the right to torture cattle and give them antibiotics and hormones in order to make them grow and give more meat; or force chickens to live in tiny cages where they can hardly turn around; or over-feed pigs so their pork shall taste more; or breed a muscular and enormous species (Belgian Blue) to get more meat, not caring the heifers cannot survive giving natural birth to their calves? Those hunters you mentioned, they hunted wild animals that lived free lives

title: Why You and the Rest of the World Would Gain from a Vegetarian Diet
text: Fair enough

title: Why You and the Rest of the World Would Gain from a Vegetarian Diet
text: Breeding cattle that is badly treated and tortured, given electric shocks when protesting against the cruelties and fed with other, dead animals even though they normally eat grass; everything is done because "man is a meat eater", not because animals feel better from it

title: Why You and the Rest of the World Would Gain from a Vegetarian Diet
text: I am convinced that we would never had heard of BSE (Mad Cows Disease), had our cattle, pigs and chickens been treated as living animals, instead of the future food and money they are considered to be today

title: Why You and the Rest of the World Would Gain from a Vegetarian Diet
text: By eating meat, you support these cruelties and give those who are torturing their cattle more money to do so

title: Why You and the Rest of the World Would Gain from a Vegetarian Diet
text: If everybody ate vegetarian food we would be able to feed every single human being on this planet

title: Why You and the Rest of the World Would Gain from a Vegetarian Diet
text: No more starvation

title: Why You and the Rest of the World Would Gain from a Vegetarian Diet
text: That, in my opinion, is the best reason in the world to stop eating meat

title: Why You and the Rest of the World Would Gain from a Vegetarian Diet
text: Unfortunately, most farmland is used for growing crops to feed cattle, and then us, as meat

title: Why You and the Rest of the World Would Gain from a Vegetarian Diet
text: This is economically more profitable, but feeds fewer people

title: Why You and the Rest of the World Would Gain from a Vegetarian Diet
text: A soya bean crop from one acre of land will feed one person for five years

title: Why You and the Rest of the World Would Gain from a Vegetarian Diet
text: The same areal grown with barley to rear beef cattle would feed a man for four months

title: Why You and the Rest of the World Would Gain from a Vegetarian Diet
text: The money of the rich Western World rules, the people of the Third World pay the price - they starve

title: Why You and the Rest of the World Would Gain from a Vegetarian Diet
text: Think of that next time you dig into your steak

title: Why You and the Rest of the World Would Gain from a Vegetarian Diet
text: My third reason for a vegetarian diet is good health

title: Why You and the Rest of the World Would Gain from a Vegetarian Diet
text: Meat and fish rot in your bowels

title: Why You and the Rest of the World Would Gain from a Vegetarian Diet
text: The long, winding system of our digestive tract is much longer than those of meat-eating animals are

title: Why You and the Rest of the World Would Gain from a Vegetarian Diet
text: The meat rot and you get indigestion

title: Why You and the Rest of the World Would Gain from a Vegetarian Diet
text: Vegetables, fruit, grains, beans and pulses, on the other hand, are very good for your digestion

title: Why You and the Rest of the World Would Gain from a Vegetarian Diet
text: They contain dietary fibre, which make wonders for the digestion

title: Why You and the Rest of the World Would Gain from a Vegetarian Diet
text: It is often argued that vegetarians do not get enough protein and iron

title: Why You and the Rest of the World Would Gain from a Vegetarian Diet
text: Meat and fish are very good sources of protein, indeed, but beans, nuts and pulses contain the same amount of, and often more, protein

title: Why You and the Rest of the World Would Gain from a Vegetarian Diet
text: The human body more easily assimilates the iron in animal products than the iron in food of vegetarian origin, that is true

title: Why You and the Rest of the World Would Gain from a Vegetarian Diet
text: Vitamin C, found in vegetables and fruit, helps the body to absorb iron and since vegetarian food is rich in vegetables there is usually no reason to worry

title: Why You and the Rest of the World Would Gain from a Vegetarian Diet
text: If you suspect your intake of iron is not enough, an iron supplement is recommended

title: Why You and the Rest of the World Would Gain from a Vegetarian Diet
text: Most vegetarian food is very low in fat (the fat you find is of the good kind: unsatured), rich in carbohydrates, vitamins and minerals and a well-balanced diet will provide enough protein

title: Why You and the Rest of the World Would Gain from a Vegetarian Diet
text: Finally, knowing that those delicious vegetarian dishes mean no cruelty to animals, are a small victory in the war against starvation and good for your health - do you still want your beefburger? No, I did not think so
