title: Bullfights - an elegant art form
text: Games with bulls existed already in the old Crete and Rome

title: Bullfights - an elegant art form
text: The bullfights of today have been an established tradition in Spain, Portugal, Marocko, France and parts of South America for many years

title: Bullfights - an elegant art form
text: Hole families go to the "corrida" to watch the brave performances of the matadors, and to feel the excitement of the game of life and death

title: Bullfights - an elegant art form
text: Famous persons have admired this art form all over the world

title: Bullfights - an elegant art form
text: Ernest Hemmingway had a great passion for "the emotional and spiritual intensity and pure beauty that can be produced by a man, an animal, and a piece of scarlet draped on a stick" (Death in the Afternoon)

title: Bullfights - an elegant art form
text: The bullfights are very criticised

title: Bullfights - an elegant art form
text: Especially the young people in Spain are negative to the bullfights

title: Bullfights - an elegant art form
text: But statistic shows that very few people think that it should be stopped, and that the majority of the people still want to keep the old tradition

title: Bullfights - an elegant art form
text: Every little village in Spain has its own arena for bullfights

title: Bullfights - an elegant art form
text: That is were they meet and have their great "fiestas"

title: Bullfights - an elegant art form
text: Sweden does not have one tradition that can compare itself with the Spanish bullfighting

title: Bullfights - an elegant art form
text: Tradition is one of the things that hold a country together, makes it special

title: Bullfights - an elegant art form
text: The bullfights reflect the passionate Spanish life

title: Bullfights - an elegant art form
text: If you would take away the bullfights, you would loose a part of Spain at the same time

title: Bullfights - an elegant art form
text: Many people claim that bullfighting is not an art form but a legal way of torturing animals

title: Bullfights - an elegant art form
text: They say that it is cruel to treat the bull that way, and that the horses used in the performance also suffer

title: Bullfights - an elegant art form
text: If that would be true, bullfighting would have been stopped and made illegal a long time ago

title: Bullfights - an elegant art form
text: As a matter of fact, it is medically proven that when a wound is brought to a body that is in great motion, the pain will not appear until the body is totally still - when the bull is already dead

title: Bullfights - an elegant art form
text: Naturally there is a risk that the horses might get hurt during the act, but that chance is very small

title: Bullfights - an elegant art form
text: The horses are well protected on all sides of the body and they also wear protection for their eyes and ears

title: Bullfights - an elegant art form
text: The bullfight consists of detailed rituals

title: Bullfights - an elegant art form
text: Step by step the act goes towards the end

title: Bullfights - an elegant art form
text: Personally I have never seen this in real life

title: Bullfights - an elegant art form
text: But I have been to a "capea"

title: Bullfights - an elegant art form
text: Capeas are mostly arranged for private parties in Spain

title: Bullfights - an elegant art form
text: They rent a small arena and use a small bull that they do not kill

title: Bullfights - an elegant art form
text: Volunteers may act matadors and fool the bull to pass by them again and again

title: Bullfights - an elegant art form
text: Sometimes they go in pairs, holding up the traditional red cloth in front of them, and walking towards the bull until it attacks and they quickly split up

title: Bullfights - an elegant art form
text: I did that

title: Bullfights - an elegant art form
text: And that was when I realised why the matadors are so admired

title: Bullfights - an elegant art form
text: The feeling, when you are standing opposite of the bull and just waiting for the big animal to attack, that feeling is indeed one of a kind

title: Bullfights - an elegant art form
text: But in the capeas they use small bulls, in the real bullfights the matadors are facing bulls that weigh about 500 kilos

title: Bullfights - an elegant art form
text: It takes a lot of courage to be able to handle that

title: Bullfights - an elegant art form
text: Critics might say that they are foolish taking such risks

title: Bullfights - an elegant art form
text: But the truth is that very few dies in the bullfights and it is not often that they get seriously wounded

title: Bullfights - an elegant art form
text: The accidents you mostly hear about are when reckless tourists try their luck in other sorts of bull games

title: Bullfights - an elegant art form
text: That has nothing to do with the traditional artistic bullfighting

title: Bullfights - an elegant art form
text: Bullfighting is a well-established tradition that will not disappear easily

title: Bullfights - an elegant art form
text: People may be critic to the way it is done, but this is not like any other tradition

title: Bullfights - an elegant art form
text: The history of bullfighting goes far back in time

title: Bullfights - an elegant art form
text: Through the years it has developed into an act of elegant rituals, carefully performed to be as perfect as possible

title: Bullfights - an elegant art form
text: Bullfighting has come to represent Spain more than anything else does

title: Bullfights - an elegant art form
text: It is not just a game- it is art

title: Bullfights - an elegant art form
text: You could say that it is an art form carried out by a whole country

title: Bullfights - an elegant art form
The school grade system in Sweden
text: Grades in school is presumable something we are going to have although the shape and performance might change, as it already has been several times

title: The school grade system in Sweden
text: Around the 1980s the grades were gradually taken away from the younger students and only left from the eight level and up

title: The school grade system in Sweden
text: This was good for the youngest students but not the one in sixth and seventh level; they are old enough to know the meaning of it or at least the purpose

title: The school grade system in Sweden
text: Receiving grades for the first time in the eight level it is very late, for reflection and possibility for a major change, and for parents help and reaction

title: The school grade system in Sweden
text: The level in which the students are ready for having a written school report is as I see it very important for their further education

title: The school grade system in Sweden
text: Before the eighties when almost every level of classes received school reports, the students knew where they where standing although this was not a fair system because they had to compete for the grades

title: The school grade system in Sweden
text: The teacher had to keep a certain level over the grades in the class

title: The school grade system in Sweden
text: Today this is not the case, if you have a whole class that is doing great they all get high grades; this means that the competition over the highest one is gone

title: The school grade system in Sweden
text: This makes it even more obviously for letting the students receive grades in the lower levels

title: The school grade system in Sweden
text: The important of knowing where the students stand and what is needed of them for getting better grades

title: The school grade system in Sweden
text: It seams unfair not knowing how "good or bad" you are until you are in the eight level

title: The school grade system in Sweden
text: I know that the students together with their parents have a dialogue every term with their teacher discussing how the school-works goes, of course you get to know if it is really bad but the rest, now

title: The school grade system in Sweden
text: They need to know in time for having a good chance to receive the grades they want when it is time for higher education

title: The school grade system in Sweden
text: Students know that they need to study but a teenager has other interests that studies comes later

title: The school grade system in Sweden
text: With grades from the sixth level the will hopefully take more responsibility

title: The school grade system in Sweden
text: When students receive their grades for the first time it seams that they are unaware of where they stand or more which their grades are

title: The school grade system in Sweden
text: Students attend to take more notice of a written grade than words from the teacher or perhaps they only hear what they want to hear

title: The school grade system in Sweden
text: What resound it might be is hard to say

title: The school grade system in Sweden
text: From my one experience as a teacher, they really wont to know their marks and not only words telling them that they are doing find or that have to make a better effort to get any marks

title: The school grade system in Sweden
text: Getting it in written is more effective than telling in words

title: The school grade system in Sweden
text: The discussions with their teacher is not enough they need it written down, first then they are fully aware of what teachers think of their knowledge

title: The school grade system in Sweden
text: A written paper with the marks on for all subjects cannot be misunderstood as a discussion can

title: The school grade system in Sweden
text: Parents might say when they see the marks in the eight grade "that is not what the teacher told us last time" and then it is very hard to make up for what the student has missed

title: The school grade system in Sweden
text: Both for the student and their parents it seams more fair to get a written report from the sixth grade in order to do something about the marks

title: The school grade system in Sweden
text: The discussion with the teacher cannot be replaced by grades reports it is still needed although in an other purpose in the higher levels

title: The school grade system in Sweden
text: The work for the teacher will not be much of a change because they are already more or less writing and receiving comments on their students

title: The school grade system in Sweden
text: I believe that students will behave in another way if they knew they where getting a grade in subjects earlier than it is today

title: The school grade system in Sweden
text: They will hopefully take it more seriously and not play around specially in subjects they dislike

title: The school grade system in Sweden
text: In the point of the parents they will have more of a concrete matter when they are having discussions concerning schools subject and their children's efforts

title: The school grade system in Sweden
Why practice martial arts?
text: In this essay I will from a few aspects explain why I think practicing martial arts is highly recommendable

title: Why practice martial arts?
text: People who are against martial arts often make inadequate and sweeping statements about that kind of sports

title: Why practice martial arts?
text: I will here try to make clear what opinions I believe should be condemned, and why it is important not to generalize when talking about martial arts

title: Why practice martial arts?
text: One of the quite obvious reasons to practice martial arts is that it is very good exercise

title: Why practice martial arts?
text: It is an all-round training, that is, you use all parts of your body

title: Why practice martial arts?
text: Also, one of the main reasons why I have continued doing martial arts is that you self decide how much you want to strenghten yourself during a session and when % you want to grade for your next belt

title: Why practice martial arts?
text: As it is not a team-sport you do not have to do everything that your group do

title: Why practice martial arts?
text: Everyone practice the arts according to their own capacity

title: Why practice martial arts?
text: This, however, vary somewhat between different martial arts

title: Why practice martial arts?
text: Some might demand more physical strength than others

title: Why practice martial arts?
text: The main reason why myself, I, started practicing martial arts six years ago, was to gain some knowledge in self-defence

title: Why practice martial arts?
text: I wanted my mother to stop worrying when I was out at night with my friends

title: Why practice martial arts?
text: I first did Aikido, but found that a bit too soft and started doing jujitsu instead

title: Why practice martial arts?
text: In jujitsu you first learn mainly techniques that could be used in order to protect yourself if you were assaulted on the street

title: Why practice martial arts?
text: Later on the training takes on a different character and is not that focused on self-defence

title: Why practice martial arts?
text: D uring my schoolyears, I have had the habit to try my newly gained knowledge on my fellow classmates

title: Why practice martial arts?
text: Most of the times it has not had the wished effect, mainly because they have been prepared on what I was going to do and also because many of the techniques are not that good in self-defence

title: Why practice martial arts?
text: Those techniques need the partner to cooperate to make the technique work without causing serious injuries

title: Why practice martial arts?
text: My classmates have however exclusively made the statement: "It doesn't work, so why do you practice jujitsu?"

title: Why practice martial arts?
text: The point is that you, in a certain sense, get another attitude to violence when practicing martial arts

title: Why practice martial arts?
text: If someone would attack me today I would probably not use something I learned at the jujitsu sessions, but I would be more prepared

title: Why practice martial arts?
text: No matter how absurd it might sound, fact is that I am used to people strangeling and hitting me, and If something happened for real, I would hopefully not · just stand there completely paralyzed

title: Why practice martial arts?
text: I would do something, even if it was not a proper jujutsu technique

title: Why practice martial arts?
text: The main argument you hear why people should not practice martial arts is that it increases violence in society

title: Why practice martial arts?
text: I, however, find that absolutely ridiculous

title: Why practice martial arts?
text: I would say that that argument is mainly used by people who try to blaim other people for their maladjusted children

title: Why practice martial arts?
text: I claim that the main reason to the violence in society is that many parents do not spend enough time with their children

title: Why practice martial arts?
text: Instead of teaching their children how to behave, they employ the TV and video as baby-sitter

title: Why practice martial arts?
text: The parents have no control over what their children are watching and many children nowadays grow up in the belief that you can kick someone in the head ten times without causing much damage

title: Why practice martial arts?
text: I admit that there are people who start doing martial arts in order to learn how to "beat the shit out of someone", but they are relatively few

title: Why practice martial arts?
text: These people are usually members of, for instance, karate- and tae kwon do- clubs (but the attitude in those clubs of course vary from club to club as well), and it is sad that they should damage the reputation of all martial arts

title: Why practice martial arts?
text: I have for instance never heard of any abuse of the practice of jujitsu in the five years I have been practicing that sport, and there are many other martial arts that do not have that problem, like Judo, Aikido, Kendo and Tai-chi, just to mention a few

title: Why practice martial arts?
text: To this aspect I would also like to add that practicing martial arts is an opportunity to give vent to your aggressions in a controled form, rather than going down to the city centre and "kick ass"

title: Why practice martial arts?
text: Other opponents to the arts claim that the violence learned from TV and video can escalate when bei ng practiced at the martial art clubs

title: Why practice martial arts?
text: Unfortunately, that is somewhat true, but if it is found out that someone do have misused a martial art the person is supposed to be suspended from his/her club

title: Why practice martial arts?
text: I can, however, admit that this abuse could be hard to discover and prove, and I am not sure to what extent it is being implemented

title: Why practice martial arts?
text: Maybe there should be a stricter control of the clubs in order to make them look out more for unserious members and to control the policy of the whole clubs

title: Why practice martial arts?
text: Still, the point is that not many clubs have this problem of abuse

title: Why practice martial arts?
text: I also claim on the contrary that at the martial art clubs you are taught how dangerous the kicks and paunches really are

title: Why practice martial arts?
text: You learn how to take control of a person without causing to much injuries

title: Why practice martial arts?
text: To conclude, I would öonce again like to stress how important it is not to generalise when talking about martial arts

title: Why practice martial arts?
text: As there are so many different sorts of martial arts I believe that everyone could find something that would suit them (both from a physical and a philosophical point of view)

title: Why practice martial arts?
text: People who argue that martial arts increase the violence in society should search themselves before making incorrect statements

title: Why practice martial arts?
text: They should be more specific and not speak of martial arts as violence-ridden sports in general

title: Why practice martial arts?
Homosexual couples right to adopt children
text: Shall homosexuals be able to adopt children? This is an ongoing debate in the Swedish government today

title: Homosexual couples right to adopt children
text: Adoption of children shall always be done with starting-point of the child's well being

title: Homosexual couples right to adopt children
text: It is the child's right to parents that shall be the initial position for adoption and not the adult's right to have a child

title: Homosexual couples right to adopt children
text: The decision whether homosexuals should be able to adopt children must be based on how we create the best possible security for the child

title: Homosexual couples right to adopt children
text: Some homosexuals deal with their desire of having a child by insemination

title: Homosexual couples right to adopt children
text: In Sweden there live about 40 000 children in a home with at least one homosexual parent

title: Homosexual couples right to adopt children
text: These children do not belong to the family by law and would probably feel a lot more secure if they did

title: Homosexual couples right to adopt children
text: The debate is about whether homosexual men and women would be suitable parents

title: Homosexual couples right to adopt children
text: I will below argue against homosexual couples' right to adopt children

title: Homosexual couples right to adopt children
text: My belief is that God created the human being

title: Homosexual couples right to adopt children
text: My basic argument is therefor that God created the man and the woman to reproduce

title: Homosexual couples right to adopt children
text: That is, heterosexuals are able to make babies and homosexuals are not

title: Homosexual couples right to adopt children
text: It speaks for it self that two people of the same sex are not supposed to have children since they can not make one in the way that it is normally done

title: Homosexual couples right to adopt children
text: Believers of the homosexual couples right to adopt children argue that it is better with a family to be loved by, than no family at all, whether the family consists of two men /two women or by a man and a woman

title: Homosexual couples right to adopt children
text: That is totally absurd, in my opinion

title: Homosexual couples right to adopt children
text: A child has the right to a normal family with the best possible possibility to a natural development and a normal sex-identity-process

title: Homosexual couples right to adopt children
text: A child who have lost its both biological parents is exposed in a double sense and shall therefor be protected from further stress that have to mean to growing up with two fathers or two mothers

title: Homosexual couples right to adopt children
text: Homosexuals argue that it is not the parents' sexual identity or the way that the family is put together, that has the greatest meaning for the child's development

title: Homosexual couples right to adopt children
text: The importance is that the child feels loved and gets the support that it needs

title: Homosexual couples right to adopt children
text: My argument is that a child needs both a mother and a father

title: Homosexual couples right to adopt children
text: Children need role models to look up to

title: Homosexual couples right to adopt children
text: I think that a child shall not grow up with two mothers or two fathers with the belief that they are a 'normal' family

title: Homosexual couples right to adopt children
text: By the law a 'normal' family, a nuclear family, consists of a man, a woman and a child

title: Homosexual couples right to adopt children
text: The society shall therefor not encourage homosexuals to adopt children

title: Homosexual couples right to adopt children
text: Magnus Kihlbom, a child-psychologist, psychoanalyst and medical superintendent at the Erica-foundation in Stockholm, considers that homosexual adoptive parents are not consistent with the child's welfare

title: Homosexual couples right to adopt children
text: He is of the opinion that experience in child-psychiatric and child-therapeutic action gown for that adopted children have a more difficult initial position than other children

title: Homosexual couples right to adopt children
text: There is probably a risk for that the circumstance of being adopted by two homosexual men or two lesbian women living together would imply difficulties to the adopted children's mental development in several regards, irrespective of the adults sense of responsibility, caring and love or other qualities

title: Homosexual couples right to adopt children
text: A child is ought to grow up with a clear grasp about that children can not be born to the world without a sexual relation between a man and a woman

title: Homosexual couples right to adopt children
text: For the time being there are no plans of changing the law

title: Homosexual couples right to adopt children
text: Today a person who is older than 25 years old has the right to adopt privately or as a family

title: Homosexual couples right to adopt children
text: A man or a woman who lives as an open homosexual, would by the committee on social questions, not be considered as a suitable parent

title: Homosexual couples right to adopt children
text: Writing this essay and arguing against that homosexuals shall not be able to adopt children, one should know that I have only had the children's well being in mind

title: Homosexual couples right to adopt children
text: It is not fair to place a child in a family with homosexual parents in a society with so many prejudices against homosexuals

title: Homosexual couples right to adopt children
text: It is, as I have already stated in the introduction, the child's right to parents that shall be the initial position for adoption and not the adult's right to have a child

title: Homosexual couples right to adopt children
Exercise: Good for your body and mind
text: Great demands are made upon people today in form of long working hours, home and family

title: Exercise: Good for your body and mind
text: Many people burn themselves out and get ill

title: Exercise: Good for your body and mind
text: There are different ways of dealing with the stress we are exposed to and one of them is to exercise regularly

title: Exercise: Good for your body and mind
text: In this essay I am going to bring up some of the many positive effects exercise has on us physically as well as mentally but also discuss some negative aspects

title: Exercise: Good for your body and mind
text: Like I said there are both physical and mental advantages of working out although the physical may be what first comes to mind

title: Exercise: Good for your body and mind
text: The body consists of about 300 different skeleton muscles, some more prominent than others

title: Exercise: Good for your body and mind
text: Their functions are to stabilise the joints and of course to enable movement

title: Exercise: Good for your body and mind
text: If a muscle is not used it will eventually get debilitated and in the long run wither

title: Exercise: Good for your body and mind
text: Since we live in a world of convenience, where we really don't have to move much and tend to spend a lot of our time in front of the TV or the computer, training our muscles to maintain their strength is very important

title: Exercise: Good for your body and mind
text: To be able to handle our often quite sedentary jobs without suffering from sore backs, stiffness and similar problems we need strong supporting muscles

title: Exercise: Good for your body and mind
text: The heart is also a muscle, which needs to work to stay fit

title: Exercise: Good for your body and mind
text: When exercising we increase the capacity of the heart, that is the heart is able to pump more blood with each beat and that way it doesn't have to work so hard to keep the blood circulating

title: Exercise: Good for your body and mind
text: This and the fact that we by exercising can avoid overweight helps preventing cardio-vascular diseases which are getting more and more frequent among people today due to the fast food, semi-manufactured products and in many cases lack of knowledge about how to keep a healthy diet

title: Exercise: Good for your body and mind
text: Besides muscles we also have bones in our body, about 200 to be more exact

title: Exercise: Good for your body and mind
text: Between the bones are different joints that allow us to flex and extend for example our legs

title: Exercise: Good for your body and mind
text: If we don't get some exercise the joints stiffen and make it harder for us to move, we become less flexible

title: Exercise: Good for your body and mind
text: Our skeletons get strong and stabile from workout

title: Exercise: Good for your body and mind
text: The bones gets thicker and obtain a more efficient nutrient input due to the increased number of veins providing them with blood

title: Exercise: Good for your body and mind
text: Now I've pointed out some positive physical effects of exercising, but we are also affected positively mentally

title: Exercise: Good for your body and mind
text: Like I said in the introduction exercise is a good way to deal with stress which get more and more important in our fast moving society

title: Exercise: Good for your body and mind
text: Many people use exercise as a form of meditation since it is quite easy to let go of all thoughts while working out

title: Exercise: Good for your body and mind
text: So a good workout helps the body and mind to relax and afterwards we feel good about ourselves and we have got new energy to face our lives

title: Exercise: Good for your body and mind
text: The fact that we function better, I think, is a very good argument for companies to introduce the possibility for the employees to exercise during working hours

title: Exercise: Good for your body and mind
text: Even though most people know that exercising is good, there are still many who for different reasons don't exercise

title: Exercise: Good for your body and mind
text: Only 56 percent of the adult Swedish population workout on a regular basis

title: Exercise: Good for your body and mind
text: One reason people might have not to exercise, is that they feel they don't have the time

title: Exercise: Good for your body and mind
text: This argument is untenable

title: Exercise: Good for your body and mind
text: It's not necessary to go to a gym or to head out on hours-lasting runs

title: Exercise: Good for your body and mind
text: It can be quite small things like walking or taking the bicycle instead of going by bus or car

title: Exercise: Good for your body and mind
text: Using the stairs instead of the elevator and things like that

title: Exercise: Good for your body and mind
text: A negative side of exercising is that if it's overdone, done with wrong technique or if things go wrong we might get injured

title: Exercise: Good for your body and mind
text: But if we exercise in moderation, keeping our bodies fit actually decreases the risk of us getting hurt

title: Exercise: Good for your body and mind
text: So the advantages are greater than the disadvantages

title: Exercise: Good for your body and mind
text: I've tried to show some of the positive effects exercise can have on both our bodies and minds and that it can help us cope better with the every-day life

title: Exercise: Good for your body and mind
text: It's important to find a form of exercise that suits us and that we enjoy

title: Exercise: Good for your body and mind
text: The main point is that we should have fun while exercising otherwise it would just become another source of stress

title: Exercise: Good for your body and mind
text: I workout at 'Friskis & Svettis' three times a week and I enjoy every moment of it

title: Exercise: Good for your body and mind
text: I hope I have inspired someone to start exercising

title: Exercise: Good for your body and mind
Why Sweden should have a wild wolf strain
text: The debate concerning the existence of the wolf and the other three big predators (bear, lynx, and wolverine) we have in Sweden has been going on for centuries

title: Why Sweden should have a wild wolf strain
text: Hardly any other animal is so much discussed as the wolf, and it seems as everyone has an opinion about him

title: Why Sweden should have a wild wolf strain
text: Unfortunately, the wolf is often described as a bloodthirsty beast and a lot of legends and fairy tales like "Little Red Riding Hood" and "The Three Little Pigs" have helped spreading the rumour

title: Why Sweden should have a wild wolf strain
text: The belief that wolves are dangerous to man is fostered by folklore and in former days children were coerced into behaviour with wolf threats

title: Why Sweden should have a wild wolf strain
text: Is the wolf really that dangerous? And is it reason enough to annihilate his existence? I do not think so

title: Why Sweden should have a wild wolf strain
text: As far as I know, there are no authentic records of wolves killing humans in Sweden

title: Why Sweden should have a wild wolf strain
text: Actually, the only attack by non-rabid wolves I know of happened in 1968 in Turkey when two men were killed by a wolf pack outside a village

title: Why Sweden should have a wild wolf strain
text: The reason was probably that the wolves, as a result of the deep snow, were mad with hunger

title: Why Sweden should have a wild wolf strain
text: Of course the wolf is a big and strong animal with sharp teeth, but it is created that way to bring down preys, not to attack humans

title: Why Sweden should have a wild wolf strain
text: Man is not one of the wolf's natural preys, and since the wolf is very shy and naturally afraid of the human being it is very unusual with attacks

title: Why Sweden should have a wild wolf strain
text: The wolf will not even come close unless he is forced in some way

title: Why Sweden should have a wild wolf strain
text: This has been shown many times

title: Why Sweden should have a wild wolf strain
text: For example when someone approaches the place where a wolf pack feeds on its pray

title: Why Sweden should have a wild wolf strain
text: The natural thing for them to do is to run away as soon as they notice the trespasser, despite the fact that they easily would win a fight

title: Why Sweden should have a wild wolf strain
text: The most important reason, I think, to protect the wolf in Sweden is that it is needed to maintain the balance in nature

title: Why Sweden should have a wild wolf strain
text: Many people claim that there is no danger to exterminate the wolf since he does not serve an important purpose but it is not true

title: Why Sweden should have a wild wolf strain
text: For example, the wolf functions as a control on the numbers and quality of elks, which feed on the vegetation

title: Why Sweden should have a wild wolf strain
text: As a result the wolves, the elks, and the vegetation thrive in apparent stability

title: Why Sweden should have a wild wolf strain
text: If you remove one member of a biological community, the community becomes unstable, which can get devastating consequences

title: Why Sweden should have a wild wolf strain
text: Studies of the connection between wolves and elks in Isle Royal, Michigan confirm this

title: Why Sweden should have a wild wolf strain
text: The wolf helps maintain the quality of the elk population since it only brings down the less able prey, while sportsmen often shoot the elks with the largest antlers that often also are the most viable ones

title: Why Sweden should have a wild wolf strain
text: The wolf has for that reason become important in investigations of the ecology of biological communities and especially of the principles of predation

title: Why Sweden should have a wild wolf strain
text: Since the wolf is such an intelligent and socially developed animal with emotional attachments, social order, and complex patterns of expression and communications, it has also become an important subject in other scientific studies such as sociology and psychology

title: Why Sweden should have a wild wolf strain
text: Such studies must be done in the animals' normal surroundings, and not in a zoo

title: Why Sweden should have a wild wolf strain
text: I agree that wolves also bring some problems

title: Why Sweden should have a wild wolf strain
text: Even though it is very rare that they attack humans, they often attack livestock, and especially reindeer

title: Why Sweden should have a wild wolf strain
text: This is a big problem for the Laplanders in Northern Sweden and nearly impossible to prevent since it is natural for the wolves to attack the easiest prey to catch

title: Why Sweden should have a wild wolf strain
text: But I believe this is something one have to take into account, and the subjected owners do get compensation from the state for their lost cattle

title: Why Sweden should have a wild wolf strain
text: Experiments with electric fences to keep the wolves away from the livestock have been going on for some years and have showed good results

title: Why Sweden should have a wild wolf strain
text: So why are so many people negative to have a wild wolf strain in Sweden? I guess most of them are afraid

title: Why Sweden should have a wild wolf strain
text: The modern human being has moved so far away from the nature that she no longer can understand it

title: Why Sweden should have a wild wolf strain
text: She wants perfect surroundings without any threats where she can live in happiness

title: Why Sweden should have a wild wolf strain
text: But can one be happy in a perfect but incomplete world? It is time to start saving the wolf before it is too late

title: Why Sweden should have a wild wolf strain
text: It is morally wrong of the human being to decide who is allowed to live and who is not

title: Why Sweden should have a wild wolf strain
text: It is to be hoped that in the future, man will see the wolf as the strong, intelligent and beautiful animal he really is, and admire him instead of being afraid of the bloodthirsty beast that actually does not exist

title: Why Sweden should have a wild wolf strain
WHY EXERCISE
text: It's fairly safe to say that in the fitness fanatic society of today, everyone knows that physical exercise is good for you

title: WHY EXERCISE
text: We all know that we should exercise

title: WHY EXERCISE
text: It's a positive thing for people around us; being in good shape signals a character of control and organisation

title: WHY EXERCISE
text: What I am wondering is if everyone knows why it is good for us, the actual reasons for this fitness frenzy

title: WHY EXERCISE
text: These reasons have been and still are important to me

title: WHY EXERCISE
text: They have formed me into who I am today and I want to make other people discover the same satisfying feeling of exercising

title: WHY EXERCISE
text: The reasons of exercising are seldom discussed and therefore I'd like to highlight a few of them

title: WHY EXERCISE
text: To begin with there is the simplest and most basic reasons why physical exercising is good for you: the well being it brings

title: WHY EXERCISE
text: This overall well-being is difficult for other activities to compete with, it's incontestable

title: WHY EXERCISE
text: If one goes to Svettis, plays in the local innebandy team or goes hiking in the forest, the result is the same: physical well being

title: WHY EXERCISE
text: To explain this rather vague expression "well-being" I'd like to use some more scientific terms

title: WHY EXERCISE
text: If one is in good physical shape the blood count is high

title: WHY EXERCISE
text: The blood count is a measurement of how much oxygen ones blood contains

title: WHY EXERCISE
text: The higher blood value the more oxygen it carries

title: WHY EXERCISE
text: With a high blood count more oxygen reaches the different body parts and that includes the brain

title: WHY EXERCISE
text: With much oxygen you feel more alert and can do more with less exhaustion

title: WHY EXERCISE
text: Your brain gets more powerful fuel to think with which makes it quicker

title: WHY EXERCISE
text: To test this try sleeping one hour less in the morning and use that hour for exercising

title: WHY EXERCISE
text: You will find out that you actually become more alert from sleeping one hour less instead of being more tired

title: WHY EXERCISE
text: To continue with a reason just as good as anyone, there is the fact that one can with good conscious absorb oneself into one of life's greatest pleasures, eating

title: WHY EXERCISE
text: Physical activity makes the metabolism rise which enables you to eat more

title: WHY EXERCISE
text: Since I value eating and really thinks it is a pleasure I would eat a lot even if I didn't exercise

title: WHY EXERCISE
text: It's not a question of how many kilos I weigh but more the incomparable satisfying hunger I get when having exercised

title: WHY EXERCISE
text: This real hunger makes you enjoy the food in a different way

title: WHY EXERCISE
text: It tastes better, and you really feel satisfied after you've eaten

title: WHY EXERCISE
text: This I believe can be something to think about in relation to the problem of anorexia in society of today

title: WHY EXERCISE
text: The people suffering from eating disorders often feels quilt after having eaten

title: WHY EXERCISE
text: Exercising may be a way to treat these disorders by teaching to eat without guilt

title: WHY EXERCISE
text: So, one can eat more and have a great feeling of well being if exercising, but that's not all

title: WHY EXERCISE
text: In my situation as a student there's even a greater argument for exercising: it makes me study better

title: WHY EXERCISE
text: As I've stated above, being in good shape makes the brain works better

title: WHY EXERCISE
text: How? The ability to concentrate improves and sharpens

title: WHY EXERCISE
text: One gets more done in a shorter time

title: WHY EXERCISE
text: An argument I often encounter is the fact that exercising takes lots of time

title: WHY EXERCISE
text: It's true that it does but I argue that one wins back all this time in quality

title: WHY EXERCISE
text: I would like to put it like this: there's an exchange of quantity for quality

title: WHY EXERCISE
text: The quantity of time that I would spend over a book of social science can be, let's say, 3 hours

title: WHY EXERCISE
text: If I'm in a good physical shape I could get the same amount of learning done in 2 hours because of quality learning

title: WHY EXERCISE
text: I can be more concentrated and alert while reading and I remember more in less time

title: WHY EXERCISE
text: My brain simply works better

title: WHY EXERCISE
text: I hope that with this small reminder will make people think twice the next time someone brings up the fitness issue in a conversation

title: WHY EXERCISE
text: Exercising can change your life, it is not a question of appearance or being in fashion but a tool to a greater life

title: WHY EXERCISE
text: A (hopefully) longer life filled with joyous moments at the dining table and productive hours at the writing desk

title: WHY EXERCISE
The elderly - an issue for the state
text: Some people think that the family, not the state, should look after the elderly

title: The elderly - an issue for the state
text: The reasons are often emotional

title: The elderly - an issue for the state
text: To look after your parents and relatives feel like an obligation because they have raised you

title: The elderly - an issue for the state
text: I do not believe that taking care of the elderly at home is possible in our society today

title: The elderly - an issue for the state
text: In this essay I am going to describe the situation for the elderly in Sweden at present and discuss why I believe that the state, not the family, should look after the elderly

title: The elderly - an issue for the state
text: Most of the elderly in Sweden today live at home and finance it with their pension that they acquire from the state each month

title: The elderly - an issue for the state
text: The pension is based on the persons income from the working years

title: The elderly - an issue for the state
text: Some of the aged that live at home receive help from community workers a couple of times a week, with for example shopping, cooking, cleaning etc

title: The elderly - an issue for the state
text: The elderly who needs help more often, but can manage some things by themselves, live at blocks of service flats where there are medical staffs twenty-four hours a day

title: The elderly - an issue for the state
text: There are also nursing homes for those who require help all the time

title: The elderly - an issue for the state
text: The blocks of service flats and the nursing homes are both financed by fees and taxes

title: The elderly - an issue for the state
text: The alternative to nursing homes and blocks of service flats is that families nurse their elderly at home

title: The elderly - an issue for the state
text: I do not believe that this is possible to accomplish as the only alternative

title: The elderly - an issue for the state
text: Nursing someone at home requires more money, time and space than the family can afford

title: The elderly - an issue for the state
text: Today families need two incomes to maintain standard

title: The elderly - an issue for the state
text: If one of the workers instead stay home nursing, the family will loose a lot of money

title: The elderly - an issue for the state
text: There are subsidies that relatives can receive from the state but the fees are low and are limited in time

title: The elderly - an issue for the state
text: The whole Swedish well-fare system would have to change if it should be possible for low-income earners to look after their elderly at home

title: The elderly - an issue for the state
text: Even if the economy of the family allows nursing at home, there will be a lack of time

title: The elderly - an issue for the state
text: It is more than a full-time job taking care of someone twenty-four hours a day

title: The elderly - an issue for the state
text: It also demands space

title: The elderly - an issue for the state
text: The family has to sacrifice a great deal

title: The elderly - an issue for the state
text: It is often taken for granted that the best care is received by relatives

title: The elderly - an issue for the state
text: However the nursing homes and other institutions have, according to me, superior knowledge and resources which provide the best care

title: The elderly - an issue for the state
text: That knowledge and resources can never be accomplished at home

title: The elderly - an issue for the state
text: There are always several staff members to help the elderly at institutions

title: The elderly - an issue for the state
text: There are different types of staff: nurses, doctors, physiotherapists etc, to complement each other

title: The elderly - an issue for the state
text: The knowledge of the staff makes it possible to prevent unexpected incidents

title: The elderly - an issue for the state
text: Another advantage with institutions in contrast to nursing at home is that living is adjusted for example beds, stairs, doors etc

title: The elderly - an issue for the state
text: There are also more means in institutions

title: The elderly - an issue for the state
text: It is possible to have means at home transcripted by the occupational therapist

title: The elderly - an issue for the state
text: But it would be a major expense for the state if everybody used this benefit

title: The elderly - an issue for the state
text: Finally I can establish the fact that the Swedish system is working quite well

title: The elderly - an issue for the state
text: We all want to look after our relatives and the best way to do that are by paying our taxes and fees

title: The elderly - an issue for the state
text: At nursing homes and other institutions the elderly receive the best possible care

title: The elderly - an issue for the state
text: The staff is well educated and the living is adjusted

title: The elderly - an issue for the state
text: If anything happens the help is there immediately

title: The elderly - an issue for the state
text: At home we can not provide that safety

title: The elderly - an issue for the state
text: It is impossible for the family to give equal care because of the lack of money and time

title: The elderly - an issue for the state
text: Of course some families can give their elderly the best care at home, but it demands a lot of effort

title: The elderly - an issue for the state
text: I wonder if it isn't the best to let the educated staff take care of the elderly and visit them often, rather then to wear yourself out nursing them

title: The elderly - an issue for the state
text: We all want to remember our relatives with happiness, not see them as a burden

title: The elderly - an issue for the state
text: The Swedish well-fare system can of course be improved

title: The elderly - an issue for the state
text: The state should aim at the same standard at all institutions all over the country

title: The elderly - an issue for the state
text: It is hard in these saving times but the elderly have once invested in us

title: The elderly - an issue for the state
text: Now it is time for us to pay back and invest in the elderly!

title: MOBILE TELEPHONES: a disturbing invention
text: A couple of years ago when I came back to Sweden, after having lived abroad for some time, I found that an explosion had taken place

title: MOBILE TELEPHONES: a disturbing invention
text: I'm talking about the mobile phone explosion

title: MOBILE TELEPHONES: a disturbing invention
text: An explosion which is described to be "connecting people", but I think it's doing the opposite thing, splitting people up

title: MOBILE TELEPHONES: a disturbing invention
text: I find that these mobile phones are both disturbing, unhealthy and a pathetic status symbol

title: MOBILE TELEPHONES: a disturbing invention
text: One of the things that disturbs me the most about mobile phones is that their owners never seem to know how or when to turn them off

title: MOBILE TELEPHONES: a disturbing invention
text: If you're in the library, in class or in a restaurant, you can always be sure that you'll hear a beep form a mobile phone soon

title: MOBILE TELEPHONES: a disturbing invention
text: It seems that wherever you are you can't avoid these terrible machines

title: MOBILE TELEPHONES: a disturbing invention
text: Nowadays there's also a mobile phone commercial in the cinemas saying: "Please use our phones, but turn them off when you're at the cinema"

title: MOBILE TELEPHONES: a disturbing invention
text: I was also very puzzled, once when I was out for walk, and suddenly a man beside me starts talking very loud

title: MOBILE TELEPHONES: a disturbing invention
text: At first I thought he was talking to me and I wanted to answer him

title: MOBILE TELEPHONES: a disturbing invention
text: After staring at him for a while I realized that he had some kind of earphones in his ears and that they probably were connected to his mobile phone

title: MOBILE TELEPHONES: a disturbing invention
text: The situation could have developed into an embarrassing one

title: MOBILE TELEPHONES: a disturbing invention
text: It's not enough that we, who don't have mobile phones, have to put up with embarrassing situations like the one mentioned and the disturbing noise they're making

title: MOBILE TELEPHONES: a disturbing invention
text: We are also financially affected by these phones, because we have to dial these expensive mobile phone numbers, if our friends don't have any other phones

title: MOBILE TELEPHONES: a disturbing invention
text: I think it's a terrible development

title: MOBILE TELEPHONES: a disturbing invention
text: Mobile phones are not only disturbing; they can also be extremely unhealthy

title: MOBILE TELEPHONES: a disturbing invention
text: For example if you're using your phone while driving a car and suddenly the person you're talking to starts screaming or gives you an unexpected message, perhaps you can't control how you drive and as a consequence you put lives in danger

title: MOBILE TELEPHONES: a disturbing invention
text: Medical examinations have also shown that people are injured by the radiation that mobile phones are emitting

title: MOBILE TELEPHONES: a disturbing invention
text: People are loosing their hair around the area where they're holding the phone and all kinds of other injuries are also connected to the use of mobile telephones

title: MOBILE TELEPHONES: a disturbing invention
text: I think that having one of those phones would cause me a lot of stress

title: MOBILE TELEPHONES: a disturbing invention
text: Another thing to carry around and look after, another bill to pay and another thing to remember, is also to learn when and where to turn it off

title: MOBILE TELEPHONES: a disturbing invention
text: Is it not also very stressful never to be left alone; always having to be reached

title: MOBILE TELEPHONES: a disturbing invention
text: The phenomenon always to be available, if you're in town or if you're in the city, was a sign of status at the beginning of the use of mobile phones

title: MOBILE TELEPHONES: a disturbing invention
text: Only a few people had them and they were fairly expensive

title: MOBILE TELEPHONES: a disturbing invention
text: Now though everybody has them, they're not particularly expensive and I think that the development is going towards the understanding that it's not very nice having to be reached all the time and always having a machine ringing in your pocket

title: MOBILE TELEPHONES: a disturbing invention
text: I've actually heard about company managers, who don't use mobile phones anymore

title: MOBILE TELEPHONES: a disturbing invention
text: You have to call their secretaries and make an appointment if you want to see them

title: MOBILE TELEPHONES: a disturbing invention
text: So now it's not very cool anymore (if it ever was) to stand in the street with a phone in your hand

title: MOBILE TELEPHONES: a disturbing invention
text: In a couple of years maybe nobody wants to show that they have a mobile phone

title: MOBILE TELEPHONES: a disturbing invention
text: In conclusion could be said that I know that it can be good to have a mobile phone in certain situations, like when your car brakes down and you're in the middle of nowhere

title: MOBILE TELEPHONES: a disturbing invention
text: In my point of view the bad things are more numerous than the good, but there are things to do to improve the disadvantages with mobile phones

title: MOBILE TELEPHONES: a disturbing invention
text: There are actually soundless phones that vibrate instead of making that awful sound

title: MOBILE TELEPHONES: a disturbing invention
text: There should be a law, forbidding people to use their phones while driving

title: MOBILE TELEPHONES: a disturbing invention
text: To avoid the radiation one should only use the phone in extreme cases, for example to get an ambulance to the scene of an accident

title: MOBILE TELEPHONES: a disturbing invention
text: The fact that people think that mobile phones are signs of wealth will perhaps, as it seems, go away by itself

title: MOBILE TELEPHONES: a disturbing invention
Use your brain use a helmet
text: A bicycle is a cheap and excellent means of transport that takes you anywhere you like

title: Use your brain use a helmet
text: It is not harmful to the environment as cars are and it is good for your health and it is an economical advantage to use as many people have discover over the years when prices on petrol is increasing

title: Use your brain use a helmet
text: There is one thing though that not many of the cyclists have discovered, the cycle-helmet

title: Use your brain use a helmet
text: It is an excellent protection and it is a cheap life insurance in case of an accent

title: Use your brain use a helmet
text: The cycle-helmet is something all cyclists should wear, not just our little ones

title: Use your brain use a helmet
text: When our little ones is about to learn cycling we teach them to wear a cycle-helmet as a protection in case of an accident on the staggering ride

title: Use your brain use a helmet
text: That is what every protecting parent do to their children

title: Use your brain use a helmet
text: But the children get older and they start to protest against wearing the cycle-helmet

title: Use your brain use a helmet
text: Maybe it is just because that their friends do not wear one or, even worse, their parents do not

title: Use your brain use a helmet
text: The question is why don't the parents wear a helmet themselves? Maybe it is because they claims that they know how to rid a bicycle and therefor will not be involved in an accident, or, as I have heard objections as, that a cycle-helmet will ruin their hairstyle

title: Use your brain use a helmet
text: I admit that the hairstyle will be ruined by wearing a helmet

title: Use your brain use a helmet
text: And most of the grown-ups know how to ride a cycle

title: Use your brain use a helmet
text: But when do one know there should be an accident? And what is a ruined hairstyle in comparison with a destroyed life by an accident A cycle-helmet is a protection, which all cyclists ought to wear

title: Use your brain use a helmet
text: We know that children not always do as they are told, they usually do as you do, whether you like it or not

title: Use your brain use a helmet
text: So the best way to make them wear a cycle-helmet is to wear one yourself, despite of a ruined hairstyle

title: Use your brain use a helmet
text: In spite of the fact that the bicycle is an excellent means of transport the cyclist is the only road-user that is totally unprotected in traffic

title: Use your brain use a helmet
text: The driver is safe in his or her car, which have all the latest safety equipment as safety belt and airbags

title: Use your brain use a helmet
text: The cyclist's only protection is a cycle-helmet

title: Use your brain use a helmet
text: The National Road Safety Office has through the years had information campaign to pursued people wear a cycle-helmet

title: Use your brain use a helmet
text: There have been film commercials and advertising bill all over the country about this matter We have had many chances to learn by this information that the head is the most fragile part of one's body and one single knock on the head can change ones life forever

title: Use your brain use a helmet
text: A skull injury can mean everything from personality change to disturbance of balance, speech disorders or the worse, the death

title: Use your brain use a helmet
text: But there are still a large numbers of people who are not wearing a helmet

title: Use your brain use a helmet
text: Some of them are of the opinion that they look silly wearing one

title: Use your brain use a helmet
text: Maybe it is not the prettiest headgear but it serves its purpose

title: Use your brain use a helmet
text: If the adults set up a good example, to all children and start to wear a cycle-helmet in traffic it will turn out to be a self-evident thing to wear

title: Use your brain use a helmet
text: Like it is with the safety belt, everyone use it now without any objections

title: Use your brain use a helmet
text: Statistic shows that most of the cyclists that are injured in traffic suffers from skull injuries and if they had wear a cycle-helmet the injuries wouldn't had been that seriously

title: Use your brain use a helmet
text: Why people does not wear a helmet after the information campaigns that have been run by the National Road Safety Office through the years are a mystery to me

title: Use your brain use a helmet
text: It is time to ignore that you may lock silly in a cycle-helmet and that the hairstyle will be ruined as long as it may save your life

title: Use your brain use a helmet
text: It is your only protection in traffic

title: Use your brain use a helmet
text: And the unnecessary high cost of medical treatment could be spent on more important matters

title: Use your brain use a helmet
Whay do not people listen?
text: We have a big environmental problem in the world today

title: Whay do not people listen?
text: The tempo, at which we are using the Earth's natural resources, is currently far to fast for effective control or thoughtful management

title: Whay do not people listen?
text: Control is especially needed in three areas: 1) hunting, 2) Deforestation, and 3) Water pollution

title: Whay do not people listen?
text: The environment is changing at a rate that is slipping from our control

title: Whay do not people listen?
text: When you speak about this, you often hear comments like, "you are so negative, we have always dumped things in the oceans, and people in Africa needs the ivory trade to survey"

title: Whay do not people listen?
text: I agree that we should be able to use nature resources

title: Whay do not people listen?
text: In South America we have the big cotton fields and coffee fields, but is it right to cut down trees and kill animals for financial interests? Attempts have been made over the years to stop rustlers and protecting endangered animals, such as Gorillas, Rhinos, and Elephants

title: Whay do not people listen?
text: Many of these efforts have been ineffective and more frightening still, some restrictions are even being lifted or removed, leaving the animals once again unprotected

title: Whay do not people listen?
text: One example of this is the Ivory trade in several African countries

title: Whay do not people listen?
text: A few weeks ago, the United Nations announced that several countries in Africa are allowing the ivory trade again, after many years of restrictions

title: Whay do not people listen?
text: The restrictions were an attempt to protect the few African elephants that had survived the ruthless hunt by rustlers

title: Whay do not people listen?
text: For many years the African elephants have manage to increase in numbers, but according to distinguished scientists, such as Cynthia Moss, they have not fully recovered

title: Whay do not people listen?
text: Elephants are still endangered, and will probably be extinct in about five years, if the ivory trade starts again

title: Whay do not people listen?
text: The governments in Africa will not be able to keep the ivory trade in organised forms

title: Whay do not people listen?
text: Rustlers will kill all elephants in their way to get the ivory

title: Whay do not people listen?
text: A second threat to Earth's ecosystem comes from deforestation

title: Whay do not people listen?
text: Deforestation not only kills the plants and animals that live in the forests, but has far-reaching effects on the global climate

title: Whay do not people listen?
text: We are cutting down the rain forest not knowing all the animals living there

title: Whay do not people listen?
text: A soccer field of trees is disappearing every minute, every day

title: Whay do not people listen?
text: The forest is necessary for our survival, not only because of the oxygen that it provides us, but also because of its absorption of pollution

title: Whay do not people listen?
text: The lack of the forest also gives us climate changes, increasing numbers of El Ninos and El Ninas have been registrated

title: Whay do not people listen?
text: Temperatures rise, the ice at the North and South Pole's begin to calf

title: Whay do not people listen?
text: Calving at the Northpole is displacing the gulfstream, and indirect giving us a colder climate in the north of Europe, and a warmer climate in the south of Europe

title: Whay do not people listen?
text: The green house effect has not only raised the temperature on the planet, but has also been linked to incidence of skin cancers

title: Whay do not people listen?
text: Water pollution is a third behaviour desperately in need of regulation

title: Whay do not people listen?
text: For the whole century, big corporations have been dumping toxic waste in the oceans

title: Whay do not people listen?
text: This waste is killing all kinds, of sea mammals and fish

title: Whay do not people listen?
text: Unfortunately it is cheaper to dispose the waste this way than to rebuild the factories, or recycle the waste

title: Whay do not people listen?
text: The polluted water provides us food

title: Whay do not people listen?
text: Are we just going to accept that the salmon we eat is full of mercury? The toxics that we eat through the polluted food are known to cause cancer and other diseases

title: Whay do not people listen?
text: The things that I have described are not a bedtime story

title: Whay do not people listen?
text: The facts that scientists report have not significantly altered our attitude toward the resources of the world

title: Whay do not people listen?
text: The problem is that people do not listen, or do they not care? We can not ignore these issues

title: Whay do not people listen?
text: But what could change peoples attitude? My attitude changed when I read about these problems and relacied that I could make a different by choosing what products I would like to buy

title: Whay do not people listen?
text: You can do it to and please do; it is needed to save the Earth

title: Whay do not people listen?
text: There is an old Indian saying: " We have not inherited the earth from our parents; we are just borrowing it from our children"

title: Whay do not people listen?
Why the selling of JAS to South Africa is such a step back for humanity
text: I am going to discuss the Swedish government's policies concerning war materiel export and demonstrate why it is not morally defensible of Sweden to export to a country like South Africa

title: Why the selling of JAS to South Africa is such a step back for humanity
text: Sweden is the country with the most restricted export policy concerning war materiel in the world but is still exporting like there were no regulations

title: Why the selling of JAS to South Africa is such a step back for humanity
text: The war materiel in question is the aircraft fighter JAS 39 Gripen

title: Why the selling of JAS to South Africa is such a step back for humanity
text: The Swedish government hopes to sell fifteen of them to South Africa

title: Why the selling of JAS to South Africa is such a step back for humanity
text: In return, several Swedish companies will invest in the country, build new factories and employ lots of people According to Swedish and European law, export of war materiel is not recommended to a country in which human rights are being violated

title: Why the selling of JAS to South Africa is such a step back for humanity
text: In South Africa, during 1997, many cases of police violence were reported

title: Why the selling of JAS to South Africa is such a step back for humanity
text: Among accusations, were alleged torture, abuse and rapes inside prison walls

title: Why the selling of JAS to South Africa is such a step back for humanity
text: As many as one hundred and thirty four suspicious deaths were investigated, and one hundred and fifty guards were arrested for assaulting 155 internees so severely that they needed medical care

title: Why the selling of JAS to South Africa is such a step back for humanity
text: Unfortunately, the prison doctor denied them their right of medical attention

title: Why the selling of JAS to South Africa is such a step back for humanity
text: I would call this situation a clear violation against human rights

title: Why the selling of JAS to South Africa is such a step back for humanity
text: Another guideline to either sell or not sell war materiel is if a country suffers with internal armed disturbances, or not

title: Why the selling of JAS to South Africa is such a step back for humanity
text: Everybody knows that South Africa is politically unstable, with high criminal density, and with wide spread access to weapons

title: Why the selling of JAS to South Africa is such a step back for humanity
text: More than nine hundred people died between 1996 and 1998 because of armed conflicts

title: Why the selling of JAS to South Africa is such a step back for humanity
text: The third reason when not to export war materiel, has to do with if the recipients economic- and social development is at risk, by going through with a deal of this dignity

title: Why the selling of JAS to South Africa is such a step back for humanity
text: South Africa is a recipient of Swedish financial aid, and should not according to Swedish regulations be financially strong enough to buy JAS 39 Gripen, without jeopardising the economic and social growth in the country

title: Why the selling of JAS to South Africa is such a step back for humanity
text: As a fourth argument restraining Swedish export, is if a purchase could effect regional peace and security

title: Why the selling of JAS to South Africa is such a step back for humanity
text: It does not take a genius to realise what it would mean to the African continent, if South Africa were to buy JAS 39 Gripen

title: Why the selling of JAS to South Africa is such a step back for humanity
text: South Africa's defence is the biggest and most advanced in the entire Africa

title: Why the selling of JAS to South Africa is such a step back for humanity
text: Their military expenditure, 2,506 million US dollars, is second only to Egypt

title: Why the selling of JAS to South Africa is such a step back for humanity
