text: The social institutions grew very big and strong in Sweden during the long rule of the Social Democratic Party after World War II

title: WHO SHOULD LOOK AFTER THE ELDERLY -THE FAMILY OR THE STATE?
text: The ideal Swedish home (folkhemmet) was highly valued

title: WHO SHOULD LOOK AFTER THE ELDERLY -THE FAMILY OR THE STATE?
text: Everyone should trust the state to take care of you from birth to death (from the cradle to the grave)

title: WHO SHOULD LOOK AFTER THE ELDERLY -THE FAMILY OR THE STATE?
text: That is, or rather was, so to say, the Swedish culture

title: WHO SHOULD LOOK AFTER THE ELDERLY -THE FAMILY OR THE STATE?
text: During the 60s the women started to work more outside the home which meant that they got less time to take care of the family's elderly members

title: WHO SHOULD LOOK AFTER THE ELDERLY -THE FAMILY OR THE STATE?
text: By the end of the 80s when the recession came the government got out of money to finance all the big and expensive social institutions

title: WHO SHOULD LOOK AFTER THE ELDERLY -THE FAMILY OR THE STATE?
text: The govermental sector had to decrease in order to save money for the nation

title: WHO SHOULD LOOK AFTER THE ELDERLY -THE FAMILY OR THE STATE?
text: The price of the wellfare had become too high

title: WHO SHOULD LOOK AFTER THE ELDERLY -THE FAMILY OR THE STATE?
text: It had been taken for granted for too long

title: WHO SHOULD LOOK AFTER THE ELDERLY -THE FAMILY OR THE STATE?
text: Discussions started about other alternatives

title: WHO SHOULD LOOK AFTER THE ELDERLY -THE FAMILY OR THE STATE?
text: You can find tree main alternatives: 1

title: WHO SHOULD LOOK AFTER THE ELDERLY -THE FAMILY OR THE STATE?
text: Public social institutions (hospitals and institutions for elderly care) 2

title: WHO SHOULD LOOK AFTER THE ELDERLY -THE FAMILY OR THE STATE?
text: Private institutions 3

title: WHO SHOULD LOOK AFTER THE ELDERLY -THE FAMILY OR THE STATE?
text: Family care of elderly I believe in a combination of 1 and 2

title: WHO SHOULD LOOK AFTER THE ELDERLY -THE FAMILY OR THE STATE?
text: From my female point of view the third alternative is not realistic in today's society

title: WHO SHOULD LOOK AFTER THE ELDERLY -THE FAMILY OR THE STATE?
text: Almost every woman with children is working in Sweden

title: WHO SHOULD LOOK AFTER THE ELDERLY -THE FAMILY OR THE STATE?
text: We have the highest rate of working mothers in the world

title: WHO SHOULD LOOK AFTER THE ELDERLY -THE FAMILY OR THE STATE?
text: But I think many other countries in Western Europe and in USA are approaching the same level

title: WHO SHOULD LOOK AFTER THE ELDERLY -THE FAMILY OR THE STATE?
text: Most women still have the main responsibility for taking care of their families

title: WHO SHOULD LOOK AFTER THE ELDERLY -THE FAMILY OR THE STATE?
text: You can really say that women have two full time jobs - the work and the family

title: WHO SHOULD LOOK AFTER THE ELDERLY -THE FAMILY OR THE STATE?
text: Besides this you should have a clean and beautiful house and garden, go to the gym, be well-dressed, read books, be social, bake cakes etc etc

title: WHO SHOULD LOOK AFTER THE ELDERLY -THE FAMILY OR THE STATE?
text: Should you besides all this also take care of your old and ill parents? The answer can only be one - NO

title: WHO SHOULD LOOK AFTER THE ELDERLY -THE FAMILY OR THE STATE?
text: It would be an extra burden for most women

title: WHO SHOULD LOOK AFTER THE ELDERLY -THE FAMILY OR THE STATE?
text: Women of today live under a lot of stress and press

title: WHO SHOULD LOOK AFTER THE ELDERLY -THE FAMILY OR THE STATE?
text: The stress diseases among women are rising, like burn-outs, even heartattacks

title: WHO SHOULD LOOK AFTER THE ELDERLY -THE FAMILY OR THE STATE?
text: Taking care of elderly should in the long run lead to even more stress-diseases among women

title: WHO SHOULD LOOK AFTER THE ELDERLY -THE FAMILY OR THE STATE?
text: And who will then look after the women? If we had a situation of more equality between man and woman - and I do believe we should have - we might be able to take care of our elderly in our homes

title: WHO SHOULD LOOK AFTER THE ELDERLY -THE FAMILY OR THE STATE?
text: But I doubt that there are any man who wants to have an old and ill parent living with them

title: WHO SHOULD LOOK AFTER THE ELDERLY -THE FAMILY OR THE STATE?
text: Elderly people usually need a lot of medical care which you must be educated for

title: WHO SHOULD LOOK AFTER THE ELDERLY -THE FAMILY OR THE STATE?
text: Taking care of both young and old people at the same time is just too much

title: WHO SHOULD LOOK AFTER THE ELDERLY -THE FAMILY OR THE STATE?
text: You need a lot of patience

title: WHO SHOULD LOOK AFTER THE ELDERLY -THE FAMILY OR THE STATE?
text: When the kids start school and grow older of course you get more time

title: WHO SHOULD LOOK AFTER THE ELDERLY -THE FAMILY OR THE STATE?
text: But most women fill the hours with work and enjoy finally having some time of her own

title: WHO SHOULD LOOK AFTER THE ELDERLY -THE FAMILY OR THE STATE?
text: It is not just a question of time of course

title: WHO SHOULD LOOK AFTER THE ELDERLY -THE FAMILY OR THE STATE?
text: I think it is a nice thought to take care of your parents like they took care of you as a child

title: WHO SHOULD LOOK AFTER THE ELDERLY -THE FAMILY OR THE STATE?
text: But it is a very idealistic and unfortunately an unrealistic thought

title: WHO SHOULD LOOK AFTER THE ELDERLY -THE FAMILY OR THE STATE?
text: In my own experience the social institutions in Sweden like hospitals and institutions for elderly care, work very well

title: WHO SHOULD LOOK AFTER THE ELDERLY -THE FAMILY OR THE STATE?
text: My own parents and other older relatives have always been treated in a very proffesional and human way at hospitals when needed in times of illness and death

title: WHO SHOULD LOOK AFTER THE ELDERLY -THE FAMILY OR THE STATE?
text: The support to us in the family has also been very good

title: WHO SHOULD LOOK AFTER THE ELDERLY -THE FAMILY OR THE STATE?
text: When you read the newspapers it does not seem to work like this but I believe it does in most cases

title: WHO SHOULD LOOK AFTER THE ELDERLY -THE FAMILY OR THE STATE?
text: But the question remains if we can afford all these expensive hospitals and institutions

title: WHO SHOULD LOOK AFTER THE ELDERLY -THE FAMILY OR THE STATE?
text: They can probably work in a more rational way than they do and a lof of effort is aiming at that

title: WHO SHOULD LOOK AFTER THE ELDERLY -THE FAMILY OR THE STATE?
text: Another way is to raise the fees

title: WHO SHOULD LOOK AFTER THE ELDERLY -THE FAMILY OR THE STATE?
text: If you have to stay at a hospital for some time it hardly costs you anything

title: WHO SHOULD LOOK AFTER THE ELDERLY -THE FAMILY OR THE STATE?
text: The argument against private alternatives is that it is only for the rich

title: WHO SHOULD LOOK AFTER THE ELDERLY -THE FAMILY OR THE STATE?
text: But I believe that taking insurances a long time ahead is a way of financing a private alternative

title: WHO SHOULD LOOK AFTER THE ELDERLY -THE FAMILY OR THE STATE?
text: I also believe they to some extent can be financed by the goverment because they ease the pressure on the public hospitals

title: WHO SHOULD LOOK AFTER THE ELDERLY -THE FAMILY OR THE STATE?
text: If you want to take care of your elderly at home you need medical assistance in your home which must be provided by a hospital

title: WHO SHOULD LOOK AFTER THE ELDERLY -THE FAMILY OR THE STATE?
text: My conclusion is that the freedom of choice is the best idea, although I personally favour public hospitals and institutions combined with private alternatives

title: WHO SHOULD LOOK AFTER THE ELDERLY -THE FAMILY OR THE STATE?
Charging high-school pupils for lunch: a road to disaster
text: In the past decade Sweden has suffered from a recession in the economy

title: Charging high-school pupils for lunch: a road to disaster
text: This has affected many areas of society, including education

title: Charging high-school pupils for lunch: a road to disaster
text: It's caused drastic cut-backs which has led to larger classes and less money for textbooks and other schoolmaterial

title: Charging high-school pupils for lunch: a road to disaster
text: Local authorities have delt with this in different ways

title: Charging high-school pupils for lunch: a road to disaster
text: Some have chosen to cut costs by charging high-school pupils for their lunches

title: Charging high-school pupils for lunch: a road to disaster
text: This I think is wrong and in this essay I'll argue against it

title: Charging high-school pupils for lunch: a road to disaster
text: One reason why this is wrong is the financial difficulties it imposes on families that already have problems making ends meet

title: Charging high-school pupils for lunch: a road to disaster
text: I'm convinced that the vast majority of these families choose to pay for their childrens' lunches realizing the importance of a decent meal in order to concentrate all day

title: Charging high-school pupils for lunch: a road to disaster
text: The extra cost will force these families to reduce spending in other essential areas and might even decrease their standards of living

title: Charging high-school pupils for lunch: a road to disaster
text: However there are families that would be effected even worse, families that have no possibility at all to afford that extra cost

title: Charging high-school pupils for lunch: a road to disaster
text: The negative effects on these families would be far more than just financial

title: Charging high-school pupils for lunch: a road to disaster
text: For one it would be socially divisive and cause a gap between those who can afford it and those who can't

title: Charging high-school pupils for lunch: a road to disaster
text: This is very negative for the children who most likely will get the impression that society has failed them

title: Charging high-school pupils for lunch: a road to disaster
text: These are children who are in most need of support from society

title: Charging high-school pupils for lunch: a road to disaster
text: Another consequence of not affording to pay for lunch is the physical effects

title: Charging high-school pupils for lunch: a road to disaster
text: Eating right is essential to be able to concentrate on the schoolwork

title: Charging high-school pupils for lunch: a road to disaster
text: If pupils don't get a proper lunch, as is the case with these children, they are not going to achieve the grades they otherwise could

title: Charging high-school pupils for lunch: a road to disaster
text: Therefore I believe that charging pupils for lunch is the perfect way to take away a chance to do your best for a great number of pupils

title: Charging high-school pupils for lunch: a road to disaster
text: That's one reason why I find that way of decreasing spending wrong

title: Charging high-school pupils for lunch: a road to disaster
text: There's also a more long-lasting physical effect that's very alarming

title: Charging high-school pupils for lunch: a road to disaster
text: The human body requires good nutrition to function well and that's provided by most school lunches

title: Charging high-school pupils for lunch: a road to disaster
text: If you can't afford the lunch at school you're not likely to afford a proper meal somewhere else and a sandwich or some cheap junkfood might appease the hunger but it doesn't provide enough good nutrition

title: Charging high-school pupils for lunch: a road to disaster
text: As many habits, food habits are hard to break and these pupils stand at risk for future healtproblems

title: Charging high-school pupils for lunch: a road to disaster
text: Besides the arguments above which mainly concerned the negative impacts on the families and individual pupils there are other arguments

title: Charging high-school pupils for lunch: a road to disaster
text: Another reason why I take a negative stand on this issue is that the money wouldn't necessarily benefit the school

title: Charging high-school pupils for lunch: a road to disaster
text: That means that people pay more for the schools, in addition to the taxes, without it actually benefitting the school

title: Charging high-school pupils for lunch: a road to disaster
text: I think that's wrong in principle

title: Charging high-school pupils for lunch: a road to disaster
text: I would have a better understanding for it if the money would be used to secure the quality of the education

title: Charging high-school pupils for lunch: a road to disaster
text: But even if that was the purpose I wouldn't agree with it since it wouldn't cover more than a small percentage of the total cost

title: Charging high-school pupils for lunch: a road to disaster
text: I don't feel that it would be enough to justify the great difficulties it wold impose on some pupils and their families

title: Charging high-school pupils for lunch: a road to disaster
text: In addition to what's already been argued there's also the matter of the quality of the food

title: Charging high-school pupils for lunch: a road to disaster
text: I seriously question that the quality is high enough in every school, and to charge for an inadequate product is wrong

title: Charging high-school pupils for lunch: a road to disaster
text: It's also common to serve lighter food like soup or porridge on Fridays and to require that pupils pay full price for meals like this isn't right

title: Charging high-school pupils for lunch: a road to disaster
text: In this essay I've argued against charging high-school pupils for their lunches

title: Charging high-school pupils for lunch: a road to disaster
text: I base my opinion partly on the negative effects concerning economy, physical health and social situation that would is imposed on some pupils and their families

title: Charging high-school pupils for lunch: a road to disaster
text: I also questioned the purpose and if the product given corresponds with the cost, the result of this further adds to my negative opinion

title: Charging high-school pupils for lunch: a road to disaster
text: To disregard from the arguments I've brought up and implement these costs for pupils in high school is in my eyes totally inexcusable

title: Charging high-school pupils for lunch: a road to disaster
OLD - THE SAME AS ALONE?
text: Before, the elderly stayed with their family until they past away

title: OLD - THE SAME AS ALONE?
text: Today we isolate the elderly at institutions, separate from other institutions like kindergartens, schools etc

title: OLD - THE SAME AS ALONE?
text: , and most important: their family and their home environment

title: OLD - THE SAME AS ALONE?
text: This is a tragical result of a development which should have been stopped a long time ago, because I think it should be the family, not the state, who looks after the elderly

title: OLD - THE SAME AS ALONE?
text: The main reason why I find the present eldercare system so wrong is that most old people suffer a great deal when they have to leave their home for an institution

title: OLD - THE SAME AS ALONE?
text: Not only because this often means that they will feel more alone - perhaps the institution is located in a totally different area from where they used to live, but also because breaking up from their home environment can be bad for their mental health

title: OLD - THE SAME AS ALONE?
text: If a person is suffering from senile dementia he or she will definitely get more confused by moving to a place he or she has never seen before

title: OLD - THE SAME AS ALONE?
text: Consequently this break-up from their home environment leads to a deterioration of their illness

title: OLD - THE SAME AS ALONE?
text: Everything is new - the room, the food, the people

title: OLD - THE SAME AS ALONE?
text: In the institutions they often have very little to do and very few opportunities to talk to other persons - all the things that are essential as stimulation of the brain

title: OLD - THE SAME AS ALONE?
text: Naturally, if an old person would live with their children and grand-children there would not be any lack of stimulation

title: OLD - THE SAME AS ALONE?
text: The children would talk to them and maybe involve them a bit in their school work

title: OLD - THE SAME AS ALONE?
text: And not only would the elders benefit from living with other generations, but also the children

title: OLD - THE SAME AS ALONE?
text: They would learn different things from the elders

title: OLD - THE SAME AS ALONE?
text: Things that are important to prevent our culture from dying

title: OLD - THE SAME AS ALONE?
text: Another reason why I think that different generations should be living together is a practical one; When the parents are at work, the elders could stay home with the children

title: OLD - THE SAME AS ALONE?
text: In society today the children are in one institution and the old people in another

title: OLD - THE SAME AS ALONE?
text: Why should generations be separated like this? I believe it is against nature

title: OLD - THE SAME AS ALONE?
text: Of course one may wonder how this change of the eldercare system would work financially, but it is in fact not very complicated; In stead of paying taxes to the state so that it can afford to take care of our old relatives, we could keep most of the money so that we could afford to work only a few hours per day and therefore make it possible to look after our old relatives if we want to

title: OLD - THE SAME AS ALONE?
text: Those who feel that they can not do that, because of medical reasons for instance, would be able to pay one of the eldercare institutions that would still exist, to take care of their relatives

title: OLD - THE SAME AS ALONE?
text: Those who do not have any relatives who can look after them, would naturally have to live at institutions but since there would not be a total tax reduction this I think would be a financial possibility

title: OLD - THE SAME AS ALONE?
text: Before leaving this financial part I will sort out a solution to the unemployment problem that would occur if institutions providing eldercare would be shut down

title: OLD - THE SAME AS ALONE?
text: As I mentioned before, many people would afford to work only a few hours per day and this means that there would be a lot of job opportunities in a wide range of other fields

title: OLD - THE SAME AS ALONE?
text: In other words we would share the jobs

title: OLD - THE SAME AS ALONE?
text: To get back to the social aspect I would like to mention one more thing

title: OLD - THE SAME AS ALONE?
text: Today you sometimes hear or read about crimes that are probably partly caused by the lack of respect that many young people have for old people

title: OLD - THE SAME AS ALONE?
text: Robberies, abuse etc

title: OLD - THE SAME AS ALONE?
text: This lack of respect I think would, to some extent, be prevented if young people would be more used to being around their older relatives

title: OLD - THE SAME AS ALONE?
text: They would perhaps see the old lady in the street as "someone's grandmother" rather than just "an old hag"

title: OLD - THE SAME AS ALONE?
text: Finally I would like to stress how important it is for a person's well-being to be surrounded by people that he or she knows

title: OLD - THE SAME AS ALONE?
text: And this does not change just because you get older

title: OLD - THE SAME AS ALONE?
text: If society would stop dividing people into separate groups, depending mostly on their age, there would not be as many lonely and depressed persons as there are in society today, and being old would probably not have to mean the same as being alone

title: OLD - THE SAME AS ALONE?
Why the element of surprise is dear to man.
text: The human brain has a never-ceasing need to classify and organize new things it encounter in our environment

title: Why the element of surprise is dear to man.
text: We like the safety of knowing what we are dealing with when we move around on our daily routines

title: Why the element of surprise is dear to man.
text: But at the same time, as much as we are dependent on things to work in a familiar way, we need to be surprised

title: Why the element of surprise is dear to man.
text: Surprise is born in the contrast between how we expect things to be or behave and how they eventually turn out

title: Why the element of surprise is dear to man.
text: This contrast can be taken to a certain extent; we all have different thresholds for what we can take in certain situations

title: Why the element of surprise is dear to man.
text: There is for example not much room for us coping with something unexpected when we already are under a considerable amount of stress

title: Why the element of surprise is dear to man.
text: However, in sensible doses, there will always be a need for excitement created by something not presently thought of to happen, to change our otherwise dull and slentrian ways of living our lives (as a result of our perverse need to feel in control, of which the brain has mastery)

title: Why the element of surprise is dear to man.
text: The following text consists of examples supporting this theory

title: Why the element of surprise is dear to man.
text: Why we find certain jokes humorus has been debated for ages and there are no easy answers

title: Why the element of surprise is dear to man.
text: I think I can acertain though, that many jokes has the unveiling of something unexpected in the punch line or an ending with a twist of some kind, as essential to their success

title: Why the element of surprise is dear to man.
text: Hopefully this agrees with the receiver's sense of humor, in which case the thrill is attained and perhaps the breaking of unnecessary tension also is achieved

title: Why the element of surprise is dear to man.
text: In a relationship you do little things to show affection to your partner, things you might have arranged for unasked or do in a way contrary to the usual and thereby create an element of surprise, probably in a romantic sense

title: Why the element of surprise is dear to man.
text: These are intended to cause excitement, positively influencing the relationship

title: Why the element of surprise is dear to man.
text: Movies and literature gives us thrills

title: Why the element of surprise is dear to man.
text: We watch and read for the sake of suspense, uncertainty and perhaps shocking special effects

title: Why the element of surprise is dear to man.
text: Scenarios where we feel we have many things in common with the main characters and where the unraveling of events is unexpected but possible, tend to strike a certain chord in us and we get more tied up in what is going to happen to these persons

title: Why the element of surprise is dear to man.
text: Thus the unexpected event the character is experiencing can have more real-life-like effects on the watcher's/reader's mind

title: Why the element of surprise is dear to man.
text: Different ages have different needs of surprising events, all according to experience

title: Why the element of surprise is dear to man.
text: The game of Peek-a-boo may for instance give small children a cheap thrill, while an older person need a somewhat more unprobable case of events presented to him/her to be entertained

title: Why the element of surprise is dear to man.
text: In either way it is the surprise that gets to them

title: Why the element of surprise is dear to man.
text: Some levels of stress can be positive, to keep you alert, when holding a lecture, etc

title: Why the element of surprise is dear to man.
text: Here it is more the fear of surprise (let us say the fear of having half the audience standing up and leaving in the middle of your presentation or have them laughing at / booing your essential ideas) which makes us stressed rather than the surprise itself

title: Why the element of surprise is dear to man.
text: The effects surprise has on us in the instances above is something we welcome and appreciate

title: Why the element of surprise is dear to man.
text: We need this in order to feel that we have been through something meaningful by the end of the day

title: Why the element of surprise is dear to man.
text: The element of surprise is useful in many situations to make other people feel better or to brake the tension of a situation

title: Why the element of surprise is dear to man.
text: Sometimes the awareness of that a surprising event is probable to take place, but not what shape it will present itself in, is enough to be thrilled

title: Why the element of surprise is dear to man.
text: The brain is ambivalent in its handling of the element of surprise; it wants to have control of a situation, which it gets by learning about and organizing things present in that situation, but it also has a need to be surprised and perhaps overwhelmed by unexpected series of events

title: Why the element of surprise is dear to man.
text: The element of surprise is indeed a dear thing to man, of wich he/she tries to encounter on a daily basis, to make the ordinary life we all experience less dull

title: Why the element of surprise is dear to man.
Test the mental health of the police force
text: The last couple of years the reports about police officers being too violent while making an arrest or supervise an event have increased dramatically

title: Test the mental health of the police force
text: Before I moved to Stockholm I did not know much about this and had never met anyone who had been exposed to this

title: Test the mental health of the police force
text: But now almost half of my male friends have some experience from police brutality

title: Test the mental health of the police force
text: And to tell the truth, I'm scared of the police

title: Test the mental health of the police force
text: I don't know if this is a phenomena only found in big cities

title: Test the mental health of the police force
text: But on the other hand that should not matter

title: Test the mental health of the police force
text: Because of all this I think the policemen should have to be mentally tested, not only when they apply to the education, but also at least every fifth year during their professional career

title: Test the mental health of the police force
text: Last weekend there was a demonstration in Stockholm against police brutality, because of an incident the weekend before that, when a lot of youths were beaten and arrested by the police for blocking and painting the street

title: Test the mental health of the police force
text: It might be that it was necessary for the police to interfere but the police is supposed to use the least violent method, which they could not possibly have done

title: Test the mental health of the police force
text: Another example of police officers being to aggressive is one of my boyfriend's experiences

title: Test the mental health of the police force
text: It happened at a soccer match

title: Test the mental health of the police force
text: The policemen pulled two of his friends in to their bus and beat them with truncheons, although Swedish police is not even allowed to use these any more

title: Test the mental health of the police force
text: And may I point out here that all these boys had done was to refuse to leave the cue to the mobile shop where they were standing

title: Test the mental health of the police force
text: When they refused the police provoked them, by calling them names, to yell at the them

title: Test the mental health of the police force
text: Hardly something you deserve getting beaten for! About a year ago a young girl was molested and by policemen treated in an inhuman way at a police station after she was arrested

title: Test the mental health of the police force
text: I do not think this is the way it's supposed to be! But on the other hand we can't take away the police officers

title: Test the mental health of the police force
text: They are after all here to make the citizens feel secure and to protect them and stop criminal activity

title: Test the mental health of the police force
text: And we need them

title: Test the mental health of the police force
text: Before accepted to the police academy the applicants are mentally tested to make sure they are suitable for the job

title: Test the mental health of the police force
text: You would think that this would mean that the police officers are mentally stabile, but obviously something is happening over the years that makes them more aggressive

title: Test the mental health of the police force
text: I think it is very hard to find out what that something is, and until someone does and the problem with violent police officers can be solved, I think all police officers mentality shall be tested at least every fifth year

title: Test the mental health of the police force
text: Society have a lot to win by doing so

title: Test the mental health of the police force
text: First of all people like myself, who hear a lot of scary examples about police brutality can stop being afraid of them and get some respect back instead

title: Test the mental health of the police force
text: And if the police stop provoking youths to be violent there would not be so many fights all the time between young people and the police

title: Test the mental health of the police force
text: Now, it's almost as if the police are creating their own jobs by causing disorder

title: Test the mental health of the police force
text: As it is now, many youths have no confidence in the police force and every now and than you hear young people say that they hate the police, and I don't think that's something they just say to act cool in front of friends

title: Test the mental health of the police force
text: The police need to regain some respect and the best way to do so is to stop provoking people, stop using more violence than necessary, and for this to be possible the quality of the police men has to be higher

title: Test the mental health of the police force
text: Those who abuse their position has to be told not to do so or be removed from work

title: Test the mental health of the police force
text: We can not have a society were people are afraid of it's lawmen

title: Test the mental health of the police force
text: Therefor we need to test the mentality of our police, so that we have a chance to find those who are not suitable for the police work

title: Test the mental health of the police force
No to separation for Basque Nationalists.
text: I am sure that all of us several times have read newspaper articles about the liberation movement in the Basque Country, Spain

title: No to separation for Basque Nationalists.
text: We have been presented photographs of men dressed in black clothes with robber's hoods and weapons, demanding freedom for their homeland

title: No to separation for Basque Nationalists.
text: It could be anywhere in the world, but it is actually not that far from us

title: No to separation for Basque Nationalists.
text: Even in Europe, in the European Union, we have this problem

title: No to separation for Basque Nationalists.
text: Can terrorism ever be accepted and if so, on what basis? Should the Spanish government accept and cooperate with these men who actually are criminal? This matter affects many people daily, but it's not very much debated

title: No to separation for Basque Nationalists.
text: What lies behind the Basque nationalism and why is it so violent? It is impossible to visit northern Spain without noticing the problems, and after a year in Bilbao I have seen enough of the "Liberation Movement" to make a stand against it

title: No to separation for Basque Nationalists.
text: However, when discussing minority groups in general it is important to be aware of their historical background and other issues like religion or minority language that have separated them from other groups

title: No to separation for Basque Nationalists.
text: For the Basque people the key factor for separation has been their mother tongue Euskera

title: No to separation for Basque Nationalists.
text: Euskera is considered to be the oldest still spoken language in the world and has no connection to any other language

title: No to separation for Basque Nationalists.
text: 1 Like all languages, Euskera expresses so much more than just words for communication

title: No to separation for Basque Nationalists.
text: Included in the language is also culture, tradition, history etc

title: No to separation for Basque Nationalists.
text: This gives the speakers a national identity that unites them

title: No to separation for Basque Nationalists.
text: Therefore, what could possibly be more efficient if you want to split up a minority group than forbidding their language and education of their children? This is what General Franco did when he after the Spanish Civil War 1936 led the Spanish nation in to an era of terror and dictatorship

HIP-HOPPIN'TO THE BE-BOPPIN': DEFENDING THE HONOUR OF RAP MUSIC
text: Ever since rap, or hip-hop music began to reach beyond the urban black ghettos of North Americas major cities, it has been accused of glorifying violence and sexism as well as proclaiming reverse racism

title: HIP-HOPPIN'TO THE BE-BOPPIN': DEFENDING THE HONOUR OF RAP MUSIC
text: But perhaps most importantly: rap has to date not been recognized as a distinct and valuable form of music

title: HIP-HOPPIN'TO THE BE-BOPPIN': DEFENDING THE HONOUR OF RAP MUSIC
text: This essay will argue that rap music is a valid continuation of the African American cultural idiom, and that it as an art form, and as a social and cultural testimony, must be valued as highly as earlier forms of black music like blues, gospel and jazz

title: HIP-HOPPIN'TO THE BE-BOPPIN': DEFENDING THE HONOUR OF RAP MUSIC
text: I will show that the driving force behind the development of the different genres of black music, can be traced to a basic dialectic process in which each new form of black music has been a reaction against the commercialisation of the previous generations musical expression

title: HIP-HOPPIN'TO THE BE-BOPPIN': DEFENDING THE HONOUR OF RAP MUSIC
text: This process of reclaiming ones cultural heritage and recreating it is as evident in the birth of the modern jazz movement of the 1940s, as it is in the creation of hip-hop and rap in the late 1970s and early 80s

title: HIP-HOPPIN'TO THE BE-BOPPIN': DEFENDING THE HONOUR OF RAP MUSIC
text: Rap, the music of the African American youth, is primarly the music of resistance

title: HIP-HOPPIN'TO THE BE-BOPPIN': DEFENDING THE HONOUR OF RAP MUSIC
text: Like all earlier forms of black music it constitutes a radical attempt by black people to express themselves, as well as trying to create a sphere of communication that's beyond the grasp of the white commercial recording industry

title: HIP-HOPPIN'TO THE BE-BOPPIN': DEFENDING THE HONOUR OF RAP MUSIC
text: Rap music is perhaps the best example of how a new generation of black people are taking the music "back to the street", in order to escape exploitation at the hands of greedy business men

title: HIP-HOPPIN'TO THE BE-BOPPIN': DEFENDING THE HONOUR OF RAP MUSIC
text: The abandonment of the glamorous disco movement, with its extravagant stage shows and outrageous costumes, in favour of the simple formula of a turntable and a microphone, clearly manifests the essence of black music

title: HIP-HOPPIN'TO THE BE-BOPPIN': DEFENDING THE HONOUR OF RAP MUSIC
text: Music has never just been about money for black people

title: HIP-HOPPIN'TO THE BE-BOPPIN': DEFENDING THE HONOUR OF RAP MUSIC
text: It has been their only available mode of expression, in a racist society that seeks to control their every move (especially when this movement was collective)

title: HIP-HOPPIN'TO THE BE-BOPPIN': DEFENDING THE HONOUR OF RAP MUSIC
text: The slaves were left with nothing but their voices and bodies, and that was enough

title: HIP-HOPPIN'TO THE BE-BOPPIN': DEFENDING THE HONOUR OF RAP MUSIC
text: With these instruments they created worksongs, which later merged with hymns and became gospel

title: HIP-HOPPIN'TO THE BE-BOPPIN': DEFENDING THE HONOUR OF RAP MUSIC

title: HIP-HOPPIN'TO THE BE-BOPPIN': DEFENDING THE HONOUR OF RAP MUSIC
text: The clearest examples of this phenomenon is found in jazz and rap music

title: HIP-HOPPIN'TO THE BE-BOPPIN': DEFENDING THE HONOUR OF RAP MUSIC
text: Jazz incorporated European instruments and concepts from classical music and transformed them into a distinct form of black music

title: HIP-HOPPIN'TO THE BE-BOPPIN': DEFENDING THE HONOUR OF RAP MUSIC
text: The pioneers of hip hop changed the gramophone, a devise constructed solely for the purpose of playing recorded music, into an instrument capable of making its own melodies and improvisations

title: HIP-HOPPIN'TO THE BE-BOPPIN': DEFENDING THE HONOUR OF RAP MUSIC
text: What the African American musical evolution has been about, is in essence, the attempt to "africanize" all these elements of European music

title: HIP-HOPPIN'TO THE BE-BOPPIN': DEFENDING THE HONOUR OF RAP MUSIC
text: Africans never bothered with meter, scales, pitch etc

title: HIP-HOPPIN'TO THE BE-BOPPIN': DEFENDING THE HONOUR OF RAP MUSIC
text: in the same way as the European composers

title: HIP-HOPPIN'TO THE BE-BOPPIN': DEFENDING THE HONOUR OF RAP MUSIC
text: I'm not implying that these concepts don't exist in African music, they do

title: HIP-HOPPIN'TO THE BE-BOPPIN': DEFENDING THE HONOUR OF RAP MUSIC
text: But the people never payed them much mind

title: HIP-HOPPIN'TO THE BE-BOPPIN': DEFENDING THE HONOUR OF RAP MUSIC

title: HIP-HOPPIN'TO THE BE-BOPPIN': DEFENDING THE HONOUR OF RAP MUSIC
text: This was the main difference between the African American and European conceptions of music

title: HIP-HOPPIN'TO THE BE-BOPPIN': DEFENDING THE HONOUR OF RAP MUSIC

title: HIP-HOPPIN'TO THE BE-BOPPIN': DEFENDING THE HONOUR OF RAP MUSIC

title: HIP-HOPPIN'TO THE BE-BOPPIN': DEFENDING THE HONOUR OF RAP MUSIC
text: This has created a dialectic process, in which each attempt to capitalize on a form of black music, has been met by a new generation of musicians adapting the earlier tradition to a new social and cultural climate

text: Just as the modern jazz of the 40s was a slap in the face of the racism of white middle-class America; just as the soul and funk of the 60s and 70s raised their fists in the name of Black Power, so is the rap music of today a cry for justice from the back alleys of the Promised Land

title: HIP-HOPPIN'TO THE BE-BOPPIN': DEFENDING THE HONOUR OF RAP MUSIC
text: The critics of rap music is basically expressing the same racism and fear (fear of having to finally take responsability for centuries of oppression of its minorities) that critics of the different modern jazz forms did decades ago

title: HIP-HOPPIN'TO THE BE-BOPPIN': DEFENDING THE HONOUR OF RAP MUSIC
text: Those who claim that rap doesn't qualifiy as an art form, or even as music, has not understood the African American conception of what music is

title: HIP-HOPPIN'TO THE BE-BOPPIN': DEFENDING THE HONOUR OF RAP MUSIC
text: The quality of music is not measured in relation to its complexity, orchestration or theorethical blueprint

title: HIP-HOPPIN'TO THE BE-BOPPIN': DEFENDING THE HONOUR OF RAP MUSIC
text: Good music is emotional, it's provocative, it raises questions about right and wrong

title: HIP-HOPPIN'TO THE BE-BOPPIN': DEFENDING THE HONOUR OF RAP MUSIC
text: Good black music speaks to you, and it demands a response, it demands your participation

title: HIP-HOPPIN'TO THE BE-BOPPIN': DEFENDING THE HONOUR OF RAP MUSIC
text: Good African American music is an expression of what it means to be black in a racist society

title: HIP-HOPPIN'TO THE BE-BOPPIN': DEFENDING THE HONOUR OF RAP MUSIC
text: It is, by definition, a social commentary, whether it's instrumental jazz or vocal rap music

title: HIP-HOPPIN'TO THE BE-BOPPIN': DEFENDING THE HONOUR OF RAP MUSIC
text: Black music doesn't need words to express the anger and frustration of it's people

title: HIP-HOPPIN'TO THE BE-BOPPIN': DEFENDING THE HONOUR OF RAP MUSIC
text: Every aspect of their emotional spectra is right there, in the composition of he music, in the beat of the drum, in the howling cries, or the sweet, warm tones of the saxophone

title: HIP-HOPPIN'TO THE BE-BOPPIN': DEFENDING THE HONOUR OF RAP MUSIC
text: Black music doesn't require notes or a schooled musician, it doesn't even need a melody (in the Western sense of the word), all it really needs is rhythm and a message

title: HIP-HOPPIN'TO THE BE-BOPPIN': DEFENDING THE HONOUR OF RAP MUSIC
text: The violence and sexism in the lyrics of rappers is not fictional, neither is it a form of entertainment

title: HIP-HOPPIN'TO THE BE-BOPPIN': DEFENDING THE HONOUR OF RAP MUSIC
text: The lyrics are a reflection of an existing reality

title: HIP-HOPPIN'TO THE BE-BOPPIN': DEFENDING THE HONOUR OF RAP MUSIC
text: A reality where black people are constantly being oppressed and isolated, and turning on each other in desperation

title: HIP-HOPPIN'TO THE BE-BOPPIN': DEFENDING THE HONOUR OF RAP MUSIC
text: These lyrics are no more violent, and no more unjustified than the furious cries of John Coltrane's saxophone in the turbulent days of the 1960s

title: HIP-HOPPIN'TO THE BE-BOPPIN': DEFENDING THE HONOUR OF RAP MUSIC
text: Rappers today are doing what black musicians always has done

title: HIP-HOPPIN'TO THE BE-BOPPIN': DEFENDING THE HONOUR OF RAP MUSIC
text: They are trying to regain the control over their own cultural heritage from the hands of a predominately white recording industry

title: HIP-HOPPIN'TO THE BE-BOPPIN': DEFENDING THE HONOUR OF RAP MUSIC
text: They are demanding that they be given the freedom of expression that they've never been granted

title: HIP-HOPPIN'TO THE BE-BOPPIN': DEFENDING THE HONOUR OF RAP MUSIC
text: The freedom to express every aspect of what it means to be a black person in the United States (including those aspects that certain parts of society don't want to deal with)

title: HIP-HOPPIN'TO THE BE-BOPPIN': DEFENDING THE HONOUR OF RAP MUSIC
text: Therefore rap is, as all forms of African American music, a protest and a social commentary

title: HIP-HOPPIN'TO THE BE-BOPPIN': DEFENDING THE HONOUR OF RAP MUSIC
text: But, as all other forms of black music, it's also an art form and it shouldn't be judged on the basis of Western concepts of music

title: HIP-HOPPIN'TO THE BE-BOPPIN': DEFENDING THE HONOUR OF RAP MUSIC
text: Instead it should be viewed as the latest stage in the evolution of African American music, and as a revaluation and readaptation of all the earlier stages of this process to a new social and cultural situation

title: HIP-HOPPIN'TO THE BE-BOPPIN': DEFENDING THE HONOUR OF RAP MUSIC

Religious Studies - a matter of life itself
text: Every time the curriculum for Swedish high school is up for revision, there is someone who tries to argue that Religious Studies is not necessary for everyone to take

title: Religious Studies - a matter of life itself
text: This is a standpoint I can not agree with

title: Religious Studies - a matter of life itself
text: Instead, I would like to point out to you why I consider it being of great importance to keep Religious Studies as a compulsory subject in Swedish high school

title: Religious Studies - a matter of life itself
text: To start with, I would like you to stop and think of the picture that meets you every time you enter the streets of any Swedish town today

title: Religious Studies - a matter of life itself
text: Look at the people you meet! Their skin color differs from one another's, their hair, their names - every where you look there is diversity

title: Religious Studies - a matter of life itself
text: Today's Swedes are no longer necessarily blond with blue eyes - in fact, some women do not even show their hair but hide it under a scarf

title: Religious Studies - a matter of life itself
text: However, if it was only the outside of people that differed, that would maybe not be a big problem, byt that is not the case

title: Religious Studies - a matter of life itself
text: Not only do people look different but they do also act in different ways from what we may be used to

title: Religious Studies - a matter of life itself
text: They speak and act in a way we do not always understand and this causes some of us to be frigthened

title: Religious Studies - a matter of life itself
text: It is a most human reaction to be afraid of the things we do not understand

title: Religious Studies - a matter of life itself
text: A recent example of what fear of the unknown might lead to is given by the debate preceding the building of a mosque in Uppsala

title: Religious Studies - a matter of life itself
text: Many people were afraid of what a minaret would do to the city silhouette and how much the calling to prayer would disturb the neighbourhood

title: Religious Studies - a matter of life itself
text: In the end it was decided that the minareth in question was not allowed to be built higher than the top of the nearby gymnastics hall and there would be no calls from the minareth, since almost none of the members of the muslim society of our town live near enough to hear it anyway

title: Religious Studies - a matter of life itself
text: This is an interesting debate, I think, considering the summarized amount of hours that Swedish Church bells are ringing in a year

title: Religious Studies - a matter of life itself
text: No one tries to argue that this is so disturbing that it ought to be forbidden

title: Religious Studies - a matter of life itself
text: On the contrary, I would like to argue that if we knew more about the people who have come to live in Sweden for various reasons, about their cultural backgrounds and the places where they used to live, much of the fear would fade away

title: Religious Studies - a matter of life itself
text: Since religion is such an important part of culture, this is why Religious Studies is important for Swedish high school students

title: Religious Studies - a matter of life itself
text: Considering the above, my opinion is that a knowledge of different religions and cultures gives a person an understanding of other people, their lives and thinking

title: Religious Studies - a matter of life itself
text: Understanding helps you to overcome your fear of the formerly unknown

title: Religious Studies - a matter of life itself
text: Under-standing your neighbor's way of living in contrast to your own also gives you an understanding of Swedish society as it is today

title: Religious Studies - a matter of life itself
text: The question of Swedish society can also be highlighted by the almanac

title: Religious Studies - a matter of life itself
text: Religious Studies as a subject studied in high school can give both native and immigrant Swedish teenagers an answer to why we have a holidays like Christmas, Easter and All Saints Day

title: Religious Studies - a matter of life itself
text: As a matter of fact, our country and its laws are formed on a Christian set of values and beliefs

title: Religious Studies - a matter of life itself
text: Religious Studies should be able to contribute to an understanding of the history and tradition of the country we all live in

title: Religious Studies - a matter of life itself
text: Finally, some people might want to argue that Religious Studies are of no importance for a seventeen-year-old boy who wants to work as a meachanic

title: Religious Studies - a matter of life itself
text: Why does he have to study such a specialized and theoretic subject? My answer to that is simple: Because the mechanic working next to him might bear the name Muhammed and he may very well prefer spending his Friday lunch hour praying instead of eating a pizza with cheese, tomato and ham on top

title: Religious Studies - a matter of life itself
text: If the young man is given tuition in different religious beliefs, he will more easily understand Muhammed's choice and not just put him off as odd

title: Religious Studies - a matter of life itself
text: The aim of my argument has been to show that Religious Studies is a subject that deals with life itself and of understanding our own context

title: Religious Studies - a matter of life itself
text: That is why it is essential to keep this subject as a compulsory subject for Swedish teenagers to study in high school

title: Religious Studies - a matter of life itself
Swedens carnivores­ a big threat!
text: Today, more than 10 000 reindeers are killed every year by Sweden's four big carnivores; the bear, the wolf, the lynx and the wolverine

title: Swedens carnivores­ a big threat!
text: Accordingly, the carnivores are the greatest threat against the reindeer breeding

title: Swedens carnivores­ a big threat!
text: Several reindeer breeders have found it impossible to go on with their business when their capital functions as prey

title: Swedens carnivores­ a big threat!
text: The opinion in Sweden has in the last decades turned and the vast majority of the population are in favour of an increased number of carnivores in our surroundings

title: Swedens carnivores­ a big threat!
text: Is it, thou, justified that one group shall suffer from all its consequences? It seems to me like the Swedish authorities doesn't know how to handle this question and in decision making they act irrationally

title: Swedens carnivores­ a big threat!
text: For many reindeer breeders this question is a matter of giving up there livelihood and part of their culture, and therefore the problem has to be taken seriously and it must be discussed

title: Swedens carnivores­ a big threat!
text: Reindeer breeders are especially affected by carnivores as reindeers by custom aren't kept in fences

title: Swedens carnivores­ a big threat!
text: They are in the spring moved from the woodlands to mountainareas where they have their calves and graze during the summer months

title: Swedens carnivores­ a big threat!
text: In the autumn they are moved back to the woodlands

title: Swedens carnivores­ a big threat!
text: It is difficult to protect the animals from being attacked considering the fact that the reindeer breeders don't supervise their animals on a daily basis

title: Swedens carnivores­ a big threat!
text: It is therefore essential to reduce every risk of loosing capital

title: Swedens carnivores­ a big threat!
text: A raindeer breeder are not allowed to kill a carnivore threatening his herd without permission from higher authority

title: Swedens carnivores­ a big threat!
text: Since the general policy in Sweden is to keep as many carnivores as possible their requests are often rejected, and in frustration they illegally kill the threatening animal

title: Swedens carnivores­ a big threat!
text: Having in mind that one single lynx can kill 100 reindeers (weakened by a cold winter with lots of snow and bad nutrition) at one occasion you can imagine the frustration felt by the raindeer breeder when his request of shooting the lynx is turned down

title: Swedens carnivores­ a big threat!
text: I'm not saying that the lynx is a beast, she is simply acting according to her instincts, killing as many prey as possible to

title: Swedens carnivores­ a big threat!
text: As already mentioned many reindeer breeders, especially in the counties of Härjedalen and Jämtland, have been forced to give up their business due to the fact that their reindeers functions as prey

title: Swedens carnivores­ a big threat!
text: I think a reindeer breeder should have the right to defend his herd against threatening carnivores to a greater extent than today

title: Swedens carnivores­ a big threat!
text: In the past centuries Sweden's larger carnivores were consider as a big threat

title: Swedens carnivores­ a big threat!
text: The frequent hunt of them even lead to the extinction of the Swedish wolves

title: Swedens carnivores­ a big threat!
text: Wolves and lynx are originally not found in mountain areas

title: Swedens carnivores­ a big threat!
text: They are animals adopted to the forest, but when the animals interests collided with human they were outclassed by human establishment

title: Swedens carnivores­ a big threat!
text: The carnivores who survived was those established far away from urban areas

title: Swedens carnivores­ a big threat!
text: Since the opinion has turned in the last decades and the number of carnivores are allowed to increase, the number of carnivores in non urban areas have consequently increased considerable

title: Swedens carnivores­ a big threat!
text: However, reindeer breeders have always lived in and kept their reindeers in this areas in the winter and with the increasing number of carnivores and the prohibition of shooting them, they are in a precarious situation

title: Swedens carnivores­ a big threat!
text: The reindeer breeders are a small and anonymous group and not much of this inflamed discussion has reached the rest of Sweden

title: Swedens carnivores­ a big threat!
text: What have reached the news is that reindeer breeders illegally and beastly kills carnivores

title: Swedens carnivores­ a big threat!
text: In contrast, if a bear kills 40 sheep, like in recently, or if wolves attacks huntingdogs, like in Värmland respective Småland recently, it is justified to shoot them

title: Swedens carnivores­ a big threat!
text: People can relate to a farmer loosing sheep and a hunter loosing a dog and therefore the carnivore is looked upon as a threat

title: Swedens carnivores­ a big threat!
text: The same goes for bears and wolves who wander off, ending up in the woods surrounding Stockholm

title: Swedens carnivores­ a big threat!
text: They first become a big tourist attractions and then after having consulted experts it is decided that they needs to be shooten

title: Swedens carnivores­ a big threat!
text: Sweden's larger carnivores are a great threat to the reindeer breeding

title: Swedens carnivores­ a big threat!
text: According to me a reindeer breeder should have the right to protect his capital without first having to ask for permission

title: Swedens carnivores­ a big threat!
text: I don't realise why one small minority group has to face all the concequeses concerning Sweden wanting to increase its number of carnivores

title: Swedens carnivores­ a big threat!
text: It is relevant to ask weather reindeer breeding just are going to function as a food producer enabling Sweden to pride itself having rescued the wolves and the lynx

title: Swedens carnivores­ a big threat!
Save pop music - boycott "carbon-paper" artists!
text: Popular music of today is badly infected with a virus called 'cover songs'

title: Save pop music - boycott "carbon-paper" artists!
text: A cover song is best described as a song that is written and/or performed by one artist, and after a period of time 'recycled' and performed by another

title: Save pop music - boycott "carbon-paper" artists!
text: If the first artist turned the song into a huge commercial hit, the second one probably will too

title: Save pop music - boycott "carbon-paper" artists!
text: The popular music of today suffers badly from this virus, and if nothing is done about it, popular music as we know it may very well die, due to a lack of new ideas

title: Save pop music - boycott "carbon-paper" artists!
text: We don't want that to happen, do we? So, the only way ordinary music consumers can help wiping out the virus is by boycotting CD's and other recordings that include cover songs

title: Save pop music - boycott "carbon-paper" artists!
text: Nobody in his right mind would ever bring a box of crayons to a museum to "improve a few of the paintings"

title: Save pop music - boycott "carbon-paper" artists!
text: People respect the paintings as well as the artists too much to even think of such a stupid idea

title: Save pop music - boycott "carbon-paper" artists!
text: A song is in many respects a piece of art and therefore deserves to be treated with respect

title: Save pop music - boycott "carbon-paper" artists!
text: Naturally, the same goes for the songwriter

title: Save pop music - boycott "carbon-paper" artists!
text: But very often, that is not the case

title: Save pop music - boycott "carbon-paper" artists!
text: Let me give you a recent example: The way, for instance, A-Teens (former ABBA-teens, four teenagers doing ABBA songs) treat old ABBA classics reveals a total lack of respect, no matter what the manager of the group claims

title: Save pop music - boycott "carbon-paper" artists!
text: In his opinion, A-Teens keep 'the spirit of ABBA' alive by copying old ABBA hits

title: Save pop music - boycott "carbon-paper" artists!
text: But the truth is probably that 'the spirit of ABBA' was doing just fine without the help of A-Teens, probably even better than now

title: Save pop music - boycott "carbon-paper" artists!
text: Björn Ulvaeus and Benny Andersson, the men behind the original hits, obviously were taken by surprise by the record company and therefore weren't able to stop the project at the very beginning, even though I am certain they would have wanted to

title: Save pop music - boycott "carbon-paper" artists!
text: At least they were able to change the name of the teen group from ABBA-teens to A-teens, and that way avoid further degradation

title: Save pop music - boycott "carbon-paper" artists!
text: But by buying an A-Teen album you participate in ruining the reputations of two outstanding artists who deserve better than that

title: Save pop music - boycott "carbon-paper" artists!
text: Then there is the question of money

title: Save pop music - boycott "carbon-paper" artists!
text: Is it ethical to profit from another persons hard work? In my opinion, absolutely not

title: Save pop music - boycott "carbon-paper" artists!
text: But that is what has happened in many cases throughout musical history

title: Save pop music - boycott "carbon-paper" artists!
text: As an example I could mention the all-female rock group Star

title: Save pop music - boycott "carbon-paper" artists!
text: They were totally unknown until only a few months ago when somebody in their organisation, probably a smart manager, realised that they would stay unknown - and broke - forever, unless something happened

title: Save pop music - boycott "carbon-paper" artists!
text: Thus, they recorded a new version of the old Kiss song "Heaven's on Fire", which was a big success at the end of the eighties

title: Save pop music - boycott "carbon-paper" artists!
text: And even though the new version is nothing but a bleak copy of the original, it became a hit a second time

title: Save pop music - boycott "carbon-paper" artists!
text: The hit led, as usually, to media attention and now Star are on a major tour in Sweden, making money thanks to somebody else's talents

title: Save pop music - boycott "carbon-paper" artists!
text: It's a fact that cover songs almost always enter the album charts and stay there for at least a couple of weeks

title: Save pop music - boycott "carbon-paper" artists!
text: How does this affect other, still unknown artists? Well, of course they too may find it tempting to give up all artistic efforts and use an already established song to reach 'fame and fortune'

title: Save pop music - boycott "carbon-paper" artists!
text: And successively the art of songwriting is deteriorated, leading to a situation where no artist writes his own songs anymore, since the chance of a breakthrough seems so much bigger with already existing, fool-proof hit material

title: Save pop music - boycott "carbon-paper" artists!
text: And then we definitely have a crisis, musically speaking anyway

title: Save pop music - boycott "carbon-paper" artists!
text: I don't think that anybody wants popular music to die

title: Save pop music - boycott "carbon-paper" artists!
text: In the last four decades it's been a part of (mainly) young people's lives and will probably remain to be

title: Save pop music - boycott "carbon-paper" artists!
text: But it's up to record buyers to decide in which form it will survive

title: Save pop music - boycott "carbon-paper" artists!
text: Will it be constantly changing, developing and exciting? Or will it be tiresome, recycled and choking on the same old verses? I know what I will choose

title: Save pop music - boycott "carbon-paper" artists!
text: Boycott the carbon-paper artists you too

title: Save pop music - boycott "carbon-paper" artists!
Who own the right to my death?
text: In this essay I'm going to discuss active euthanasia

title: Who own the right to my death?
text: I will first give some facts about it and then discuss it and try to explain why I want it to be legal

title: Who own the right to my death?
text: By Swedish law euthanasia is forbidden

title: Who own the right to my death?
text: If you help a person to die you can be prosecuted for murder or manslaughter

title: Who own the right to my death?
text: The law distinguish between good and evil intent, but where the dividing-line should be placed can be hard to construe

title: Who own the right to my death?
text: Euthanasia is divided into two forms: 1) Passive euthanasia, means that in the treatment of very ill and incurable patients one avoids medical or other technical treatments that can result in a prolongation of the patients suffering and life

title: Who own the right to my death?
text: This form of terminal care contains a considerable psychological support and systematically alleviation of the pain except from a good medical care

title: Who own the right to my death?
text: It's a hard decision to take for the doctor and the patient ( if possible), or the relatives of the patient

title: Who own the right to my death?
text: 2) Active euthanasia is measures that directly shortens the life of an patient, and that is forbidden

title: Who own the right to my death?
text: Holland was the first country in the world to legalize active euthanasia year 1993, but since 1986, though it was illegal, it has been possible to get active euthanasia

title: Who own the right to my death?
text: The regulations for active euthanasia in Holland is that the patients request must be of his own free will, his suffering hard and no other treatment possible

title: Who own the right to my death?
text: The doctor have to write a protocol that report the following: - The disease, prognos and earlier treatment of the patient

title: Who own the right to my death?
text: - Who the doctors are that has treated the patient, - the suffering and condition of the patient and what had been done to alleviate the suffering, - in which way the patient made his request of euthanasia, - who the witnesses are that were present and which alternatives that was discussed, - if the doctor have consulted a colleague, and in that case what the result of it was, - who performed the euthanasia, how it was done and who was present

title: Who own the right to my death?
text: Afterwards a medico-legal expert must go through the protocol and issue a death certificate of unnatural death

title: Who own the right to my death?
text: The material shall then be given to an prosecutor that decides if the euthanasia is legal

title: Who own the right to my death?
text: I think that all human beings have the right to their own life

title: Who own the right to my death?
text: The question you can ask then is if the right to life automatically has the consequence that everybody have the right to death? If the individual has the right to life, shouldn't he also have the right to die? I think that he has

title: Who own the right to my death?
text: A person that has the right to his life should have the right to his death

title: Who own the right to my death?
text: Suicide is not punishable in Sweden and therefore help to suicide shouldn't be punishable either, I think

title: Who own the right to my death?
text: If a person who wants to get euthanasia could commit suicide he wouldn't need to ask for it

title: Who own the right to my death?
text: That's one of the reasons why I think that a suffering person shouldn't be forced to a continuing suffering just because other persons are against euthanasia

title: Who own the right to my death?
text: No one knows if death is the end of a persons suffering and that if it is therefore a humanity to kill him

title: Who own the right to my death?
text: That's why I think it's up to the individual himself to make decisions about his own life

title: Who own the right to my death?
text: Relatives of an very ill patient should therefore not be able to make the decision about euthanasia

title: Who own the right to my death?
text: I think that a person can help another person to die if it is clear that it is the person's wish

title: Who own the right to my death?
text: Then, who do I think should make sure that no one gets killed because the killer thought it was the wish of the killed person, though it was not? I think that it is the government, the juridical system that should have the task to try the cases where a person's life gets deprived

title: Who own the right to my death?
text: When a person don't want to live anymore because of his pain and ask for help to die, because he cannot end his life himself, he cannot get legal help in Sweden

title: Who own the right to my death?
text: He is forced to go abroad to do it or to continue to live with the pain

title: Who own the right to my death?
text: I think that it is tragic

title: Who own the right to my death?
text: I mean, it is not an easy decision to make, to decide that you want to die, and that's one other reason why I think that we should take these demands seriously and start working to make euthanasia legal

title: Who own the right to my death?
text: It is good that passive euthanasia is legal, but for those who have some time left to live, for example an Alzheimer sick person who is relatively healthy physically but is not possible to get in contact with mentally, why do he have to live like an helpless baby if he have said that he, when he reaches a certain stage of the illness, don't want to live anymore? Why shall not his wish be respected? Why can't he die if he want to? Why can't he make the decision to end his life when he is really sick when he can do it when he is not? Who want to die a slow death? I think that he should be able to do that

title: Who own the right to my death?
text: I think that we should legalize euthanasia, but do it with strong rules surrounding it, like in Holland that I wrote earlier about

title: Who own the right to my death?
text: I definitely don't want a person killed "by accident"

title: Who own the right to my death?
text: I think the best would be to write a contract with a person who promise to kill you when you are in the special situation where you don't want to live anymore, for example brain death

title: Who own the right to my death?
text: But if a contract where a person have told that he wants to die if he gets into a special situation shall become valid it must be certain that it is the persons desire

title: Who own the right to my death?
text: I suggest that that a good way of doing it is to do it like you write the last will, that you have persons who witness it and that it is juridical correct

title: Who own the right to my death?
text: If that is the case and that the circumstances that is described in the contract arises, I see no reason not to follow the wish of the individual and give the document the same legitimate as an last will

title: Who own the right to my death?
text: If the individual no longer is able to communicate the contract of euthanasia must be the desire of the individual

title: Who own the right to my death?
text: No, I don't think that anyone should have to suffer if he doesn't want to

title: Who own the right to my death?
text: It is his own decision to make that he wants to die

title: Who own the right to my death?
text: Why shall "we" say that we know better than he does and therefore he can't die? Who are we to say that he really don't want to die, and therefore not allow him to do it? Is it just of kindness or is it something else? No, legalize active euthanasia, but let it be strong rules surrounding it, and let the persons who would want to get euthanasia have it if they pass the criteria's for it

title: Who own the right to my death?
Systembolaget-should it remain or be closed down
text: In Sweden there is a monopoly business which aims to reduce the consumption of it's products, yet at the same time provide high-quality products and good service

title: Systembolaget-should it remain or be closed down
text: The products are alcoholic beverages, and the company is Systembolaget

title: Systembolaget-should it remain or be closed down
text: The existence of Systembolaget is a way for the Government to restrict alcohol consumption, and there are few Swedish institutions that have been debated and critizised to the same extent that Systembolaget has

title: Systembolaget-should it remain or be closed down
text: Is it perhaps now time to let the private market provide the Swedes with wine and beer? I will try to consider some pros and cons of the company's being

title: Systembolaget-should it remain or be closed down
text: The main reason for shutting down Systembolaget must be the inconvenience that it causes

title: Systembolaget-should it remain or be closed down
text: How convenient would it not be, to be able to buy the wine in the same store that the rest of the dinner ingredients are being found in

title: Systembolaget-should it remain or be closed down
text: It would save a lot of time and effort in many ways

title: Systembolaget-should it remain or be closed down
text: There would be no worries about transportation to the nearest Systembolaget, or concerns over the opening hours, and there would probably not be any gigantic queues and long times of waiting, which now is quite common

title: Systembolaget-should it remain or be closed down
text: Another aspect that is often heard in this matter is that the Government should not act as a guardian, and that the existence of Systembolaget is restricting the freedom of people and has no rightful place in a free society

title: Systembolaget-should it remain or be closed down
text: Adults ought to be able to take care of themselves, including their drinking habits

title: Systembolaget-should it remain or be closed down
text: The main argument in favour of preserving Systembolaget is that the negative consequences of the use of alcohol probably would increase if alcohol was to be sold in the private market

title: Systembolaget-should it remain or be closed down
text: These consequences are among other things alcoholism, deseases and crimes of violence, and they lead to not only personal tragedies, but also heavy expenses to the society

title: Systembolaget-should it remain or be closed down
text: It is likely to think that alcohol selling in the private market would increase the alcohol consumption, due to the retailers presumed effort to maximize the sales

title: Systembolaget-should it remain or be closed down
text: Not only people with drinking problems, but more or less everyone would probably increase their consumption because of the great availability, which would lead to even more victims of alcoholism, and as a result of the overall increased access to alcohol, young people who are not of age would get hold of alcohol a lot easier

title: Systembolaget-should it remain or be closed down
text: Another fact that speeks for Systembolaget is the service it provides

title: Systembolaget-should it remain or be closed down
text: It seems as if the company in recent years has become more service-minded and more considered about the customers

title: Systembolaget-should it remain or be closed down
text: This may be a consequence of the heavy critizism Systembolaget has received, so there is an effort to please the public opinion

title: Systembolaget-should it remain or be closed down
text: A visit at Systembolaget used to be a depressing experience, where you almost felt like comitting a crime when ordering the bottles by the counter

title: Systembolaget-should it remain or be closed down
text: Nowadays several stores have introduced a system where the customers pick the items from the shelves like in a supermarket, a system which is a great improvement from the customers point of view

title: Systembolaget-should it remain or be closed down
text: What also is in favour of the customers is the large-scale purchases of Systembolaget which provides a wide product range, including odd products

title: Systembolaget-should it remain or be closed down
text: In addition to that, the staff of Systembolaget is educated in, and can offer advice of selecting a certain beverage to a given kind of food

title: Systembolaget-should it remain or be closed down
text: Finally, it has been discussed whether or not to extend the opening hours to Saturdays as well

title: Systembolaget-should it remain or be closed down
text: If this suggestion comes true, it is yet anoher sign of improved service

title: Systembolaget-should it remain or be closed down
text: Should Systembolaget remain as the only retailer of alcohol then? Of course I personally would want to purchase wine and beer conveniently in the closest store

title: Systembolaget-should it remain or be closed down
text: If we lived in a perfect world, or in a perfect Sweden, I would immediately vote for a closure of Systembolaget

title: Systembolaget-should it remain or be closed down
text: However, considering all the problems that derives from some people's use of alcohol, even in the present state of things, a closure would bring serious consequences

title: Systembolaget-should it remain or be closed down
text: I cannot be egoistic about this matter and put my own convenience at first, disregarding the misery of others, as I do not think anyone should

title: Systembolaget-should it remain or be closed down
text: Therefore I believe that a future existence of Systembolaget is clearly justified

title: Systembolaget-should it remain or be closed down
Capital Punishment-the Governments Mortal Sin
text: Opening: We all know that nobody has the right to kill another person

title: Capital Punishment-the Governments Mortal Sin
text: With that in mind I'm questioning the capital punishment
