HOUSE OF KICKS: THE UNDERGROUND'S ENEMY #1.
text: In recent times, the last two or three years, traditional back-to-basic hard rock has caught the attention of Swedish mainstream media

title: HOUSE OF KICKS: THE UNDERGROUND'S ENEMY #1.
text: The figure-heads of this "revival of rock"-trend is unarguably the Swedish bands The Hellacopters and Backyard Babies, together with Norwegians Gluecifer

title: HOUSE OF KICKS: THE UNDERGROUND'S ENEMY #1.
text: This essay is about why these bands have managed to make a name for themselves and why, sadly enough, it's not likely that any new Swedish bands will challenge them at the top

title: HOUSE OF KICKS: THE UNDERGROUND'S ENEMY #1.
text: To be able to fully understand my arguments, some background information about the rock-underground in Sweden is necessary

title: HOUSE OF KICKS: THE UNDERGROUND'S ENEMY #1.
text: Now, the only nationwide distributor of small independent record-labels dealing with metal/punk/hard rock, Swedish labels as well as foreign ones, is House Of Kicks

title: HOUSE OF KICKS: THE UNDERGROUND'S ENEMY #1.
text: This almost monopoly situation puts them in the position where they alone can decide which labels' or bands' records they want record-shops to have in their assortment

title: HOUSE OF KICKS: THE UNDERGROUND'S ENEMY #1.
text: They have the same power when it comes to promotion towards the media

title: HOUSE OF KICKS: THE UNDERGROUND'S ENEMY #1.
text: The people in charge of the music/entertainment-sections in national or local press have, in general, little or no knowledge about the underground-scene, especially when it comes to "extreme music", and they tend to rely on House Of Kicks' recommendations

title: HOUSE OF KICKS: THE UNDERGROUND'S ENEMY #1.
text: In addition to this, House Of Kicks also put out their own records under various label-names

title: HOUSE OF KICKS: THE UNDERGROUND'S ENEMY #1.
text: Needless to say, they of course promote these records harder on the expence of other labels they have agreed to distribute and promote

title: HOUSE OF KICKS: THE UNDERGROUND'S ENEMY #1.
text: Having explained House Of Kicks' dominant position in these fields we can go on discussing the topics I mentioned in my introduction

title: HOUSE OF KICKS: THE UNDERGROUND'S ENEMY #1.
text: So, if the music-press do not always have the interest for new and exciting bands, they certainly always have interest for another aspect of the music-industry; new and exciting trends

title: HOUSE OF KICKS: THE UNDERGROUND'S ENEMY #1.
text: Well aware of this, and their position in Swedish music-industry, House Of Kicks decided to pull off a daring promotion-stunt in 1996

title: HOUSE OF KICKS: THE UNDERGROUND'S ENEMY #1.
text: They invented a new label called White Jazz, dedicated to "true action-packed rock 'n' roll" (actual quote), and as their first signing they chosed Stockholm's The Hellacopters

title: HOUSE OF KICKS: THE UNDERGROUND'S ENEMY #1.
text: This was of course no coincidence, as The Hellacopters had already made a name for themselves in the underground through a couple of self-financed EP's

title: HOUSE OF KICKS: THE UNDERGROUND'S ENEMY #1.
text: However, more important was the fact that the band was the brainchild of Nicke Andersson, who was already well-known to the mainstream audience for his work with the metal-band Entombed

title: HOUSE OF KICKS: THE UNDERGROUND'S ENEMY #1.
text: White Jazz (i

title: HOUSE OF KICKS: THE UNDERGROUND'S ENEMY #1.
text: e

title: HOUSE OF KICKS: THE UNDERGROUND'S ENEMY #1.
text: House Of Kicks) promoted The Hellacopters as "Sweden's only real rock 'n' roll-band", a slogan that trend-seeking music-journalists on national, Stockholm-based, newspapers found irresistible

title: HOUSE OF KICKS: THE UNDERGROUND'S ENEMY #1.
text: Therefore, The Hellacopters began to recieve huge attention from these people, who of course started to act like they had always liked this kind of music, although they had never before mentioned similar bands in their columns

title: HOUSE OF KICKS: THE UNDERGROUND'S ENEMY #1.
HOUSE OF KICKS: THE UNDERGROUND'S ENEMY #1.
HOUSE OF KICKS: THE UNDERGROUND'S ENEMY #1.
text: Anyway, these born-again rockers now praised Rock 'n' Roll in their influential, not to mention hip, Friday entertainment supplements to the regular newspapers

title: HOUSE OF KICKS: THE UNDERGROUND'S ENEMY #1.
text: This made the ball roll, the mainstream audience began to look for Hellacopters-records in their local stores and the hip Stockholm-critics suddenly started to mention long forgotten bands of yesterday as their all-time favourites (yet again, no-one had mentioned them before

title: HOUSE OF KICKS: THE UNDERGROUND'S ENEMY #1.
HOUSE OF KICKS: THE UNDERGROUND'S ENEMY #1.
HOUSE OF KICKS: THE UNDERGROUND'S ENEMY #1.
HOUSE OF KICKS: THE UNDERGROUND'S ENEMY #1.
text: Rock was alive again! Meanwhile, in the not so glamorous world of underground-rock, other bands playing similar music saw their chance to rise to stardom, since everybody in the music-business apparently loved their kind of music, many of these bands already had recordcontracts so what could possibly go wrong? Well, for some reason these bands' records simply didn't got any attention from the distributor, House Of Kicks

title: HOUSE OF KICKS: THE UNDERGROUND'S ENEMY #1.
text: Consequentely, they recieved no back-up from media and for the audience in general they remained in obscurity

title: HOUSE OF KICKS: THE UNDERGROUND'S ENEMY #1.
text: In fact, the only other "Hellacopters-style"-bands that have made an inpact on the market is the above mentioned Backyard Babies, mainly due to the fact that their charismatic guitarist Dregen also played in The Hellacopters, and Gluecifer, which eventually also is signed to White Jazz

title: HOUSE OF KICKS: THE UNDERGROUND'S ENEMY #1.
text: In conclusion, Sweden have a lot of talented hard rock-bands and many of them should appeal to fans of The Hellacopters and the like, given a chance

title: HOUSE OF KICKS: THE UNDERGROUND'S ENEMY #1.
text: However, due to House Of Kicks' corrupt money-making policies and the laziness and shallowness of the coat-turninging music-journalists in general, the majority of the record-buying public is kept in the dark

title: HOUSE OF KICKS: THE UNDERGROUND'S ENEMY #1.
text: The fact that House Of Kicks claim to be part of the underground-movement is merely an insult to the genuine underground's motto of "co-operation, not competition", or to paraphrase The Rolling Stones: "It's only rock 'n' roll, and I don't like it"

title: HOUSE OF KICKS: THE UNDERGROUND'S ENEMY #1.

text: Some politicians in Sweden today advocates a school system where there are no marks

Unemployment-Solutions to the problem
text: Introduction The middle-aged and older people in Sweden were brought up in a time with a strong social network and a low unemployment

title: Unemployment-Solutions to the problem
text: Historically people have considered the government to be responsible for people that are unemployed

title: Unemployment-Solutions to the problem
text: Today this picture is changing

title: Unemployment-Solutions to the problem
text: Older people still blame the government for them being unemployed, while the younger generation takes more responsibility for their unemployment

title: Unemployment-Solutions to the problem
text: They do not blame the society to the same extent, and put in a bigger effort to improve their situation

title: Unemployment-Solutions to the problem
text: In this essay I will discuss arguments concerning whether or not one can, or should, blame the government for people being unemployed and what can be done to decrease the level of unemployment in Sweden

title: Unemployment-Solutions to the problem
text: Unemployment Many people that are unemployed do not put a lot of effort in trying to improve their situation

title: Unemployment-Solutions to the problem
text: They think, that by paying taxes and being a member of a union, they will be taken care of in case they become unemployed

title: Unemployment-Solutions to the problem
text: Unfortunately for them, this is not how it works

title: Unemployment-Solutions to the problem
text: Of course they should receive help from the government and their union in finding a new job as well as getting financial support from their unemployment benefit fund

title: Unemployment-Solutions to the problem
text: This is everybody's right

title: Unemployment-Solutions to the problem
text: The problem is that a lot of people that have been unemployed for a long time have given up

title: Unemployment-Solutions to the problem
text: They are convinced that they will never have a proper job again, and therefore they do not make an effort to find a new job

title: Unemployment-Solutions to the problem
text: This is a dangerous effect of unemployment, people have given up and continue to live on welfare and the unemployment funds

title: Unemployment-Solutions to the problem
text: In Kiruna, a proposal was submitted by the local authorities, stating that people that are unemployed will not receive further support unless they put themselves at disposal for various unemployment programs such as further education or a trainee post

title: Unemployment-Solutions to the problem
text: This program is designed to force people that have given up to activate themselves if they want further support from the state

title: Unemployment-Solutions to the problem
text: There is, as always, both a good and a bad side to this kind of programs

title: Unemployment-Solutions to the problem
text: Can we really motivate an unemployed doctor to take a job selling hamburgers or cleaning houses? Not that there is anything wrong with these jobs, but understandably he or she will not find it very stimulating

title: Unemployment-Solutions to the problem
text: On the other hand, this program might stimulate people to get an education or start their own business

title: Unemployment-Solutions to the problem
text: A lot of middle-aged Swedes are also brought up in a time where grants from the society have been very common

title: Unemployment-Solutions to the problem
text: This has made them very spoiled, and their household economy has been based on, and is dependent on, these grants

title: Unemployment-Solutions to the problem
text: If they for some reason become unemployed, they expect that the government will se to that they do not have to lower their living standards or sell their new car

title: Unemployment-Solutions to the problem
text: This attitude has to change

title: Unemployment-Solutions to the problem
text: The Swedish government has been far too generous in issuing grants for all kinds of purposes

title: Unemployment-Solutions to the problem
text: Grants should only be given to people in real need of them, not to people who want to buy a new car or move into a bigger apartment

title: Unemployment-Solutions to the problem
text: Another aspect of unemployment is a very current one; factory shutdowns

title: Unemployment-Solutions to the problem
text: Very often, the company that shuts down a factory is being considered as an inhumane and horrible employer, who does not care the least about its' employees

title: Unemployment-Solutions to the problem
text: But is unemployment really a company's responsibility? I think not! Of course companies carry a great deal of responsibility for their personnel and should try to find good solutions and alternative jobs in case of a factory shutdown

title: Unemployment-Solutions to the problem
text: But in the long run, the companies biggest responsibility, is to be as profitable and efficient as possible in order to secure jobs for the future and increase wealth of the country

title: Unemployment-Solutions to the problem
text: How can we then create new job opportunities in Sweden? A lot of politicians claim that people starting their own businesses will create the most jobs

title: Unemployment-Solutions to the problem
text: On the other hand, business people all over Sweden, mean that for this to happen the corporate climate of Sweden has to improve

title: Unemployment-Solutions to the problem
text: Most important of all is that it has to be cheaper to employ workers

title: Unemployment-Solutions to the problem
text: Today smaller companies have a hard time expanding, since it is so expensive to hire people because of the high taxation rates on labour

title: Unemployment-Solutions to the problem
text: First after this tax has been significantly reduced, and the corporate climate is more appealing, the desired effect on employment can be experienced

title: Unemployment-Solutions to the problem
text: Conclusion Unemployment in Sweden is going down, from around ten percent in the early 90's it is now down to around five percent

title: Unemployment-Solutions to the problem
text: There is however still a lot of work to be done regarding unemployment problems

title: Unemployment-Solutions to the problem
text: The biggest problems are that people are not willing to take responsibility for their unemployment and that people that have been unemployed for a long time are loosing their hopes about ever finding a job again

title: Unemployment-Solutions to the problem
text: Sweden also need a better corporate climate, taxation on labour is too high for small businesses that want to expand

title: Unemployment-Solutions to the problem
text: We also need to use government funds more wisely, grants are being given to people who are not really in need of them

title: Unemployment-Solutions to the problem
text: Instead, people who are in real need of grants should be able to receive more

title: Unemployment-Solutions to the problem
Monarchy is Feudalistic
text: Most people remain totally indifferent when the question of the Royal family's being or not being is discussed

title: Monarchy is Feudalistic

title: Monarchy is Feudalistic
text: This symbolizes a double moral in a social democratic country where everyone should be equal

title: Monarchy is Feudalistic
text: In an equal society everyone should be able to vote in elections

title: Monarchy is Feudalistic

STOP THE GRADING IN PHYSICAL-EDUCATION!!
text: I have chosen to write my argumentation on a topic that has been very close to me, namely the unfairness of grading students in Physical-Education

title: STOP THE GRADING IN PHYSICAL-EDUCATION!!
text: It is my opinion that you should discard the grading in Physical-Education as it is today(G VG MVG & IG)

title: STOP THE GRADING IN PHYSICAL-EDUCATION!!
text: I have had the opportunity to discuss this with two different Physical-Education teachers and they were both inclined to agree with me on what I had to say

title: STOP THE GRADING IN PHYSICAL-EDUCATION!!
text: In upper secondary school the Physical-Education course is on as much as 130 points(1 point being 1 hour), and therefor it is quite an important course

title: STOP THE GRADING IN PHYSICAL-EDUCATION!!
text: The intention of the course is to give the student an opportunity to move around and get the blood circulation up and as a result of that the student should feel better and achieve better results in other subjects as well

title: STOP THE GRADING IN PHYSICAL-EDUCATION!!
text: The course is in fact called SPORTS & HEALTH(Idrott och hälsa) where the health part has been all but forgotten

title: STOP THE GRADING IN PHYSICAL-EDUCATION!!
text: The Physical-Education is in itself not a bad idea, but many students do not take this chance because they feel that they have to show-off in front of their teachers to get good grades

title: STOP THE GRADING IN PHYSICAL-EDUCATION!!
text: Another thing is that many students find the things they do in class boring

title: STOP THE GRADING IN PHYSICAL-EDUCATION!!
text: Some of the obligatory things that students HAVE to do are; ballgames, track & field sports and high jump, usually a student likes one or some of these sport events but very seldom all

title: STOP THE GRADING IN PHYSICAL-EDUCATION!!
text: The students are expected to perform well in all of them or their average will fall, resulting in a not so good grade

title: STOP THE GRADING IN PHYSICAL-EDUCATION!!
text: All these demands on them gives many students performance anxiety

title: STOP THE GRADING IN PHYSICAL-EDUCATION!!
text: Therefor I have found a good solution - discard the normal grading of Physical-Education! One of the negative responses from teachers have been: "We can not discard the grading, the students would simply choose not to show up"

title: STOP THE GRADING IN PHYSICAL-EDUCATION!!
text: Well for that I have found a solution

title: STOP THE GRADING IN PHYSICAL-EDUCATION!!
text: You could replace the present grading with an old one, the D meaning 'Deltagit'(P for Participate)

title: STOP THE GRADING IN PHYSICAL-EDUCATION!!
text: it does not grade the students performance only his/her participation

title: STOP THE GRADING IN PHYSICAL-EDUCATION!!
text: To be able to get your points for the course you would have to show up at lessons, at least 3/4 of the total, properly dressed and participate in one of the activities, if you do not have a valid reason not to

title: STOP THE GRADING IN PHYSICAL-EDUCATION!!
text: If you were to discard the normal grading much of the performance anxiety would disappear and more students would probably benefit from Physical-Education, the way they are supposed to

title: STOP THE GRADING IN PHYSICAL-EDUCATION!!
text: They would find it more fun, being able to do what they think is fun and not having to do all the things the course plan has set up

title: STOP THE GRADING IN PHYSICAL-EDUCATION!!
text: Another thing that could be a result is that more unusual things could be introduced into the Physical-Education

title: STOP THE GRADING IN PHYSICAL-EDUCATION!!
text: Things that today are not on the course plan

title: STOP THE GRADING IN PHYSICAL-EDUCATION!!
text: For example massage, relaxation gymnastics, Qui Gong/Tai Qui(Chi), aerobics or step-up

title: STOP THE GRADING IN PHYSICAL-EDUCATION!!
text: That might be things that the students might find more interesting than the usual gymnastics and they would probably benefit more from them too

title: STOP THE GRADING IN PHYSICAL-EDUCATION!!
text: You can of course not exclude the old-fashioned sports, there are students who find them interesting

title: STOP THE GRADING IN PHYSICAL-EDUCATION!!
text: As the grading system is today the students who does not have sports as their spare time hobby have problems in performing as well as they who do

title: STOP THE GRADING IN PHYSICAL-EDUCATION!!
text: This is not something that many teachers consider when grading their pupils

title: STOP THE GRADING IN PHYSICAL-EDUCATION!!
text: That results in an unbalance where good grades are given to those who have one or many sports as their spare time hobby

title: STOP THE GRADING IN PHYSICAL-EDUCATION!!
text: The result of this can be rather the opposite of what the Physical-Education was to be all about, moving and feeling better

title: STOP THE GRADING IN PHYSICAL-EDUCATION!!
text: I have seen how such a student, with no spare time sport, was harassed by the teacher, because he/she could not perform as well as the rest of the class, and the sad part in this case was that the other students followed the teachers lead and froze this person out

title: STOP THE GRADING IN PHYSICAL-EDUCATION!!
text: This might not be very common but the fact is that it should not happen at all

title: STOP THE GRADING IN PHYSICAL-EDUCATION!!
text: By removing the grading of students in Physical-Education the harassment would, in my opinion, disappear because the pressure would lessen

title: STOP THE GRADING IN PHYSICAL-EDUCATION!!
text: You would have to keep the grading in the sports programmes in the upper secondary school

title: STOP THE GRADING IN PHYSICAL-EDUCATION!!
text: They are there to have more sports that normal students and the grading of them would by no means be wrong or unfair, because it is of their own choosing

title: STOP THE GRADING IN PHYSICAL-EDUCATION!!
text: They could have their own scale of marks that take into account that they are 'professionals to be' because they usually practise their sport during the lessons

title: STOP THE GRADING IN PHYSICAL-EDUCATION!!
text: My conclusion is that if you were to discard the grading of the normal upper secondary school Physical-Education and letting it be more free of choice, you would have happier students and happier students are healthier students, more willing to participate in the Physical-Education and there by getting the exercise they need

title: STOP THE GRADING IN PHYSICAL-EDUCATION!!
text: It will all become a good circle

title: STOP THE GRADING IN PHYSICAL-EDUCATION!!
Mother, Father, Child: Mother, Mother, Child
text: Sweden is a free, modern country with liberal views

title: Mother, Father, Child: Mother, Mother, Child
text: Although homosexuals' rights in Swedish society are improving, their rights are not the same as heterosexuals' rights

title: Mother, Father, Child: Mother, Mother, Child
text: Since some years ago, homosexual couples have the right to get married, but they do not have the rights to adoption, consequently this can stop them from bringing up a child

title: Mother, Father, Child: Mother, Mother, Child
text: Below I am going to make a comparison between homosexual couples and single parents since they are, in most cases, refused adoption of a child

title: Mother, Father, Child: Mother, Mother, Child
text: But more space will be devoted to homosexual couples compared with heterosexual ones, concerning what makes heterosexuals more suitable as parents, and what a heterosexual couple can give a child that a homosexual cannot

title: Mother, Father, Child: Mother, Mother, Child
text: In my opinion, homosexual couples should have the same rights as heterosexual ones

title: Mother, Father, Child: Mother, Mother, Child
text: Your sexual preference does not determine your appropriateness of bringing up a child

title: Mother, Father, Child: Mother, Mother, Child
text: There are a great number of orphans in this world who are in need of a caring and loving guardian; somebody that would love them like they would love a child of their own

title: Mother, Father, Child: Mother, Mother, Child
text: People that have seriously considered an adoption are individuals that have step by step gone over the procedure of an adoption

title: Mother, Father, Child: Mother, Mother, Child
text: They are willing to struggle for a long period of time, to be ready for the presence of a child

title: Mother, Father, Child: Mother, Mother, Child
text: Questions such as: How are they going to plan the adoption and the years to come?, How are they going to face problems?, have been considered

title: Mother, Father, Child: Mother, Mother, Child
text: However, some people are refused to adopt a child

title: Mother, Father, Child: Mother, Mother, Child
text: Not only because of their financial status or age, but also of the way the have chosen to live their lives

title: Mother, Father, Child: Mother, Mother, Child
text: Single parents and homosexual couples do therefore have something in common: They are seen as incapable of raising a child, even if they have considered the questions above and are ready to face future complications

title: Mother, Father, Child: Mother, Mother, Child
text: In my opinion, there should be no elimination of single people and homosexual couples as potential parents

title: Mother, Father, Child: Mother, Mother, Child
text: Your sexual preference or your civil status does not determine if you are going to be a good parent of not

title: Mother, Father, Child: Mother, Mother, Child
text: As a child you need somebody to look up to, someone to follow and take after

title: Mother, Father, Child: Mother, Mother, Child
text: Most probably, adoption agencies would claim that the adopted child should be able to find these persons within their families; a mother figure and a father figure

title: Mother, Father, Child: Mother, Mother, Child
text: This makes homosexual couples inadequate compared to heterosexual couples

title: Mother, Father, Child: Mother, Mother, Child
text: In contrast, we have to face the fact that the so called nuclear family structure is changing

title: Mother, Father, Child: Mother, Mother, Child
text: Nowadays a great number of families consist of a single parent and his or her children

title: Mother, Father, Child: Mother, Mother, Child
text: Consequently, children start looking for models outside their immediate family

title: Mother, Father, Child: Mother, Mother, Child
text: A grand parent, a teacher, or a close friend to the family can serve as a perfect model for a child

title: Mother, Father, Child: Mother, Mother, Child
text: So after all, a homosexual couple would be just as adequate as a single parent

title: Mother, Father, Child: Mother, Mother, Child
text: Adopted children often grow up not knowing who their biological parents are and what they are like

title: Mother, Father, Child: Mother, Mother, Child
text: In teenage years existential thoughts pop up in every adolescent's head

title: Mother, Father, Child: Mother, Mother, Child
text: For his reason, growing up can be extra hard for adopted children

title: Mother, Father, Child: Mother, Mother, Child
text: A counter argument for letting homosexual couples adopt could be that adopted children should get a child hood and adolescence as "normal" as possible

title: Mother, Father, Child: Mother, Mother, Child
text: Therefore, homosexual couples would not meet up to the "normality" requested as parents by society

title: Mother, Father, Child: Mother, Mother, Child
text: But then we have to ask ourselves the question: What kind of "normality" is it that a homosexual parent cannot give a child that a heterosexual parent can? Honesty? Support? Security? Love? I would say that these parental qualities do not follow sexual preferences

title: Mother, Father, Child: Mother, Mother, Child
text: Since homosexuals do not have the right to adopt I can only refer to a debate program I saw that was broadcasted not that long ago

title: Mother, Father, Child: Mother, Mother, Child
text: A man that grew up with two mothers, one of them being his biological mother, the other one his mother's girlfriend, was interviewed

title: Mother, Father, Child: Mother, Mother, Child
text: His mother's girlfriend had served as an extra mother that had raised him just as much as his biological mother

title: Mother, Father, Child: Mother, Mother, Child
text: He had lived an ordinary childhood

title: Mother, Father, Child: Mother, Mother, Child
text: Of course questions had arisen about his family situation, but he had never suffered from not living in a "normal" family

title: Mother, Father, Child: Mother, Mother, Child
text: Now he is living happily with his future wife

title: Mother, Father, Child: Mother, Mother, Child
text: In brief, my opinion is that heterosexuals and homosexuals should have the same rights in society

title: Mother, Father, Child: Mother, Mother, Child
text: To raise a child is something many couples want to do

title: Mother, Father, Child: Mother, Mother, Child
text: However, homosexual couples are not allowed to

title: Mother, Father, Child: Mother, Mother, Child
text: I think Swedish citizens, living in a modern country should consider homosexual couples as potential parents and to let them adopt children

title: Mother, Father, Child: Mother, Mother, Child
Experimenting with and research on animals
text: There is something called experimenting with animals, that is testing of substances and researching on medicine and illnesses on animals

title: Experimenting with and research on animals
text: There is also research on animals where humans in their craving for knowledge on the function on a certain species do research on it, research that requires that certain individuals be killed

title: Experimenting with and research on animals
text: There are two sides to this coin

title: Experimenting with and research on animals
text: The suffering of the animals or their loss of dignity, because as seen below the animals need not know what is done to them, and the suffering of humans

title: Experimenting with and research on animals
text: As the human society is, obviously, constructed of humans the latter must be the worst for us

title: Experimenting with and research on animals
text: I have encountered two different ways/uses for animals in research, the first is experimenting on animals in research on rheumatism

title: Experimenting with and research on animals
text: Most people think experimenting with animals is not acceptable

title: Experimenting with and research on animals
text: In their minds they are seeing rabbits suffering while used for testing of cosmetics

title: Experimenting with and research on animals
text: I too believe that should be forbidden, but not all experimenting on animals is unnecessary

title: Experimenting with and research on animals
text: Research on rheumatism is, I think, necessary

title: Experimenting with and research on animals
text: This research is for discovering the reason for rheumatism and through that discovery later finding a cure

title: Experimenting with and research on animals
text: At this moment there are only ways of delaying the illness

title: Experimenting with and research on animals
text: The research is done on mice at BMC

title: Experimenting with and research on animals
text: The mice are infected or treated so that they are going to get rheumatism in the future

title: Experimenting with and research on animals
text: When the first signs on the illness shows, but before the mice starts feeling it, they are killed and sliced into parts that are possible to view from under a microscope

title: Experimenting with and research on animals
text: Sometimes unfortunately they have to let the mice live longer and in those cases they are probably suffering from the illness

title: Experimenting with and research on animals
text: On the other hand humans with rheumatism suffer a lot, it is one of the worst diseases there are, especially when it happens to young people and children

title: Experimenting with and research on animals
text: As the suffering of the mice is minimal and the amount of mice used is very restricted, my friend working on this used about 3 mice a day, although this may vary a lot, I believe that this kind of research is highly motivated

title: Experimenting with and research on animals
text: Who when really ill would refuse the medicine or even ask if it was researched on animals

title: Experimenting with and research on animals
text: There are alternatives to using animals are an argument that is often used

title: Experimenting with and research on animals
text: In this case I don't believe that it is possible to research on little clumps of cells as they don't have any joints or on humans, who would that be? Hardly voluntaries

title: Experimenting with and research on animals
text: The other type of experiments made on animals that I have encountered was not for research on human illnesses but for another reason

title: Experimenting with and research on animals
text: At the centre for education of veterinarians there is some animals bred and used only for experimenting

title: Experimenting with and research on animals
text: Apart from bigger animals, like horses and cows, all animals used for experimenting must also be bred especially for experiments

title: Experimenting with and research on animals
text: The most mild use for them is the mares and stallions that are kept for the students to learn of breeding and how to test when a mare is ready for insemination

title: Experimenting with and research on animals
text: The worse experiments consist of operations on animals, among other Beagles

title: Experimenting with and research on animals
text: Before an experimental operation is started the dog is put to sleep and it is never woken again afterwards

title: Experimenting with and research on animals
text: Even if the dog would survive the operation the suffering during the recovery is deemed to high

title: Experimenting with and research on animals
text: The reason for the operations are the training of the veterinarian students and is essential in their education

title: Experimenting with and research on animals
text: The student I talked to has done one operation on a Beagle once, they where eight students operating on one dog and they trained every possible type of operations including those that could be acutely lifesaving, so there are no unnecessary operations done

title: Experimenting with and research on animals
text: The Beagles at least have a nice life in a kennel where they may go outside each day and have people to care for them

title: Experimenting with and research on animals
text: The veterinary students have met them on some occasions and think that the dogs appear very nice, lively and happy

title: Experimenting with and research on animals
text: Nowadays she believed they use only pigs but she is not certain

title: Experimenting with and research on animals
text: I am slightly more ambivalent to this kind of experiments but how could they train otherwise? The animals are at least not suffering in any way

title: Experimenting with and research on animals
text: It is maybe their dignity or ours, that we use other live beings, that is threatened

title: Experimenting with and research on animals
text: On the other hand we breed animals for food and we eat more meat than is necessary for us to survive, just for the taste of it, that must be as bad or slightly worse

title: Experimenting with and research on animals
text: As long as we have animals as pets and as food I believe we may as well use them for research and experiments that are essential

title: Experimenting with and research on animals
text: Who can say that a rabbit suffers more in a cage in a laboratory than in a cage the same size in a seven year olds home

title: Experimenting with and research on animals
text: On the other hand as long as the laboratory cannot take care of and give an animal a nice life they should not research on it, monkeys for example that need greater living space and stimulation

title: Experimenting with and research on animals
text: But in that case the discussion leads into zoological gardens where animals are kept, and sometimes suffering, only for our amusement

title: Experimenting with and research on animals
text: Here I really would like to continue the discussion on to bumblebees, the freezer in the corridor has occasionally harboured some, but I have already written too many words

title: Experimenting with and research on animals
IRC vs. IRL?
text: In this essay I will prove that IRC, (Internet Relay Chat) really could improve your social life, that would be social life as in RL, (Real Life)

title: IRC vs. IRL?
text: Many people believe that IRC just take up your time without giving anything back

title: IRC vs. IRL?
text: I claim that they are wrong

title: IRC vs. IRL?
text: Soon you will se why

title: IRC vs. IRL?
text: One argument I quite often get to hear, is that I spend too much time in front of my computers

title: IRC vs. IRL?
text: Especially as I earlier used to meet my friends very often in my spare-time

title: IRC vs. IRL?
text: However, I claim that I still spend very much time with my friends, even more than before

title: IRC vs. IRL?
text: This because I still meet my old friends irl plus that I speak to new and old friends via the irc

title: IRC vs. IRL?
text: So, what are the advantages with irc compared to irl then? On irc, you can get new contacts/friends that you would not meet if you did not take part of irc, friends with the same interests as you, for example computers

title: IRC vs. IRL?
text: You get to know them well before you actually meet them irl, which means that you always have something to talk about from the very beginning

title: IRC vs. IRL?
text: By these friends, you can get help with computer related questions, homework etc

title: IRC vs. IRL?
text: They can help you in your daily work, without even having to move away from home

title: IRC vs. IRL?
text: Another thing that I see as a big plus, should be that you can talk to people about serious things without saying something wrong, this because you have got more time to think about your answers on irc than irl

title: IRC vs. IRL?
text: Besides that, you can do several things at the same time when chatting on the net by the same reason as above, you have got more time to think about your answers, it's OK to answer a question after a couple of minutes instead of as irl directly

title: IRC vs. IRL?
text: Another great thing about irc, is that you always have someone to talk to, there is always someone awake, ready to listen to your thoughts and so on

title: IRC vs. IRL?
text: One major thing that probably passes people that are not interested in this kind of "relations" by, is the fact that you develop a new kind of humour

title: IRC vs. IRL?
text: A humour that often can be used only on irc, but sometimes also irl

title: IRC vs. IRL?
text: All these facts I've brought up, says that irc develop your rl

title: IRC vs. IRL?
text: Still, that is not the only truth

title: IRC vs. IRL?
text: I know a few people that without irc would not have any social live at all

title: IRC vs. IRL?
text: They believe that irc in fact is rl, those who don't know them that good, believe that irc has had got a bad influence on them, and that they would be more socialised if they did not spend that much time in front of their computers, I say they don't

title: IRC vs. IRL?
text: By this way they at least get contact with people in one way, otherwise they had probably been watching TV instead

title: IRC vs. IRL?
text: So, are there no negative aspects with irc the? Of course there are

title: IRC vs. IRL?
text: It is easy to get stuck in front of the computer and instead of going to your friends you stay and talk to them on the computer as you don't have to move yourself that way

title: IRC vs. IRL?
text: If the case is so, you will have a decrease in your social life I would say

title: IRC vs. IRL?
text: Still this haven't happen to anyone I know, usually one doesn't stop meeting your rl-friends because you start chatting the net

title: IRC vs. IRL?
text: In the conclusion I will tell you about a problem that can occur when your chatting on the net

title: IRC vs. IRL?
text: However I don't know if the problem could be said to emerge because of irc

title: IRC vs. IRL?
text: When friends irl visits you and your' chatting to other friends on the net, the irl-friends often wants you to stop talking to your so called "invisible friends", they mean that "there are no one in front of you, which means that you aren't talking to anyone"

title: IRC vs. IRL?
text: This is rather annoying as I believe that your talking to irc-friends are as much important as talking to people irl

title: IRC vs. IRL?
text: This is why I put the question mark after the topic, it shouldn't be irl vs

title: IRC vs. IRL?
text: irc - they can go together if people understand that both can improve your social life

title: IRC vs. IRL?
Yes to no smoking
text: I got this assignment to argue for or against something

title: Yes to no smoking
text: At first I had no idea of what to write about but then I realized that there is one thing I really have an opinion about; smoking

title: Yes to no smoking
text: Is smoking healthy? No

title: Yes to no smoking
text: Does it smell good? No

title: Yes to no smoking
text: Is it cool? No! Is it expensive? Yes, and it's a disgusting habit

title: Yes to no smoking
text: All of you who want to die earlier than life has planned, here is some advice

title: Yes to no smoking
text: Start smoking

title: Yes to no smoking
text: It's really effective, since you get a lot of poisonous material in your lungs

title: Yes to no smoking
text: After a while your body breaks down from all the poison and maybe you'll get difficulties to breathe

title: Yes to no smoking
text: Before it gets that far, your voice starts to sound strange

title: Yes to no smoking
text: It's like you have a filter in your throat that takes away all the sharp and clear sounds; you start talking like a frog

title: Yes to no smoking
text: Your face is getting wrinkled and it's like the skin is hanging loose

title: Yes to no smoking
text: Sounds great, doesn't it? The smell, then, is really disgusting

Stay away from our genes!
text: Should people manipulate on genes or not? Some people might say that we need to explore our limits, and therefore investigate how good or bad we can get an animal or crops if we manipulate them

title: Stay away from our genes!
text: I say, let nature do the work for us! When talking about gene manipulation, the biggest issue has always been the ethical one

title: Stay away from our genes!
text: Is it ethical to manipulate on genes in animal or in plants

title: Stay away from our genes!
text: It might appear to be more ethical to manipulate with plants than on animals because animals are living creatures

title: Stay away from our genes!
text: I am of the opinion that it is just as unethical to mess with genes in plants that it is in animals

title: Stay away from our genes!
text: Nature has "taken care of" the progress of making plants and animals better and to adapt to its surroundings for millions of years

title: Stay away from our genes!
text: Nature has made us what we are today

title: Stay away from our genes!
text: I can't see any reason why we shouldn't let it continue to do so

title: Stay away from our genes!
text: There is also a religious issue

title: Stay away from our genes!
text: Many people believe that God created everything

title: Stay away from our genes!
text: God or the evolution will make all the necessary changes for animals and human beings to survive

title: Stay away from our genes!
text: God didn't intend for us to inplant new "stuff" into things to make them better

title: Stay away from our genes!
text: If anything needs improvement, God will see to it

title: Stay away from our genes!
text: The dangers that I see in gene manipulation are many

title: Stay away from our genes!
text: For instance, if scientists try to create a new or a better type of vegetable, there is a possibility that the new plant turns into weeds or something else that was not expected

title: Stay away from our genes!
text: If it turns into weeds, the work and costs of weed control will increase for farmers and the use of chemicals to fight it will also increase, which could damage the environment

title: Stay away from our genes!
text: However, if the tests are a success, crops can be larger and grow much faster than before

title: Stay away from our genes!
text: But even if they do so the first couple of years, there is still nothing that says that they will continue to grow big forever

title: Stay away from our genes!
text: A vegetable can be resistance towards one sort of virus that is crucial for its survival in a specific environment

title: Stay away from our genes!
text: When manipulated with, it can lose its resistance towards the virus and therefore be extinct

title: Stay away from our genes!
text: The survival of the fittest theory is put out of play

title: Stay away from our genes!
text: One can compare this with the Australian farmers who imported frogs

title: Stay away from our genes!
text: The farmers had problems with insects who destroyed their crops

title: Stay away from our genes!
text: The frogs were supposed to eat the insects, but the frog propagated so much that it started to eat the crops as well to survive

title: Stay away from our genes!
text: In the end, the frog itself caused more trouble than it prevented

title: Stay away from our genes!
text: If a new, better, vegetable or cereal develops, what's going to be the reaction of those who consume it, animals and human beings? There is a possibility that we may get sick when we eat gene manipulated food, or even worse, our own genes can be rearranged

title: Stay away from our genes!
text: No one knows

title: Stay away from our genes!
text: Substances that might cause cancer might develop from the new creations

title: Stay away from our genes!
text: The substances might not be visible in the beginning, they might show after a few months or a few years

title: Stay away from our genes!
text: We can never be sure that a product which is not created by evolution is safe

title: Stay away from our genes!
text: In the future, if we continue to manipulate on genes, we might find ourselves in the situation that you can take out patent for genes

title: Stay away from our genes!
text: If that happens, the big companies which have interests in big or better crops, will get too much power

title: Stay away from our genes!
text: Money will control

title: Stay away from our genes!
text: If you have a lot of money, you can basically decide what plant you want to create without thinking of the consequences

title: Stay away from our genes!
text: The companies can use their money in a way that insures them to make more money

title: Stay away from our genes!
text: The benefits will not reach the poor people who really need it

title: Stay away from our genes!
text: The people who thinks that gene manipulation is good, argue that we can get medicine or create vaccine for diseases

title: Stay away from our genes!
text: But then again, I think that the money would control

title: Stay away from our genes!
text: Only the rich could afford these medicines

title: Stay away from our genes!
text: In that way, the money decides weather or not we should be able stay healthy

title: Stay away from our genes!
text: To mess with genes are none of our business

title: Stay away from our genes!
text: Evolution has made both people and nature what they are today

title: Stay away from our genes!
text: If we let it continue to do so, I think that the world would become a better place to live in

title: Stay away from our genes!

title: Mass Media and Privacy
text: The invasion of privacy by the media is always a hot topic

title: Mass Media and Privacy
text: The self-appointed victims on one side - often very famous people - and on the other side the media, who claim the freedom of speech

title: Mass Media and Privacy
text: But when has this freedom gone too far? Do we really have to know every private detail of the world of the famous? The goal is of course to strike a balance between the individual's right to privacy and the public interest in freedom of the press

title: Mass Media and Privacy
text: In this essay I will look at the reporters' checklist when it comes to matters concerning privacy, and also when we feel that they have crossed the line just to get a good story in order to sell a few more copies of a certain tabloid

title: Mass Media and Privacy
text: Let's discuss this matter further on

title: Mass Media and Privacy
text: The media should of course have the right to publish any lawfully obtained truthful information

title: Mass Media and Privacy
text: Looking at the sales figures of gossip magazines, we find that a majority of people like to read them, and will pay for such information - by for instance buying a magazine

title: Mass Media and Privacy
text: When publishing companies saw the demand for tabloids from the public, a lot of new gossip magazines were started, and by that of course also a big rivalry between them

title: Mass Media and Privacy
text: In this rivalry it is natural to come up with the flashiest head-lines that attract the interest of the people in order to make them buy just that magazine

title: Mass Media and Privacy
text: And here you will find the problems to this invasion of privacy concerning mostly famous people

title: Mass Media and Privacy
text: Editors want to get their hands on something about someone in the spotlight that no one else has - and if that means painting them in less favourable light, then so be it

title: Mass Media and Privacy
text: A certain invasion of privacy can be called the "false light"

title: Mass Media and Privacy
text: This is what happens when information is published about a public person and causes him/her a wrong reputation

title: Mass Media and Privacy
text: This often happens with politicians

title: Mass Media and Privacy
text: Public figures have a limited right of privacy because they have in a way put themselves in that position of being exposed to scrutiny

title: Mass Media and Privacy
text: The media should however be restricted from publishing information which intrudes upon the privacy of individuals

title: Mass Media and Privacy
text: The reporter should check all the material, and see that no false material is added, and that the arrangements of materials don't give a false impression

title: Mass Media and Privacy
text: But as soon as you put yourself in the spotlight your claims of a right of privacy are limited

title: Mass Media and Privacy
text: Public figures have already taken a stand against this situation by suing the press more and more

title: Mass Media and Privacy
text: Of course, this is something that could be changed if the level of morals in the media raised

title: Mass Media and Privacy
text: Intrusion claims that result in suing the media often concern the newsgathering process that is to say the wrongful use of tape recorders, cameras and other equipment used for this purpose

title: Mass Media and Privacy
text: The method of obtaining information is something that the reporter has to take in consideration

title: Mass Media and Privacy
text: If we are to give an example of this, one thing that comes to a lot of people's minds is of course the late Diana, Princess of Wales - described by the Earl Spencer as "the most hunted person of the modern age"

title: Mass Media and Privacy
text: Her death is said by a lot of people to be the media's fault - or especially the paparazzi', who hunted her the last days of her life

title: Mass Media and Privacy
text: But they would of course not exist if there was not a public demand for this type of pictures; this is what sells

title: Mass Media and Privacy
text: The case concerning Diana's death is now closed, and the paparazzi are left without charges

title: Mass Media and Privacy
text: But an event like this must result in a law that will prevent such intrusions

title: Mass Media and Privacy
text: On the other hand, it must be said that Princess Diana herself, after her divorce from Prince Charles, deliberately worked to get the press on her side

title: Mass Media and Privacy
text: And it was told that her manipulating of the media was widely recognised

title: Mass Media and Privacy
text: But as she said herself, she resented the intrusions by the paparazzi, but she got on very well with the tabloid staff photographers

title: Mass Media and Privacy
text: A photograph, as well as interview materials, which have a written release may be used

title: Mass Media and Privacy
text: Therefore it is of course essential that a reporter gets such a release

title: Mass Media and Privacy
text: There can be no invasion of privacy if a person consents, as long as the person is not a minor or in any other way not able to give consent

title: Mass Media and Privacy
text: A release is of course something you have to get in the world of advertising

title: Mass Media and Privacy
text: To get a public figure to do a commercial for your product may in most cases rise the sales figures of it

title: Mass Media and Privacy
text: But to use a famous person's name or likeness without consent to sell a product is usually an invasion of privacy

title: Mass Media and Privacy
text: But at the risk of being sued, this it not common these days

title: Mass Media and Privacy
text: So what overall conclusion can we draw from this? Well, we can all agree that there has to be a freedom of speech in the media, but only to a certain extent

title: Mass Media and Privacy
text: When it is obvious that it is an intrusion of privacy, this must be taken seriously

title: Mass Media and Privacy
text: The standards of the laws that concern this must be kept at a high level

title: Mass Media and Privacy
text: We can clearly see that the individual's right to privacy and the right of freedom of speech often clash

title: Mass Media and Privacy
text: Everyone, famous or not, must feel that they have some privacy

title: Mass Media and Privacy
text: The individual's right of privacy must be considered before the public interest

title: Mass Media and Privacy

Euthanasia - a legal way out?
text: Some consider euthanasia, help to die, as an immoral act, as murdering another human being

title: Euthanasia - a legal way out?
text: I think that it is far more immoral and inhuman to force a person to suffer in pain from an incurable disease

title: Euthanasia - a legal way out?
text: But should a doctor have the right to end the life of a patient? I think so

title: Euthanasia - a legal way out?
text: Let us first have a brief look at the present situation in Europe

title: Euthanasia - a legal way out?
text: Is euthanasia considered illegal? The legislation varies from place to place, and you should be aware of the fact that there are two kinds of euthanasia: passive and active euthanasia

title: Euthanasia - a legal way out?
text: Passive euthanasia means avoiding life-supporting treatment for a very ill and dying patient

title: Euthanasia - a legal way out?
text: The relatives confer with the doctor and come to the conclusion that the diseased state will not improve and further treatment is avoided

title: Euthanasia - a legal way out?
text: This action is considered legal in Sweden

title: Euthanasia - a legal way out?
text: In the Åland Islands, for example, people are able to sign an agreement, where they state that they do not want continued treatment in case they would have a severe accident where they would become vegetables for the rest of their lives

title: Euthanasia - a legal way out?
text: They then receive a card, which should always be with them, which shows their choice

title: Euthanasia - a legal way out?
text: Active euthanasia is to give a very ill, suffering and dying patient a treatment which shortens his / her life

title: Euthanasia - a legal way out?
text: This action is forbidden in Sweden; classified as murder, but in the Netherlands, for example, this is a legally accepted action

title: Euthanasia - a legal way out?
text: The most common ways of shortening the life of a patient are by unplugging a life-saving machine or by giving an overdose of morphine

title: Euthanasia - a legal way out?
text: The decision is made unanimously by the patient, the relatives and the doctors

title: Euthanasia - a legal way out?
text: One of the big questions is of course if euthanasia is compatible with the Hippocratic oath

title: Euthanasia - a legal way out?
text: Should not doctors save lives, not shorten them? That is, in my opinion, not a very difficult question to answer

title: Euthanasia - a legal way out?
text: You should ask yourself what you prefer; living a life without human dignity in pain, without any chance of ever recovering, or dying a painless death in dignity

title: Euthanasia - a legal way out?
text: For me, the choice is simple

title: Euthanasia - a legal way out?
text: I would never want to force my relatives to live with the burden of me, living a life not worth living

title: Euthanasia - a legal way out?
text: There are, however, many other questions left to answer, questions which are not all that simple to answer

title: Euthanasia - a legal way out?
text: Who should make the final decision; the patient or the doctor? In many cases, patients just want to die, not because of the fact that their illness is incurable, but because they simply do not want to cause their relatives trouble with expensive hospital-cost

title: Euthanasia - a legal way out?
text: They might also see themselves as psychical burdens for their families

title: Euthanasia - a legal way out?
text: My opinion is, that the final decision should be made by the patients themselves - but if there are any doubts of the underlying reason for their wish to die, psychiatric specialists should be contacted before any irreversible actions take place

title: Euthanasia - a legal way out?
text: There should never be any doubt of whether the decision is genuinely that of the patient or not

title: Euthanasia - a legal way out?
text: But what if the patient is unconscious, suffers from a severe brain damage? Can his / her relatives then make the decision for him / her? I believe that there is a great risk that euthanasia might be misused, if relatives start making the decisions for the patients

title: Euthanasia - a legal way out?
text: Greedy relatives, yearning for the estate or money of the patient, might choose the easiest way out, by putting their relative to eternal sleep

title: Euthanasia - a legal way out?
text: There are of course also those, who honestly try to follow the wish of the patient by ending his / her sufferings

title: Euthanasia - a legal way out?
text: But who should make the final decision? Can all the responsibility really be placed in the hands of the doctors? Or should every single case go to court, as the procedure is in the Netherlands, in order to follow the law to the point? There are, unfortunately, no good answers to those questions

title: Euthanasia - a legal way out?
text: I see euthanasia as help to suicide

title: Euthanasia - a legal way out?
text: Suicide is, at least according to Swedish law, a legal action

title: Euthanasia - a legal way out?
text: Therefore, I see nothing illegal at all in euthanasia, as long as it follows the wish of the patient

title: Euthanasia - a legal way out?
text: According to my opinion it will be very difficult to make a law that satisfies everybody

title: Euthanasia - a legal way out?
text: Personally, I think that everybody should have to sign an agreement, such as the voluntary one of the Åland Islands

title: Euthanasia - a legal way out?
text: Then there would be no doubt whether the wish of the patient would be followed or not

title: Euthanasia - a legal way out?
text: Euthanasia is quite a controversial subject and almost everyone has an opinion

title: Euthanasia - a legal way out?
text: In my opinion euthanasia should be a legal alternative to unnecessary suffering

title: Euthanasia - a legal way out?
The winner of the battle between glasses and contact lenses: glasses.
text: This assignment was to write an argumentative essay, and I did not know what to write about

title: The winner of the battle between glasses and contact lenses: glasses.
text: After thinking long and hard I decided to write about the different aspects of glasses and contact lenses

title: The winner of the battle between glasses and contact lenses: glasses.
text: I do not wear either one myself, but by looking at the aspects for and against both of them, I will show you why I think glasses are a much better choice than contact lenses

title: The winner of the battle between glasses and contact lenses: glasses.
text: First of all I want to write about the actual purpose with glasses or contact lenses

title: The winner of the battle between glasses and contact lenses: glasses.
text: That is to be able to use your eyes without overstraining them and to see without problems

title: The winner of the battle between glasses and contact lenses: glasses.
text: If you only have a minor problem with your eyes and only need glasses for reading, then you do not have a choice but to wear glasses

title: The winner of the battle between glasses and contact lenses: glasses.
text: You cannot take the lenses out as soon as you do not read anymore, especially if you are in school attending a lecture where you first look at the blackboard and then in your books or writing-pad and back again

title: The winner of the battle between glasses and contact lenses: glasses.
text: Neither can you have progressive contact lenses, only glasses

title: The winner of the battle between glasses and contact lenses: glasses.
text: There are many kinds of cuts that you can have with glasses but not lenses, so therefor contact lenses are only for a limited clientele - the ones with the "correct defects"

title: The winner of the battle between glasses and contact lenses: glasses.
text: I will continue by describing the troubles you can come upon with both glasses and contact lenses

title: The winner of the battle between glasses and contact lenses: glasses.
text: Glasses can be in the way for example if you work out or if it is raining outside

title: The winner of the battle between glasses and contact lenses: glasses.
text: But when you wear lenses you increase the danger of getting dry or red eyes, an eye disease or any other similar problem

title: The winner of the battle between glasses and contact lenses: glasses.
text: It is unnatural to poke around in your eyes and glasses will help you to get around that problem

title: The winner of the battle between glasses and contact lenses: glasses.
text: You can also wear glasses for much longer at a time without risking sore or dry eyes

title: The winner of the battle between glasses and contact lenses: glasses.
text: Some people may say that glasses are more breakable, which is true, however, contact lenses are much more vulnerable

title: The winner of the battle between glasses and contact lenses: glasses.
text: They are small, practically invisible and soft

title: The winner of the battle between glasses and contact lenses: glasses.
text: It is easy to lose a lens if you are careless enough to drop it, or to get a scratch which makes the lens useless

title: The winner of the battle between glasses and contact lenses: glasses.
text: When it comes to the costs you have one sum to pay for glasses but you have to get new lenses quite often and you also have the lens fluid to buy

title: The winner of the battle between glasses and contact lenses: glasses.
text: Of course the cost depends on where you buy them and also if you happen to get unexpected costs by broken glasses or lenses

title: The winner of the battle between glasses and contact lenses: glasses.
text: If your eyes suddenly get worse it might be easier to change contact lenses, but it is doubtful that the eyes would change so suddenly

title: The winner of the battle between glasses and contact lenses: glasses.
text: Last but not least I want to bring up the fashion

title: The winner of the battle between glasses and contact lenses: glasses.
text: Both glasses and contacts have been an important accessory to today's fashion

title: The winner of the battle between glasses and contact lenses: glasses.
text: You can change the color of your lenses, or even to get the Swedish flag in your eyes and you have thousands of spectacle frames to choose from

title: The winner of the battle between glasses and contact lenses: glasses.
text: One might say that if you invest quite a lot of money in a pair of glasses you can only wear them as long as the fashion stays the same

title: The winner of the battle between glasses and contact lenses: glasses.
text: I do not agree

title: The winner of the battle between glasses and contact lenses: glasses.
text: You do not have to have the latest to be in style

title: The winner of the battle between glasses and contact lenses: glasses.
text: You can use the same kind of glasses as your grandmother if you like and still be in fashion

title: The winner of the battle between glasses and contact lenses: glasses.
text: Fashion is a state of mind and no one can tell you what to wear or not

title: The winner of the battle between glasses and contact lenses: glasses.
text: Some people buy the latest from the optician's and change spectacle frames more often than others do

title: The winner of the battle between glasses and contact lenses: glasses.
text: To them that is nothing more than a change in their outfit

title: The winner of the battle between glasses and contact lenses: glasses.
text: I think it is fun to wear colored contact lenses - once or twice, but not every day

title: The winner of the battle between glasses and contact lenses: glasses.

title: The winner of the battle between glasses and contact lenses: glasses.
text: But to see people with different kinds of glasses makes me happy

Stop the use of genetic engineering.
text: Genetic engineering is when a gene is transformed from one species to another, to improve or to give it a new or a better quality

title: Stop the use of genetic engineering.
text: There are advantages and disadvantages with this technique but as long as we don't know the exact consequences, I think that we shouldn't use it at all

title: Stop the use of genetic engineering.
text: For example, this technique makes it possible for maize to produce its own insecticide and tomatoes can be more aromatic if we slow down the growing process

title: Stop the use of genetic engineering.
text: Well, this seems to be advantages but there are a couple of questions, for instance, how would the genetic engineering impact the surrounding environment? What happens with the biodiversity? What does it mean for allergic persons and what if the technique is used on humans? The final question that will be dealt with in this essay are the socio-economical results of the Green Revolution

title: Stop the use of genetic engineering.
text: Could gene modified plants impact the surrounding environment? Well, one risk is that the modified plant could become a weeds and therefore a problem both in and outside the cultivated area

title: Stop the use of genetic engineering.
text: Another risk is that the new quality, in the modified plant, could affect other plants and the result could lead to unwanted effects on the ecosystem

title: Stop the use of genetic engineering.
text: The insect-resident maize could for example lead to distinction of an insect species in an area

title: Stop the use of genetic engineering.
text: Consequently, this could be devastating for the animals that depend on this special insect

title: Stop the use of genetic engineering.
text: Furthermore, the ecological risks with gene modified plants can be difficult to predict because it could take years before the effects shows

title: Stop the use of genetic engineering.
text: Genetic engineering threatens the biodiversity

title: Stop the use of genetic engineering.
text: Biodiversity means the variety within and between species and ecosystems

title: Stop the use of genetic engineering.
text: Modified plants are usually cultivated in many places around the world, and therefore replace many natural plants

title: Stop the use of genetic engineering.
text: This would lead to a loss of genetic resources

title: Stop the use of genetic engineering.
text: We should be extra careful since the ruthless deforestation in the tropics has resulted in distinction of many species

title: Stop the use of genetic engineering.
text: There are a lot of species in the tropics today that we don't even know about

title: Stop the use of genetic engineering.
text: Therefore, will the genetic resources hidden in the tropics, be even more valuable when the use of genetic engineering increases

title: Stop the use of genetic engineering.
text: When a commodity is genetically modified, how could the consumers know if it isn't allergenic

title: Stop the use of genetic engineering.
text: Furthermore, what would this mean for persons who are allergic already

title: Stop the use of genetic engineering.
text: We won't know until they've tried

title: Stop the use of genetic engineering.
text: What would happen with our world if we started to use this technique on humans, if we started to change the gene pools of humans? Technically this is possible today

title: Stop the use of genetic engineering.
text: In other words it would be possible to take away a gene and replace it with another

title: Stop the use of genetic engineering.
text: If this would be done by wrong people the results could be devastating

title: Stop the use of genetic engineering.
text: What would have happened if Hitler had had the opportunity to use this technique, would he have made humans with blond hair and blue eyes? However, to manipulate the human gene pool would be to restrict the biodiversity even more

title: Stop the use of genetic engineering.
text: Today there are some visible impacts due to genetic engineering

title: Stop the use of genetic engineering.
text: The Green Revolution, which started back in the 1970s, was an attempt to increase the harvests in third world countries

title: Stop the use of genetic engineering.
text: With help from genetic engineering it was possible to increase the harvests of rise and wheat, but the new crops wasn't for free

title: Stop the use of genetic engineering.
text: It was only the rich farmers in the third world that could afford to buy them and consequently they sold the outcome on the world market, because the people in the third world couldn't afford it

title: Stop the use of genetic engineering.
text: What started as a good intention led to more starvation for the already starving people

title: Stop the use of genetic engineering.
text: This is an important socio-economical consequence which shouldn't be forgotten about when we try to increase the world production of food with help from genetic engineering

title: Stop the use of genetic engineering.
text: Conclusion Although there are some advantages with genetic engineering, like insect resident maize and tomatoes with more aroma, the disadvantages are in the majority in my opinion

title: Stop the use of genetic engineering.
text: I don't think that it is worth risking the biodiversity or that a modified plant spreads to other ecosystems, just to have better tasting tomatoes

title: Stop the use of genetic engineering.
text: Above all I wouldn't risk that the technique gets into wrong hands and we get humans whose gene pool is manipulated after a special pattern

title: Stop the use of genetic engineering.
text: So, as long as we don't know the exact consequences I think that we should be extremely cautious and don't use the technique at all

title: Stop the use of genetic engineering.
IMPRISONED MOTHERS: A THREAT TO SOCIETY!/?
text: I was deeply moved when I a while ago watched a documentary on Swedish television about women with a life sentence who had children at home

title: IMPRISONED MOTHERS: A THREAT TO SOCIETY!/?
text: Having witnessed this trauma, I now realize that I and everybody else in the Swedish society have a responsibility to work for changes of this very specific part of the Swedish legal system

title: IMPRISONED MOTHERS: A THREAT TO SOCIETY!/?
text: I am not arguing whether it is generally right or wrong to keep men and women in prison

title: IMPRISONED MOTHERS: A THREAT TO SOCIETY!/?
text: I feel that imprisoned mothers present a very special case that needs discussion because it is, as I see it, violating the human (read: children 's) rights to a certain extent

title: IMPRISONED MOTHERS: A THREAT TO SOCIETY!/?
text: Excluding extreme cases, every child should have a right to be with its mother

title: IMPRISONED MOTHERS: A THREAT TO SOCIETY!/?
text: You might argue that women in prison are extreme cases, however one of my points is that there are different ways of looking at this

title: IMPRISONED MOTHERS: A THREAT TO SOCIETY!/?
text: Unless the mother abuses drugs or alcohol or the child, a child is never better off without its mother

title: IMPRISONED MOTHERS: A THREAT TO SOCIETY!/?
text: In actual fact, separating mother and child can be devastating since the child will not be able to understand why the mother cannot be there

title: IMPRISONED MOTHERS: A THREAT TO SOCIETY!/?
text: To look at one specific case, there was one mother in the documentary mentioned above, who had started serving off a life sentence for allegedly having killed her husband, something which she had however denied in court

title: IMPRISONED MOTHERS: A THREAT TO SOCIETY!/?
text: The lack of this woman 's presence at home was next to unbearable for her young daughter

title: IMPRISONED MOTHERS: A THREAT TO SOCIETY!/?
text: After some time the mother received the results from an investigation made about her, that was going to decide whether she was dangerous to society or not, and consequently whether she should be granted leave every once in a while

title: IMPRISONED MOTHERS: A THREAT TO SOCIETY!/?
text: The result proved itself to be for her benefit, why in my opinion there should be no reason for her having to stay in prison at all, considering the fact of there being a child in the family

title: IMPRISONED MOTHERS: A THREAT TO SOCIETY!/?
text: For one we do not know for sure that she committed the crime she is serving time for (which is even beside the point in this matter)

title: IMPRISONED MOTHERS: A THREAT TO SOCIETY!/?
text: Secondly, reaching the conclusion that somebody is no danger to other people, should not depend on a timeframe - not dangerous when on leave but certainly if she would be totally freed

title: IMPRISONED MOTHERS: A THREAT TO SOCIETY!/?
text: That must be their logic though

title: IMPRISONED MOTHERS: A THREAT TO SOCIETY!/?
text: Surely the time spent behind bars is supposed to be seen as some kind of punishment, though is not the point with prisons in to rehabilitate their inmates, not to cause them emotional damage? When it comes to imprisoned mothers it is their children who suffer the biggest punishment, which is why keeping these women in prison is a way of damaging the next generation and thus creating future problems in society

title: IMPRISONED MOTHERS: A THREAT TO SOCIETY!/?
text: Discussing an inmate 's possibility of being dangerous and come to be of the opinion that he/ she is not, does of course not always mean that this can be looked upon as a pure fact

title: IMPRISONED MOTHERS: A THREAT TO SOCIETY!/?
text: Therefore it could be argued that my demands of freeing certain women in prison are unrealistic

title: IMPRISONED MOTHERS: A THREAT TO SOCIETY!/?
text: However, in this particular case (imprisoned mothers) it could be worth it, giving these people the benefit of the doubt, not by completely slackening the reins, but by compromising

title: IMPRISONED MOTHERS: A THREAT TO SOCIETY!/?
text: One suggestion would be letting the mothers live at home but having a prison guard checking up on them as often as is felt needed in each particular case

title: IMPRISONED MOTHERS: A THREAT TO SOCIETY!/?
text: This should not be an economical impossibility either, since it is quite expensive, having people in prison

title: IMPRISONED MOTHERS: A THREAT TO SOCIETY!/?
text: Another arrangement would be for the convicted to wear an electronic foot shackle for a certain amount of time and meanwhile be living at home

title: IMPRISONED MOTHERS: A THREAT TO SOCIETY!/?
text: This is in fact an effective way of seeing to it that the person in question does not cause trouble

title: IMPRISONED MOTHERS: A THREAT TO SOCIETY!/?
text: It is so easy to generalize when it comes to prisoners and state that they are all bad and should stay behind bars as long as possible, without looking at the possible "side effects" of their imprisoning

title: IMPRISONED MOTHERS: A THREAT TO SOCIETY!/?
text: I have taken my personal stand when it comes to mothers in prison as a particular group because society could have more to lose than to gain by keeping these women as inmates

title: IMPRISONED MOTHERS: A THREAT TO SOCIETY!/?
text: Their important role as mothers to their children, on a physical as well as an emotional level must not be ignored no matter what

title: IMPRISONED MOTHERS: A THREAT TO SOCIETY!/?
text: Let us compromise and find the better alternatives to a stay in prison

title: IMPRISONED MOTHERS: A THREAT TO SOCIETY!/?
text: In the end it is what is best for the children that matters

title: IMPRISONED MOTHERS: A THREAT TO SOCIETY!/?
text: We always say that the children are our future, that is: all children, and if we still believe this, here is a reason to raise our voices for them!

title: Life on other planets:fiction or fact?
text: The universe is, as far as we know, endless and for ages people have gazed up at the stars and wondered - "Are we alone?"

title: Life on other planets:fiction or fact?
text: Many would say that we are, that life on other planets is just fiction, but I'm convinced that we are not alone and that life on other planets is a fact

title: Life on other planets:fiction or fact?
text: There are billions of galaxies in the universe and every galaxy has billions of stars

title: Life on other planets:fiction or fact?
text: If just a fraction of those stars hosted planets and a fraction of those planets were inhabited, it would mean that there are millions of civilizations out there

text: These planets may not be as equally developed as earth

text: Many of them may in fact just have started producing life in form of small organisms or bacteria

text: Others may have reached the Jurassic period, or they may even be more technologically advanced than us
