text: The fundamental idea behind these about 75 colleges was to improve standard of living in the rural areas by educating its population

title: Countenance of School Fee Vindicable?
text: The education provided at the colleges was designed for adults and free of charge which made it possible for the common man or woman to attend courses despite scarce means

title: Countenance of School Fee Vindicable?
text: Not only subjects as reading, writing, math, English and other traditional were taught, but also useful knowledge as simple constructions of houses, needlework, and cattle keeping

title: Countenance of School Fee Vindicable?
text: In the 1990's the Ministry of Education in Tanzania withdrew all endowments to the FDC: s

title: Countenance of School Fee Vindicable?
text: The government decided to provide capital only for salaries and wages for teachers and staff at FDC: s

title: Countenance of School Fee Vindicable?
text: To be able to continue running courses, inauguration of school fee was required at each college

title: Countenance of School Fee Vindicable?
text: The school fee of 25 000 Tanzanian Shilling, is equivalent to 250 Swedish Crowns

title: Countenance of School Fee Vindicable?
text: To a Swede this is a rather small amount of money whereas it is actually more than three months salaries of a petty farmer in this destitute country

title: Countenance of School Fee Vindicable?
text: The issue in need to be discussed is: should the introduction of school fee at FDC: s in Tanzania be countenanced? The main argument against the school fee is that it prevents people from attending courses that actually were created for them

title: Countenance of School Fee Vindicable?
text: The illiterate population thatnreally is in need of education consists of indigent people with no means, in other words they are not able to pay the amount of money required for the education

title: Countenance of School Fee Vindicable?
text: Therefore the school fee erase the last possible chance for these people to get what they really need most of all: education

title: Countenance of School Fee Vindicable?
text: My personal stand is that the introduction of school fee has in deed made it impossible for many people to study, but more important, it has in fact resulted in benefits for the target group mentioned above

title: Countenance of School Fee Vindicable?
text: Even though that was not the intention of the government, the quality of the education at FDC: s has actually improved

title: Countenance of School Fee Vindicable?
text: As a result of paying school fee, participants in the courses are today in a position to insist upon quality in their education, which was entirely unthinkable prior to the capital-withdrawal

title: Countenance of School Fee Vindicable?
text: The fact of the matter is that participants today are also having a much broader education than their precursors

title: Countenance of School Fee Vindicable?
text: School fee has indirectly created a stiff competition between the FDC: s that have managed to uphold their activities, and ingenuity is now necessary at the local education authorities

title: Countenance of School Fee Vindicable?
text: Courses need to be attractive and out of the ordinary in order to entice people to attend

title: Countenance of School Fee Vindicable?
text: An other argument in favour for the school fee is that it has actually encouraged the participants to demand more of their studies than solely traditional subjects like math, English and social studies

title: Countenance of School Fee Vindicable?
text: Current time more liberal and modern subjects are wanted such as politics, mechanics, electricity and nutrition

title: Countenance of School Fee Vindicable?
text: By requiring school fee, FDC: s in Tanzania have managed to obtain a certain cachet

title: Countenance of School Fee Vindicable?
text: They are now comparable to any other pedagogic institute and that appeals to both potential participants and teachers

title: Countenance of School Fee Vindicable?
text: Former students at FDC: s are proud of the kind of education they have managed to get and their community also regards them as successful citizens

title: Countenance of School Fee Vindicable?
text: I am entirely convinced that the introduction of school fee at FDC: s in Tanzania should be countenanced, as no argument is strong enough to overturn the actual benefits of the new income system

title: Countenance of School Fee Vindicable?
text: The education provided at the FDC: s today has improved in quality and variety as a result of participants gaining more influence on the courses

title: Countenance of School Fee Vindicable?
text: The achievement of co-determination is intimately related to the required school fee at the FDC: s and as well a consequence to the government decision to withdraw all endowments

title: Countenance of School Fee Vindicable?
Anna Lindh - out on a limb A member of parliament trying to impose regulations without public support or understanding
text: People in the northern part of Sweden often complain about having rules and regulations imposed on them from above

title: Anna Lindh - out on a limb A member of parliament trying to impose regulations without public support or understanding
text: "The southerners" are accused of not understanding how life is and how things work up north

title: Anna Lindh - out on a limb A member of parliament trying to impose regulations without public support or understanding
text: This might not be true, but I will try to describe one situation where personal prestige has interfered in the making of new laws

title: Anna Lindh - out on a limb A member of parliament trying to impose regulations without public support or understanding
text: The legislation I will discuss is concerning snowmobiles and especially the requirement of a driving licence

title: Anna Lindh - out on a limb A member of parliament trying to impose regulations without public support or understanding
text: Snowmobiles are a natural mean of transportation and recreation up north

title: Anna Lindh - out on a limb A member of parliament trying to impose regulations without public support or understanding
text: They are used to get access to remote and desolate parts of the scarcely populated northern part of Sweden

title: Anna Lindh - out on a limb A member of parliament trying to impose regulations without public support or understanding
text: Quite naturally they are also used to get around the parts near the tourism-based villages, which has led to confrontations

title: Anna Lindh - out on a limb A member of parliament trying to impose regulations without public support or understanding
text: On one hand we have tourists wanting to get away from the noise filled cities to experience silence

title: Anna Lindh - out on a limb A member of parliament trying to impose regulations without public support or understanding
text: On the other hand we have locals who think that their needs should be of more importance, since they live there the whole year and not just for a week

title: Anna Lindh - out on a limb A member of parliament trying to impose regulations without public support or understanding
text: But the problem is even more intricate; we also have tourists wanting to drive snowmobiles versus forest and reindeer owners whose work get impaired by reckless snowmobile drivers

title: Anna Lindh - out on a limb A member of parliament trying to impose regulations without public support or understanding
text: Another side of the story is the accidents caused by intoxicated drivers

title: Anna Lindh - out on a limb A member of parliament trying to impose regulations without public support or understanding
text: In the light of these conflicts and problems the Swedish government started talking about some regulations, and one of them was a driving licence

title: Anna Lindh - out on a limb A member of parliament trying to impose regulations without public support or understanding
text: (Up until then the only requirement on a snowmobile driver was that he/she had obtained the age of 16

title: Anna Lindh - out on a limb A member of parliament trying to impose regulations without public support or understanding
text: ) Precautionary measures were taken by the "Swedish snowmobile society" and they invented a kind of "voluntary licence"

title: Anna Lindh - out on a limb A member of parliament trying to impose regulations without public support or understanding
text: To acquire one of those licences you had to attend to ten two-hour lectures/discussions where, among other things, information from the police about what's allowed, traffic rules and how and where to drive were parts of the course

title: Anna Lindh - out on a limb A member of parliament trying to impose regulations without public support or understanding
text: The course became a big success among the northerners with several thousands of participants, and the general opinion was that "we better do this so the southerners don't impose something completely ludicrous on us"

title: Anna Lindh - out on a limb A member of parliament trying to impose regulations without public support or understanding
text: Unfortunately it didn't work

title: Anna Lindh - out on a limb A member of parliament trying to impose regulations without public support or understanding
text: A member of the Swedish government, Anna Lindh, (perhaps needless to say a southerner) decided that it was time to regulate and legislate

title: Anna Lindh - out on a limb A member of parliament trying to impose regulations without public support or understanding
text: The logical thing would have been to make the "voluntary licence" compulsory, but since the licence hadn't been part of her original proposal, it wasn't included

title: Anna Lindh - out on a limb A member of parliament trying to impose regulations without public support or understanding
text: Instead she proposed that to be allowed to drive snowmobiles you would have to have a driving licence for tractors! (In Sweden you are automatically considered able to drive tractors if you have any driving licence, but you can obtain a special driving licence for tractors from the age of 16, if you take a theoretical test

title: Anna Lindh - out on a limb A member of parliament trying to impose regulations without public support or understanding
text: ) People found it quite absurd that knowing things like "no tractors on the freeway" would qualify you to drive snowmobiles, and appealed the decision to the EEC

title: Anna Lindh - out on a limb A member of parliament trying to impose regulations without public support or understanding
text: The legislation was rejected, grounded on that a driving test must have relevance to the vehicle you will be allowed to drive

title: Anna Lindh - out on a limb A member of parliament trying to impose regulations without public support or understanding
text: One would think that now the "voluntary licence" would take the tractor licences place, but it didn't

title: Anna Lindh - out on a limb A member of parliament trying to impose regulations without public support or understanding
text: Instead snowmobiles were moved (along with other vehicles) from "terrain vehicle" to a subclass of "work vehicles"

title: Anna Lindh - out on a limb A member of parliament trying to impose regulations without public support or understanding
text: Then the EEC could no longer oppose to the legislation

title: Anna Lindh - out on a limb A member of parliament trying to impose regulations without public support or understanding
text: This created massive protests among the northerners, and delegations from all over the north were sent to Stockholm to try to stop the new set of laws

title: Anna Lindh - out on a limb A member of parliament trying to impose regulations without public support or understanding
text: They failed

title: Anna Lindh - out on a limb A member of parliament trying to impose regulations without public support or understanding
text: The new set of laws included a lot of insanities

title: Anna Lindh - out on a limb A member of parliament trying to impose regulations without public support or understanding
text: You were not allowed to drive more than 70 km/h, but everyone who has ever driven a snowmobile knows that it is very hard to drive more than 30 km/h for any longer period unless you are on a big flat surface like a lake (where you have free vision)

title: Anna Lindh - out on a limb A member of parliament trying to impose regulations without public support or understanding
text: And how are you going to check that people keep the speed limit? Are you going to send helicopters to patrol the vast Swedish mountain range? Or post policemen behind randomly selected trees? Engine performance was maximized to 60 hp (when imported but not when used) even though the highest risk of getting killed or injured in a snowmobile accident is when a 30-50 year old, intoxicated male is driving a 10-15 year old snowmobile with less than 40 hp

title: Anna Lindh - out on a limb A member of parliament trying to impose regulations without public support or understanding
text: This above means that a person who might not even have driven a car in snowy conditions, is allowed to rent and drive a snowmobile without any other qualification than a passed car driving test and no requirements of knowing where and how to drive

title: Anna Lindh - out on a limb A member of parliament trying to impose regulations without public support or understanding
text: But a 16 year old northerner, who has obtained the "voluntary licence" and therefore knows the "how and where" and most probably also knows "why" is not allowed to do it

title: Anna Lindh - out on a limb A member of parliament trying to impose regulations without public support or understanding
text: As I see it, this is a tragic example of what happens when a person invests too much time in something and when something better comes along, cannot accept it and adopt, or at least incorporate the new idea

title: Anna Lindh - out on a limb A member of parliament trying to impose regulations without public support or understanding
text: Personal prestige should be excluded from politics, but politicians are (unfortunately?) only human

title: Anna Lindh - out on a limb A member of parliament trying to impose regulations without public support or understanding

text: But if you'll look at the age group from 25 up to 44, you'll see that it is the most numerous - 135 thousands of people (from 277 000)!!! That is nearly a half of all the unemployed in Sweden! title: Democracy, a delusion? A short critique of present-day liberalism

title: Democracy, a delusion? A short critique of present-day liberalism

title: Democracy, a delusion? A short critique of present-day liberalism

title: Democracy, a delusion? A short critique of present-day liberalism

title: Democracy, a delusion? A short critique of present-day liberalism

VISUALLY IMPAIRED PEOPLE'S RIGHT TO GO TO MAIN STREAM SCHOOLS
text: It's society's responsibility to resource blind and partuall sighted pupils (I will from now on call both these groups visually impaired

title: VISUALLY IMPAIRED PEOPLE'S RIGHT TO GO TO MAIN STREAM SCHOOLS
text: ) in such a way that they can go through main stream education

title: VISUALLY IMPAIRED PEOPLE'S RIGHT TO GO TO MAIN STREAM SCHOOLS
text: There is nothing wrong with a person's brain just because he or she lacks sight partually or completely

title: VISUALLY IMPAIRED PEOPLE'S RIGHT TO GO TO MAIN STREAM SCHOOLS
text: I'm going to bring up three reasons why I think it is of vital importance that a visually impaired child should never be put into non-integrated schools without any accessment or reason other than its handicap

title: VISUALLY IMPAIRED PEOPLE'S RIGHT TO GO TO MAIN STREAM SCHOOLS
text: Should it not work for any reason, for example if the child is multi-handicapped, then that child obviously should have the right to go to a special school that better can support its specific needs

title: VISUALLY IMPAIRED PEOPLE'S RIGHT TO GO TO MAIN STREAM SCHOOLS
text: I'm firstly going to show some of the main differences between main stream education and non-integrated education

title: VISUALLY IMPAIRED PEOPLE'S RIGHT TO GO TO MAIN STREAM SCHOOLS
text: Firstly, in main stream schools, the aim is to help the best pupils to move forewards, so the courses set high targets instead of focusing on teaching the classes only the easiest and most basic things in the different subjects

title: VISUALLY IMPAIRED PEOPLE'S RIGHT TO GO TO MAIN STREAM SCHOOLS
text: This means that the pupils sometimes can find school challenging, but challenges can be fun, and with the right support they can manage and get stimulated

title: VISUALLY IMPAIRED PEOPLE'S RIGHT TO GO TO MAIN STREAM SCHOOLS
text: This is of course the same for a blind or partually sighted pupil

title: VISUALLY IMPAIRED PEOPLE'S RIGHT TO GO TO MAIN STREAM SCHOOLS
text: There's no reason to assume that they can't cope

title: VISUALLY IMPAIRED PEOPLE'S RIGHT TO GO TO MAIN STREAM SCHOOLS
text: In integration, visually impaired children also get the chance to meet with the sighted world, which I will come back to later

title: VISUALLY IMPAIRED PEOPLE'S RIGHT TO GO TO MAIN STREAM SCHOOLS
text: That means that they get ambitious and interested in trying to do something stimulating in the future, something which will help them to develop themselves and their strengths and to expand their knowledge

title: VISUALLY IMPAIRED PEOPLE'S RIGHT TO GO TO MAIN STREAM SCHOOLS
text: Secondly, if a visually impaired child goes to a main stream school, it mostly means that he or she can live at home instead of in an accomodation provided by the school

title: VISUALLY IMPAIRED PEOPLE'S RIGHT TO GO TO MAIN STREAM SCHOOLS
text: In non-integrated schools, the pupils often live together in a corridor

title: VISUALLY IMPAIRED PEOPLE'S RIGHT TO GO TO MAIN STREAM SCHOOLS
text: The staff substitutes their parents and the other children substitute brothers and sisters, as the school can be situated far from the pupil's home

title: VISUALLY IMPAIRED PEOPLE'S RIGHT TO GO TO MAIN STREAM SCHOOLS
text: The child perhaps only meets its parents a few times a year, so they don't get a chance to learn what real family life is about, which can cause several problems further on in their lives

title: VISUALLY IMPAIRED PEOPLE'S RIGHT TO GO TO MAIN STREAM SCHOOLS
text: If the child is integrated, however, it gets to know its family and also other children who are not visually impaired

title: VISUALLY IMPAIRED PEOPLE'S RIGHT TO GO TO MAIN STREAM SCHOOLS
text: This of course widens their view of society and social life, and as they are raised in the integratedworld, they learn not to be scared of it

title: VISUALLY IMPAIRED PEOPLE'S RIGHT TO GO TO MAIN STREAM SCHOOLS
text: Having explained the background, I will now talk about what this leads to in the future for a blind or partually sighted person

title: VISUALLY IMPAIRED PEOPLE'S RIGHT TO GO TO MAIN STREAM SCHOOLS
text: A grade from an integrated school mostly means greater opportunities for studying at university or other sorts of higher education

title: VISUALLY IMPAIRED PEOPLE'S RIGHT TO GO TO MAIN STREAM SCHOOLS
text: Due to the fact that the child has grown up knowing how to stretch his or her intelligence instead of underestimating it, he or she will learn how far it's possible to go and that one actually can make a career in the sighted world

title: VISUALLY IMPAIRED PEOPLE'S RIGHT TO GO TO MAIN STREAM SCHOOLS
text: Having studied at for example a university, the visually impaired person can then get a well paid and stimulating job

title: VISUALLY IMPAIRED PEOPLE'S RIGHT TO GO TO MAIN STREAM SCHOOLS
text: The visually impaired person that has gone through main stream education knows that he or she is no different to others when it comes to living an independent life

title: VISUALLY IMPAIRED PEOPLE'S RIGHT TO GO TO MAIN STREAM SCHOOLS
text: To sum up, I want to say that I believe that main stream education provides a better understanding of the outside world than non-integration

title: VISUALLY IMPAIRED PEOPLE'S RIGHT TO GO TO MAIN STREAM SCHOOLS
text: Visually impaired people who have gone to schools for sighted people all the way from the beginning get used to solving everyday problems that may occur in a society where everything isn't always specially arranged for a person who lacks sight partually or completely

title: VISUALLY IMPAIRED PEOPLE'S RIGHT TO GO TO MAIN STREAM SCHOOLS
text: Also, the more visually impaired people that go to main stream education, the more the sighted people will learn about what a visual impairment means, which will inevitably lead to fewer prejudice from the sighted people's side and viseversa

title: VISUALLY IMPAIRED PEOPLE'S RIGHT TO GO TO MAIN STREAM SCHOOLS

text: On the 24th of June 1994 Sweden signed a contract with the European Union, EU, which stated that Sweden would join the union on January 1 1995

title: Swedish benefits from a membership in EMU.
text: This contract also means that Sweden is obligated to follow the different conventions that are part of the union

title: Swedish benefits from a membership in EMU.
text: One of these conventions, called the Maastricht Convention, includes a project called EMU, European Monetary Union, which is an economic collaboration with the final purpose of introducing a common currency in EU by the year of 2002

text: Therefore we are, at least formally, obligated to join EMU

title: Swedish benefits from a membership in EMU.

text: I think this is a mistake and a typical example of the government's all too cautious attitude in this question

title: Swedish benefits from a membership in EMU.
text: I will give a few examples that I think speak very clearly in favour for a Swedish membership

title: Swedish benefits from a membership in EMU.
text: In my opinion, the most important reason is the fact that Sweden then will have a chance to get a larger influence on the future development of EMU as well as EU

title: Swedish benefits from a membership in EMU.
text: If we choose not to join EMU, we will inevitably lose political power that will instead belong to the group of countries that already has the biggest influence, such as Germany and France

title: Swedish benefits from a membership in EMU.
text: Beside the increased influence, Sweden also gets a chance to contribute to a deeper integration between EU-countries

title: Swedish benefits from a membership in EMU.
text: Sweden has a duty in helping EU remain an insurance against wars within Europe

title: Swedish benefits from a membership in EMU.
text: If the whole EMU-project would collapse, it would weaken the European cooperation, which would also lead to a weakening of the whole idea of EU as a peace project

title: Swedish benefits from a membership in EMU.
text: What I mean by this is that if EU succeeds in their plans to expand EU to include also the eastern countries of Europe, the risks of a civil war such as that in former Jugoslavia, would be considerably smaller, since it would be easier to discover and react to the problems in time

title: Swedish benefits from a membership in EMU.
text: One of the main arguments EMU opponent's uses is that they do not want the Swedish Krona to be changed to Euro

title: Swedish benefits from a membership in EMU.
text: They feel that we should stick to our traditions and keep the notes and coins that the Swedish people are used to

title: Swedish benefits from a membership in EMU.
text: I can partly agree on their arguments when it comes to the economic part, because the Euro has not been very stabile since it was introduced by the beginning of 2000

title: Swedish benefits from a membership in EMU.
text: I can understand that many people get anxious when they see how the Euro is developing, even though I think its just natural that a currency is a bit shaky on its first years

title: Swedish benefits from a membership in EMU.
text: What I have a harder time understanding is the sudden care for the - what it seems - esthetic look at this issue

title: Swedish benefits from a membership in EMU.
text: I think it would be tragic if our cultural heritage lies in the money, we shouldnt make a big issue about how the money looks since its just metal and paper, a tool to enable us to buy and sell things

title: Swedish benefits from a membership in EMU.
text: Another common opinion among EMU-opponents is that the question should be decided in an election, since they are convinced that the Swedish people would vote against a membership

title: Swedish benefits from a membership in EMU.
text: According to the latest surveys they may very well be right

title: Swedish benefits from a membership in EMU.
text: I think an election might be a good idea, but I have a couple of doubts: first of all, if there were to be an election, it would probably just be an advising one, like it was in the EU-election

title: Swedish benefits from a membership in EMU.
text: Secondly, the clumsy way the government handled the EU-election, by providing the Yes-side with way bigger resources could very well be repeated

title: Swedish benefits from a membership in EMU.
text: That would lead to a huge displeasure among the Swedish people if the Yes-side won, and the election wouldnt be considered a fair one

title: Swedish benefits from a membership in EMU.
text: In brief, the question whether or not Sweden should join The European Monetary Union is a very important one, but the way the Swedish government is handling it does not help the Swedish people at all

title: Swedish benefits from a membership in EMU.
text: Since the positive sides of a membership in my opinion are way bigger, I think we should join

title: Swedish benefits from a membership in EMU.
text: We have paid great money to be part of the European Union and think we should make sure to benefit from it

title: Swedish benefits from a membership in EMU.

Gay parents are as good as any parents!
text: In this essay I would like to discuss a very burning issue in today's political debate, the issue of gay adoptions

title: Gay parents are as good as any parents!
text: The most common argument as to why we should keep the legislation of today, which prohibits gay adoptions, is that it is in the children's best interest

title: Gay parents are as good as any parents!
text: Growing up with gay parents is considered harmful to a child

title: Gay parents are as good as any parents!
text: I am of the opinion that this is wrong

title: Gay parents are as good as any parents!
text: To show why I find it wrong I would like to take two examples of often used arguments as to why gay parents is a bad thing and discuss them

title: Gay parents are as good as any parents!
text: The two arguments I have chosen are the ones that I've found are most commonly used in the debate

title: Gay parents are as good as any parents!
text: The first is that a child needs parents of both sexes, so that it will have both a male and a female role model

title: Gay parents are as good as any parents!
text: The other argument is that a child with gay parents runs a much larger risk of getting bullied in school

title: Gay parents are as good as any parents!
text: I will begin with the argument which most people consider to be the strongest: a child needs both a female and a male parent, since it needs role models of both sexes

title: Gay parents are as good as any parents!
text: I will not deny that a child is better off if it can find a role model of each sex, but I can't see why these role models necessarily have to be the child's parents

title: Gay parents are as good as any parents!
text: If a gay couple with a normal social network adopts a child it is true that the child will only find role models of one sex in it's parents, but then you have to consider that the parents are not the only adults in a child's environment

title: Gay parents are as good as any parents!
text: Almost every child has at least some uncles, aunts, grandparents and/or maybe godparents, not to mention teachers, friends, neighbours, etc

title: Gay parents are as good as any parents!
text: If I take my own childhood as an example I find that my female teachers in compulsory school were much bigger role models for me than my mother was

title: Gay parents are as good as any parents!
text: So what's actually important is that the parents have a normal social network, and of course that they give the child the love, care and attention that it needs

title: Gay parents are as good as any parents!
text: If the parents live up to that I don't think it will have any importance for the child's well-being if the parents are gay or heterosexual

title: Gay parents are as good as any parents!
text: An interesting thing in this context is that the Swedish government already have acknowledged the fact that a child does not need parents of both sexes, as singles are actually allowed to adopt

title: Gay parents are as good as any parents!
text: As to the other argument I can't agree to that a child with gay parents necessarily will be bullied in school

title: Gay parents are as good as any parents!
text: Children are actually much more broadminded than we think

title: Gay parents are as good as any parents!
text: If only the adults in school are open-minded, talk to the children, inform them and allow them to ask questions about it, I think that they will accept that some children has two mums or two dads

title: Gay parents are as good as any parents!
text: But when I say that children are broadminded I don't mean to say that bullying isn't a great problem in school

title: Gay parents are as good as any parents!
text: But what I don't think is that the real reason as to a child getting bullied is that it differs from other children

title: Gay parents are as good as any parents!
text: Instead I think that a bully chooses a victim which is easy to bully, i

title: Gay parents are as good as any parents!
text: e

title: Gay parents are as good as any parents!
text: a child that is shy, quiet, lonely and won't cause the bully any trouble

title: Gay parents are as good as any parents!
text: If this child differs from the others in any way, maybe by wearing glasses, having differently coloured skin, or having gay parents, this is often used by the bully as a excuse to make this child an outcast

title: Gay parents are as good as any parents!
text: But that doesn't mean that this is the actual cause for bullying

title: Gay parents are as good as any parents!
text: I would say that a very shy and lonely white boy with married heterosexual parents runs a much larger risk of being bullied than a talkative black boy that finds it easy to make friends and has gay parents

title: Gay parents are as good as any parents!
text: My conclusion is that a child won't take any harm from growing up with gay parents

title: Gay parents are as good as any parents!
text: As you have seen the two main arguments as to why the law against gay adoptions is in the children's main interest are very easy to dismiss, and therefore I hope that you will understand why I'm of the opinion that this law is an act of discrimination

text: Abortion is a burning issue these days, evoking many strong feelings

text: Unlike the man, she cannot escape and disclaim her responsibility

text: Women in difficult life-situations may not have the economical, emotional or physical ability to take care of a child

title: Abortion - a crime?
text: Young women who become pregnant may simply not be ready to take the responsibility that is required for raising a child

title: Abortion - a crime?
text: A woman who has become pregnant after being raped may, for obvious reasons, not want to become a mother at that time

title: Abortion - a crime?
text: An unwanted child is likely to have to take the blame for its parent's unhappiness or to be neglected or abused, and lead a miserable life which it does not deserve

title: Abortion - a crime?
text: Innocent children have a right to be loved and cared for, emotionally and materially, and outlawing abortions would, I think, deprive them of this right

title: Abortion - a crime?
text: These consequences of a prohibition of abortions are rather obvious and too serious to be ignored

title: Abortion - a crime?
text: It is therefore important to keep them in mind when discussing the matter

title: Abortion - a crime?
text: Summarizing my views, I think that legislating against abortion would amount to a step in the wrong direction in the struggle for women's rights

title: Abortion - a crime?
text: It would also imply a direct danger to women's health if they break the law, and put the well-being of their children in jeopardy if they obey it

title: Abortion - a crime?
text: I think that these arguments are sufficient to show that the right to have an abortion should definitely not be removed

title: Abortion - a crime?
Raise the teachers' salaries!
text: It is common known that today's Sweden, to a great extent, lacks qualified teachers

title: Raise the teachers' salaries!
text: All too few teachers are being educated, and many who are certificated teachers choose to work elsewhere than in school

title: Raise the teachers' salaries!
text: This should not be a surprise though, as both their status and salaries are low in comparison with other academics

title: Raise the teachers' salaries!
text: If you in addition to this, consider how rough the teachers' working conditions are today, it is obvious that something has to be done to change their situation

title: Raise the teachers' salaries!
text: It is absolutely necessary to raise the teachers' wages, in order to give them a salary that corresponds with their assignments, and make the profession attractive again

title: Raise the teachers' salaries!
text: But is it then so hard to be a teacher? I claim that it is, and in this essay I'm going to try to convince you, that the teachers' salaries are much too low in addition to their contemporary working conditions

title: Raise the teachers' salaries!
text: The teaching profession has always been demanding

title: Raise the teachers' salaries!
text: Teachers have always been expected to do a lot of extra work that not has been included in their scheduled working hours; lessons have had to be prepared and written tests and essays corrected

title: Raise the teachers' salaries!
text: And today the working burden has become even heavier

title: Raise the teachers' salaries!
text: A teacher's job is not any more only to make sure that its pupils pass their examinations and keep calm in class

title: Raise the teachers' salaries!
text: Humanity and individualism have become a part of the Swedish schools, and even though this of course is positive, it has increased the pressure on the teachers

title: Raise the teachers' salaries!
text: Today, evaluation of the individual pupil's development and progress is a part of the learning process

title: Raise the teachers' salaries!
text: The teacher has to organize conversations between teacher, parents and child regularly

title: Raise the teachers' salaries!
text: This is not only taking a lot of the teacher's time with a lot of planning required and meetings have to be taken place in the evenings, but the closer contact with the parents also puts psychological pressure on the teacher

title: Raise the teachers' salaries!
text: It is supposed to make all parts comfortable in the delicate situations that can arise when children's skills are being discussed

title: Raise the teachers' salaries!
text: However, the teacher's role as a psychologist doesn't stop at these specific situations

title: Raise the teachers' salaries!
text: In its daily work, the teacher are supposed to catch all pupils' interest at the same time, and be able to handle all their different needs

title: Raise the teachers' salaries!
text: Many pupils require extra attention and help and make this a difficult task

title: Raise the teachers' salaries!
text: The teacher feels that it is not enough

title: Raise the teachers' salaries!
text: Assisting teachers for pupils with special needs are rare and the teacher can't be there for everybody all the time

title: Raise the teachers' salaries!
text: In a time when the classes are growing bigger this is getting even harder

title: Raise the teachers' salaries!
text: Politicians seem to think that teachers are magicians

title: Raise the teachers' salaries!
text: With less money, fewer lessons and more students, they are supposed to be doing miracles and reach a higher ambition level

title: Raise the teachers' salaries!
text: The teachers' responsibilities do not either end with education in the form of school subjects as math and English

title: Raise the teachers' salaries!
text: The teacher is an adult with whom the pupils spend their whole day, to which the small children look up to and imitate

title: Raise the teachers' salaries!
text: It becomes a part of its students' upbringing, whether it likes it or not

title: Raise the teachers' salaries!
text: The school is a social community, where children learn to act among other people than their family

title: Raise the teachers' salaries!
text: And the school of today is not an easy world to live in

title: Raise the teachers' salaries!
text: The teacher is supposed to guide the pupils through the jungle of social and emotional problems that can arise in school

title: Raise the teachers' salaries!
text: It is supposed to discover if a child is feeling bad, if it is being treated badly in school or at home

title: Raise the teachers' salaries!
text: The lack of welfare officers makes this task even harder

title: Raise the teachers' salaries!
text: But it is not only a question of children being treated badly and feeling bad at school

title: Raise the teachers' salaries!
text: Today the school is not a safe place to be, for teachers as well as for pupils

title: Raise the teachers' salaries!
text: An increasing number of students bear guns and bully their teachers

title: Raise the teachers' salaries!
text: In many schools the pupils are "taking over the classrooms" and teachers are afraid of going to their jobs

title: Raise the teachers' salaries!
text: As you can see the teachers' working conditions are hard

title: Raise the teachers' salaries!
text: They are supposed to act both as mentors and psychologists, but do only get paid for teaching

title: Raise the teachers' salaries!
text: They have great responsibilities and it is time that they are being rewarded for that

title: Raise the teachers' salaries!
text: They must feel that they are appreciated, so that they will have the strength to improve the Swedish schools

title: Raise the teachers' salaries!
text: It is time that we invest in the teachers and raise their salaries, before we do not have any left

title: Raise the teachers' salaries!
text: An investment in our teachers is an investment in our children, and thus an investment in our future

title: Raise the teachers' salaries!
Why the paragraph that regulates the right to claim for damages ought to be revised
text: In theory, in Sweden, even a burglar is able to claim for damages if getting injured on private property

title: Why the paragraph that regulates the right to claim for damages ought to be revised
text: This is morally and ethically wrong and something needs to be done to make it impossible

title: Why the paragraph that regulates the right to claim for damages ought to be revised
text: If a burglar, for instance falls and breaks a leg due to the owner of the house having omitted to sand his/her icy driveway and doorstep during a cold winter, the housebreaker can thus claim for damages from the person(s) responsible for keeping the driveway safe, the very person(s) the burglar attempted to steal from

title: Why the paragraph that regulates the right to claim for damages ought to be revised
text: Maybe a thief is about to break into a house through the roof hatch and one of the steps on the ladder snaps causing him to fall to the ground and get hurt

title: Why the paragraph that regulates the right to claim for damages ought to be revised
text: Say that someone is trying to break in through a window but the hinges are so rusty that the window falls out and cuts the thief badly, making him bleed so heavily that an ambulance is needed, should the owner then have to pay the thief damages for his sufferings? It 's not very likely that a person who has entered someone elses premises with committing a crime in mind, would risk giving him- /herself away by turning to the legal system in order to claim his/her so called rights

title: Why the paragraph that regulates the right to claim for damages ought to be revised
text: Nevertheless it's still appalling that it is in fact possible

title: Why the paragraph that regulates the right to claim for damages ought to be revised
text: My opinion is that it shouldn't even be feasible in theory for someone with criminal intentions to make capital out of the property owners unability or neglect to keep the house and yard/garden up to a certain standard

title: Why the paragraph that regulates the right to claim for damages ought to be revised
text: Even if it is desirable that the grounds are safe to anyone who might enter it, an individual should have the right to decide over his/her own property

title: Why the paragraph that regulates the right to claim for damages ought to be revised
text: The case might also be that the weather has been variable with snow and minus degrees, then thaw with a following cold snap turning the driveway into an ice-rink over night

title: Why the paragraph that regulates the right to claim for damages ought to be revised
text: This can make it difficult to keep up with the sanding for instance

title: Why the paragraph that regulates the right to claim for damages ought to be revised
text: The owner might not even deem it necessary since he/she is aware of the problem and therefore take precautions

title: Why the paragraph that regulates the right to claim for damages ought to be revised
text: One might also think that if you enter someones private property, you do it at your own risk, especially if you are uninvited

title: Why the paragraph that regulates the right to claim for damages ought to be revised
text: Some might argue that the uninvited person falling on the icy driveway may be the childminder bringing your sick child home, or that the person falling from your roof is the chimney - sweeper

title: Why the paragraph that regulates the right to claim for damages ought to be revised
text: Shouldn't these honest people have the right to expect being able to perform their duties in a safe environment? Shouldn't they have the right to claim for damages if they are injured on your property? Yes they should! This means that the discussed right must remain included in the law but the fact that it's possible for a criminal to benefit from it and recieve money for getting injured in the above described situations, indicates that the paragraph needs to be revised

title: Why the paragraph that regulates the right to claim for damages ought to be revised
text: Although it might be considered difficult to write a legal paragraph that excludes persons with shady intentions, without violating the rights of the general public

title: Why the paragraph that regulates the right to claim for damages ought to be revised
text: Another problem is to be able to prove that this person who got injured on your doorstep was in fact there for suspicious reasons

title: Why the paragraph that regulates the right to claim for damages ought to be revised
text: One can only hope that this right doesn't apply to people on the way out from your house, carrying off your new stereo in their arms while slipping

title: Why the paragraph that regulates the right to claim for damages ought to be revised
text: Can you then call a person who hasn't yet committed a crime a thief or a burglar? Yes I believe you can if he/she went there with the intentions of stealing, if he/she brought tools to use for breaking and entering, if he/she happends to get injured before accomplishing the theft is beside the point, he/she is still a criminal and should thus not benefit from the right to claim for damages

title: Why the paragraph that regulates the right to claim for damages ought to be revised
text: One might even go so far as to say that it serves the burglar right to break a leg for trying to break the law

Unemployment jobs
text: Unemployment is an enormous problem in our society

title: Unemployment jobs
text: But its not just a problem to society; above all its a problem of utmost importance to those affected by unemployment

title: Unemployment jobs
text: Unemployment affects thousands of our citizens, not just the people who are unemployed, but their families and friends as well

title: Unemployment jobs
text: The time has come to do something about this problem

title: Unemployment jobs
text: There is a solution that is as simple as it is ingenious: unemployment jobs

title: Unemployment jobs
text: It seems appropriate to begin this report on unemployment jobs with a definition of what they are

title: Unemployment jobs
text: An unemployment job is a job in the public sector that is created to give work to an unemployed person

title: Unemployment jobs
text: A person who has a job of this kind is called unemployment worker

title: Unemployment jobs
text: There are several reasons why we should create unemployment jobs

title: Unemployment jobs
text: First of all, unemployment benefits arent of benefit to anyone

title: Unemployment jobs
text: They are a burden to society

title: Unemployment jobs
text: We spend a large amount of the taxpayers money on unemployment benefits, but we dont get anything in return

title: Unemployment jobs
text: At the same time they are a burden to the unemployed who become passive by receiving money without being expected to do anything at all

title: Unemployment jobs
text: They often feel betrayed and rejected by society and cant see any possible way to change their situation

title: Unemployment jobs
text: Secondly, unemployment jobs will be an effective means of reintroducing people into society

title: Unemployment jobs
text: They will get used to get up in the morning and go to work

title: Unemployment jobs
text: The feeling of doing something important will make them proud of their achievements and will boost their self-esteem

title: Unemployment jobs
text: This will help them to find employment elsewhere, which is of course the main aim of this reform

title: Unemployment jobs
text: Furthermore, society will benefit from the unemployment jobs

title: Unemployment jobs
text: The previously unemployed are going to give something back to society; thus everyone will gain something as a result of the unemployment jobs

title: Unemployment jobs
text: Its a well-known fact that the public sector is suffering from a great lack of manpower at present

title: Unemployment jobs
text: This shortage is particularly acute in schools and old peoples homes

title: Unemployment jobs
text: Unemployment workers will be of great assistance in these fields even if they havent got any formal education

title: Unemployment jobs
text: For instance, an educated teacher will of course have the main responsibility for teaching his or her class, but an unemployment worker can help the pupils with their assignments

title: Unemployment jobs
text: He or she can also help the teacher with keeping discipline in the classroom

title: Unemployment jobs
text: Pupils will benefit from more adult help and a calmer school environment, more suited to effective learning

title: Unemployment jobs
text: In order to make a success of this reform, introductory instruction will be available to unemployment workers and they will of course not get tasks they are incompetent to execute

title: Unemployment jobs
text: They will also be given the opportunity to choose where they want to work when this is possible

title: Unemployment jobs
text: Unemployment workers will be given time off to go to job interviews as well

title: Unemployment jobs
text: To encourage the unemployed to participate, the salary for an unemployment job will be higher than the unemployment benefit is today while the unemployment benefit will be somewhat lowered

title: Unemployment jobs
text: There are critics saying that we are going to create unnecessary jobs just to keep everyone occupied and that the unemployment jobs are the kind of jobs that no one would take if he or she had a choice

title: Unemployment jobs
text: As mentioned above, these jobs are very important

title: Unemployment jobs
text: It is true that the unemployment jobs arent the most prestigious and popular jobs available, but we must remember that these jobs are supposed to be temporary

title: Unemployment jobs
text: The reform is aimed at helping the unemployed back into the ordinary labour market, not to create a second one just to fill the need of the public sector

title: Unemployment jobs
text: An added bonus to this reform is that there will be a number of ordinary jobs created in addition to the unemployment jobs since the unemployment jobs has to be administered and supervised

title: Unemployment jobs
text: Finally, the need for unemployment jobs has to be emphasized

title: Unemployment jobs
text: They are going to fill an important gap in the workforce of the public sector

title: Unemployment jobs
text: But whats most important is that they will make the unemployed feel useful and facilitate their re-entry into the ordinary labour market

title: Unemployment jobs
text: The unemployment jobs are going to be of benefit to both society and the unemployed

title: Unemployment jobs
Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: When I was recently working as an unqualified teacher in a Swedish pre-school, I found myself, alone, in charge of a group of 20 children

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: In the afternoons I was sometimes responsible for a group of 34 five- and six-year olds

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: Several of the qualified teachers were on sick-leave

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: They were burnt out

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: One afternoon, one of the children disappeared

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: When his mother came to pick him up, I had no idea where to find him

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: We looked for 30 minutes before he was found

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: His mother cried

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: The boy cried

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: My legs were trembling

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: At least nobody was hurt this time

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: I spent other days in the forest with 40 children and two substitutes, who were only there for the day

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: I made sure I brought a cellphone, in case something would happen

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: When working as a pre-school teacher, two eyes are not enough

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: My experience tells me that the Government has to spend more money on childcare in order to reduce the size of the groups of children and to prevent the burning out of teachers

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: Groups of 20 children younger than six years old are far too often in the hands of inexperienced and unqualified substitutes

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: This is shocking and unacceptable

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: But luckily, it is not unchangeable

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: Ultimately, the responsibility lies with the Government

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: It is the Government that has been the driving force in the development of a society dependent on a state childcare system

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: It has been their policy to promote a system where all children receive equal education and care, as a part of the work for a society with equality of opportunity and equality between the sexes

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: The tax system has, for these reasons, been reformed

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: Today, taxes are supposed to finance childcare

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: As a result of this policy, it is impossible for many parents to stay home with their children

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: Many cannot afford to work part-time

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: As a result, most children at the ages of 2-6 spend several hours in institutions

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: Some children are left to the care of the pre-school teacher for over ten hours per day

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: It is therefore obvious that the childcare system has to keep a certain standard unless working class children and children with a single-parent, will yet again have different opportunities

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: The standard, however, cannot be maintained without funding

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: Despite its responsibility, the Government has carried out economic measures, which have had negative effects on the size of the groups and the quality of the childcare

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: A change of policy is necessary

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: The economic measures taken by the Government have been said to be necessary to keep the budget in balance

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: This has been the main aim of the central government as well as of local authorities

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: The budget is usually an economic plan for a short period of time, a couple of years at the very best

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: The cuts in public spending will, however, have a different effect, in the long run

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: The impact on society can be disastrous, as the main object of pre-school education is socialisation

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: Children in pre-school are developing social skills such as empathy

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: They are supposed to learn to function in a group and understand the rules of human interaction

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: Small groups and educated teachers are vital to this process of socialisation

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: Children have to be seen and cared for in order to learn to see others and care about them

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: It is clear that the present situation in the Swedish childcare system will lead to social maladjustment, such as truancy, violence, criminality and drug-abuse

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: Society will sooner or later have to pay

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: The pre-school teacher is not only a role model, but also a guide

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: He or she is essential to help children solve conflicts and help to explain phenomena in everyday life

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: Children also need help to express thoughts and feelings

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: They need help to develop their language in order to become full-grown, independent, reflecting human beings

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: In pre-school this is done best by conversation in small groups

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: The early years in life are crucial when it comes to giving children a base to stand on for further education

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: In a society where education is continuously becoming more and more important, it seems peculiar that pre-school education is put at a disadvantage

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: Today, pre-school teachers are not only responsible for a large group of children, they are also occupied with cleaning, doing dishes, drying clothes etc

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: The children do not receive a pre-school education of any quality

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: The do not even get the attention they need

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: Meanwhile, teachers are becoming burnt out, and always feeling inadequate

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: This is all due to insufficient funding

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: I am therefore sure society would gain from spending more money on pre-school education, from an economical as well as an educational point of view

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: The most obvious point of view is, of course, the human one

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: We cannot treat what we value most as cattle

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: Pre-school education has become a way of storing children

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: The only way to deal with this and to secure the quality, is by reducing the size of the groups and increasing the number of adults, educated teachers, in pre-school

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: This responsibility lies with the Government

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
text: At present, it cannot even be guaranteed that parents will find their children, safe and sound, where they left them in the morning

title: Too Big to Be Beautiful - A glance at Swedish pre-schools
On the verge of a crisis.
text: Is it high time to raise the teachers' salaries? This is a statement that has been discussed in many parts of the country

title: On the verge of a crisis.
text: It is a topic that is frequently debated on the news and in various TV and radio programs

title: On the verge of a crisis.
text: The most frequent arguments for the raising of the salaries are: to improve the teaching profession's standing in society, to motivate the teachers and to increase the percentage of male teachers

title: On the verge of a crisis.
text: On the other hand, there are counterarguments such as the long holidays, the short workdays and the spending of money on other areas of school than on teachers have been heard

title: On the verge of a crisis.
text: By raising the teachers' salaries the profession would first of all improve its current standing

title: On the verge of a crisis.
text: To know about your future economical situation is of great importance for young people who have not yet decided their future careers

title: On the verge of a crisis.
text: This knowledge would attract more students to the teacher training and also to actually finish their degree

title: On the verge of a crisis.
text: Many students do not graduate at present, due to lack of belief in their future as a teacher

title: On the verge of a crisis.
text: If we manage to solve the present problem with too few actual teachers in school, this would help us to keep up the standard of Swedish education

title: On the verge of a crisis.
text: The low wages of Swedish teachers make many of them leave their jobs to be replaced by young substitutes

title: On the verge of a crisis.
text: Many of these do not have a degree and are often not competent enough to teach certain subjects

title: On the verge of a crisis.
text: In the long run this has the effect on the pupils that they are not being taught enough to be able to cope with society, further education and future careers

title: On the verge of a crisis.
text: To motivate the teachers to stay, they must know that they will get credit for all the hard work

title: On the verge of a crisis.
text: Knowing this, they will give us enthusiastic teachers that in turn will generate with the pupils' improved skills and grades

title: On the verge of a crisis.
text: Female staff dominates the Swedish school at present

title: On the verge of a crisis.
text: The profession seems to have taken a different turn, being more of a caring kind

title: On the verge of a crisis.
text: Children need caring, but they also need discipline and most of all they need role models for their future life

title: On the verge of a crisis.
text: This is because of their tendency to not do what they are told by adults, but instead imitating them in their behaviour

title: On the verge of a crisis.
text: If the teachersâ wages are raised, it will attract more men to school

title: On the verge of a crisis.
text: This is essential since all children need role models, both boys and girls

title: On the verge of a crisis.
text: When it comes to the counterarguments, there is the myth of too long holidays

title: On the verge of a crisis.
text: Usually people in Sweden have five weeks of vacation per year, while teachers have not only summer holidays of ten weeks but also Christmas, Easter, autumn- and spring-break

title: On the verge of a crisis.
text: Considering the length of their vacations, the teachers should be satisfied with the fairly low wages

title: On the verge of a crisis.
text: A second argument is that teachers in most cases spend a fairly low number of hours at work

title: On the verge of a crisis.
text: Besides, one could argue that the teachers' profession cannot be that strenuous, considering that they work with children

title: On the verge of a crisis.
text: Compared to other regular workers in society the teachers' wages are not extremely low

title: On the verge of a crisis.
text: All the money that would be spent on the teachers could be of better use, for example to buy new and more current books and to improve the environment in the school

title: On the verge of a crisis.
text: The Swedish school system has been very well functioning for a long time

title: On the verge of a crisis.
text: To be able to maintain this reputation, something must be done and according to my opinion the first step should be to raise the teachers' salaries: at present they are a joke

title: On the verge of a crisis.
text: The people who argument against this do not realize that we are on the verge of an educational crisis

title: On the verge of a crisis.
text: This is what has happened in the segregated parts of America, children (mostly in the state/public schools) not learning enough to be able to cope with their lives when they get older

title: On the verge of a crisis.
text: The result of this has been not only that many American inhabitants seem to lack general basic knowledge but also in an increased rate of crime and drug-abuse

title: On the verge of a crisis.
text: Hopefully the Swedish educational system will not go as far as the American has, but in order to prevent this to happen, something has to be done now

title: On the verge of a crisis.
Let homosexuals adopt
text: Something many people consider a matter of course is that homosexuals always should be equal to heterosexuals

title: Let homosexuals adopt
text: However, many of them who first agree change their attitude when it comes to adoption

text: We live in a modern and multicultural society, and we should know better than to be prejudiced when there are much more important things to do

title: Let homosexuals adopt

title: Let homosexuals adopt
text: The step between understanding that and that homosexuals also would make good parents should not be too far

title: Let homosexuals adopt
text: We can't say that homosexuals and heterosexuals are equal if they are not given the same rights

title: Let homosexuals adopt

text: Moreover, there already are children who live with a homosexual parent and the parent's partner, and there hasn't been proved that these children have problems caused by that

text: Many people usually consider the main problem to be that all children need both their mother and their father both for love and to identify themselves with

text: Only, we know that there are many children who live with only one parent and not everyone identifies themselves with their parents or with their parents only
