EU- The new Sovjet-union
text: Intruduction All since Sweden joined the EU, there have been political discussions whether it is good for the country or not

title: EU- The new Sovjet-union
text: What have we benefited from the membership and is it worth all the money that has been invested

title: EU- The new Sovjet-union
text: Many people are disappointed and do not think the membership corresponds to all the promises that were connected with the membership

title: EU- The new Sovjet-union
text: There have also occurred different problems connected to the EU- meetings like demonstrations and violence, that was not expected in advance

title: EU- The new Sovjet-union
text: The bureaucracy The EU parliament is a huge machine and costs a large amount of money to run

title: EU- The new Sovjet-union
text: There are salaries for all the politicians involved and allowance for expenses but also expenses for travelling

title: EU- The new Sovjet-union
text: The bureaucracy is a big problem

title: EU- The new Sovjet-union
text: To have an influence in the EU is very hard, because it is a very large political body

title: EU- The new Sovjet-union
text: The system works so that large countries get greater influence than smaller countries

title: EU- The new Sovjet-union
text: In reality it means that small countries have very little influence and can be voted down on in many issues

title: EU- The new Sovjet-union
text: It is hard for a small country to raise a question because it is difficult to get enough support

title: EU- The new Sovjet-union
text: It is also difficult for an individual to have an influence either on politicians, or to raise an issue through legal channel

title: EU- The new Sovjet-union
text: There are many EU politicians at many different levels such as commissioners ministers or parliamentarian

title: EU- The new Sovjet-union
text: Some of them have been found to be corrupted in meaning to take advantages, or benefit on behalf of their position

title: EU- The new Sovjet-union
text: There are examples of incorrect wages and wrong employments or other examples of unsuitable behaviour

title: EU- The new Sovjet-union
text: EU-regulations In Sweden, we have come far ahead of many European countries in issues concerning pollution, the environment, the prevention of cruelty to animals, job equality and other questions of big importance

title: EU- The new Sovjet-union
text: But it is difficult to make laws that are applicable for every single country

title: EU- The new Sovjet-union
text: Furthermore many regulations or directives are simply not adaptable to specific countries

title: EU- The new Sovjet-union
text: To EU adapt whole society costs a large amount of money and does more harm than good in many cases

title: EU- The new Sovjet-union
text: The food industry have many directives and standards to adjust to, and it affect Swedish food so that it becomes less healthy

title: EU- The new Sovjet-union
text: Local Swedish agriculture gets competition from abroad and less subsidies from the state, with the free trade agreement

title: EU- The new Sovjet-union
text: This affects most of all animals, because it is impossible to provide good care of animals when the prices are pressed down to minimum

title: EU- The new Sovjet-union
text: Criminality According to the free mobility for inhabitants between EU countries, a new market has been created for criminality

title: EU- The new Sovjet-union
text: Illicit traffic flourishes nearly uncontrollably with big networks of criminal gangs involved

title: EU- The new Sovjet-union
text: They are often run from abroad where they are hard to control

title: EU- The new Sovjet-union
text: This problem affects society in a very negative way and it includes large costs both from a human perspective and in economic terms

title: EU- The new Sovjet-union
text: Violence in connection with major EU meetings has become a big problem

title: EU- The new Sovjet-union
text: It brings insecurity to the citizens and causes substantial materiel damage

title: EU- The new Sovjet-union
text: Summary Western Europe consists of sharply demarcated territories and they form strong and self-supporting nations with strong identities, so there is no need to form a union with already strong units

title: EU- The new Sovjet-union
text: EU only seems to create more problems than advantages

title: EU- The new Sovjet-union
text: A better solution to global problems would be to form smaller geographical units of cooperation

title: EU- The new Sovjet-union
text: With nations which are naturally demarcated to the same area, and often have to deal with similar kind of issues

title: EU- The new Sovjet-union
text: One example could be the Scandinavian countries

title: EU- The new Sovjet-union
text: And then small countries would be stronger and have greater chance to influence conditions in different issues

title: EU- The new Sovjet-union
text: In this report, I have tried to focus on some major problems that occur when a political union becomes a political centre

THE MONARCHY IS STILL THE BEST FOR SWEDEN
text: Is it necessary to have a monarchy in Sweden? Do we need the King, the Queen and the whole Royal family? Isn't it hopelessly old-fashioned to inherit a title and an occupation like the kings and the queens do and doesn't all that belong to the past? It is rather easy to answer yes to these questions and to find counter arguments for the monarchy but nevertheless I'm definitely for it

text: Sweden got to have a ceremonial head of state who can represent the country outside Sweden

text: I think the royal couple is doing a great job and I don't think that a president or a prime minister is better suited for the task

text: They also serve for life, which is good under the circumstances

text: I mean, Sweden is a small country and I think it's important that our royal couple is well known

title: THE MONARCHY IS STILL THE BEST FOR SWEDEN
text: It's easier to become well known if you serve for life than if you are elected for a period of four years like the prime minister in Sweden

title: THE MONARCHY IS STILL THE BEST FOR SWEDEN
text: Another important thing is that the monarch has no political power, as I think it is in all the kingdoms in Europe

title: THE MONARCHY IS STILL THE BEST FOR SWEDEN
text: The monarchs have to be politically neutral

title: THE MONARCHY IS STILL THE BEST FOR SWEDEN
text: A counter argument often heard is that the monarchy costs a lot of money but I'm sure that a president and all the other persons it would be necessary to appoint or elect to do the work that the Royal family does now, will cost just as much

title: THE MONARCHY IS STILL THE BEST FOR SWEDEN
text: The financial situation for the taxpayers would not change if we had a presidency instead of a monarchy, at least the tax wouldn't be reduced

title: THE MONARCHY IS STILL THE BEST FOR SWEDEN
text: Another reason to keep the monarchy is that the citizens of Sweden still want them

title: THE MONARCHY IS STILL THE BEST FOR SWEDEN
text: A great majority of the Swedish people is for the monarchy and the royal family is extremely popular

title: THE MONARCHY IS STILL THE BEST FOR SWEDEN
text: Polls reveal that the royal family rates very high in people's esteem

title: THE MONARCHY IS STILL THE BEST FOR SWEDEN
text: Many people follow every step they take by reading magazines and watching television programmes

title: THE MONARCHY IS STILL THE BEST FOR SWEDEN
text: In Sweden I don't think the mass media is as offensive as one has heard of elsewhere

title: THE MONARCHY IS STILL THE BEST FOR SWEDEN
text: They do respect the privacy of the royal family to a certain point

title: THE MONARCHY IS STILL THE BEST FOR SWEDEN
text: We haven't heard so much of the paparazzi in Sweden like we heard when Lady Di had her accident and so unfortunately passed away

title: THE MONARCHY IS STILL THE BEST FOR SWEDEN
text: I think it is unethical to chase royalties and other famous people just to find scandalous things to publish

A healthier approach to life
text: Todays food industry is big business with large profits to gain

text: I would like to point out that consumers need to take responsibility too as they demand high quality product for the lowest possible price

text: This type of unnatural experience produces stress reactions in livestock, severely injuring them and even causing deaths

title: A healthier approach to life
text: A similar disrespect for natures ways may be observed in the poultry industry

title: A healthier approach to life
text: In a zealous attempt to improve profit-margins, poultry are fed growth hormones and antibiotics

title: A healthier approach to life
text: Subsequently their muscle mass increases at a rate far faster then nature designed

title: A healthier approach to life
text: Some of us have seen footage of chickens weighing three times their natural weight and as a result their bones literally crack under the pressure

title: A healthier approach to life
text: Beef and milking cows are also fed antibiotic and steroid hormones, added to prevent infection and increase weight quickly

text: These medications are then passed on to the consumer and are in turn associated with a decreased responsiveness to antibiotic therapy in human patients

text: The problem with meat today, then, is perhaps not that it is meat, but that it is adulterated meat, from sick and over medicated animals

text: What amounts to the worst case of blatant disrespect to natures ways, is the repulsive practice of feeding pulverised carcasses to cattle

title: A healthier approach to life
text: Today we have to live with the terrible repercussions of this questionable practice

title: A healthier approach to life
text: This leads me to the second reason for opting for a vegetarian diet namely the health benefits

title: A healthier approach to life
text: By restraining from eating meat one eliminate the risk of contracting BSE

title: A healthier approach to life
text: However, it is said that the risks are minimal

title: A healthier approach to life
text: Saturated fats and cholesterol, on the other hand, do scare people and animal products contain a high level of both

title: A healthier approach to life
text: Medical research have shown the strong links between high consumption of meats and arteriosclerosis and even some types of cancer

title: A healthier approach to life
text: Charcoal grilled steaks are indeed classified as highly carcinogenic

title: A healthier approach to life
text: Obesity is yet another symptom of high intake of saturated fats

title: A healthier approach to life
text: It has become so prevalent that even children are victims

title: A healthier approach to life
text: Institutions such as the US summer camps have had to include courses where children receive help to break their destructive eating habits

title: A healthier approach to life
text: There are of course other factors that contribute to obesity such as the relatively recent introduction of fast foods, sodas and mass availability of junk food

title: A healthier approach to life
text: However, I would strongly suggest that a conscious decision to follow a well balanced vegetarian diet would not only keep weight at check but most certainly improve the general state of health

title: A healthier approach to life
text: A word of caution is called for here

title: A healthier approach to life
text: Vegetable and grain crops are increasingly being irradiated and pesticides and fertilisers are still used in large amounts

title: A healthier approach to life
text: Therefore it is important to buy ecologically grown produce whenever possible

title: A healthier approach to life
text: This will give us a product with a higher vitamin and mineral content and as an added benefit one will have helped to protect the environment

title: A healthier approach to life
text: With an increased energy level, resulting from a reduced burden on the digestive system, vegetarians frequently find a subtle shift in consciousness

title: A healthier approach to life
text: Some leave it at that, whilst others may investigate further and find they have become more in tune with their intuition

title: A healthier approach to life
text: For this reason, many religions advocate a diet void of animal products

title: A healthier approach to life
text: The vegetarian Hindus are one of them and so are the Buddhists

title: A healthier approach to life
text: Even some philosophers have found an enhanced sensibility and increased mental power as a result of eating mostly vegetables and grains

title: A healthier approach to life
text: Indeed two such prominent philosophers as Plato and Pythagoras were both vegetarians

title: A healthier approach to life
text: The spiritual aspect is a strong incentive but has yet to influence the main population

title: A healthier approach to life
text: I have offered a choice and mentioned reasons that will lead you on the road to improved health and increased awareness

title: A healthier approach to life
text: My definition of a good human is one that takes positive steps to incorporated love and compassion in every aspect of their life

title: A healthier approach to life
text: I sincerely hope no one embarks on vegetarian diet simply to become slim, or to be politically correct

title: A healthier approach to life
text: Indeed those who are capable of unconditional love at all times are forever healthy

text: This portrait of the king and his habits strengthen the right to act in a manner, which I consider awkward

title: Down with the King
text: To hunt down and kill animals righteous many peoples habits of eating meat and killing animals

title: Down with the King
text: There is no way I just can sit back and watch this man, the man who should represent the whole country, without reacting

title: Down with the King
text: I do not want that man to represent Sweden, but there is nothing I can do about it

title: Down with the King
text: This argumentation essay is not about issues concerning eating meat or not, nonetheless I think I have maid my point clear

title: Down with the King
text: A man employed by the country of Sweden ought to express the opinions of the majority and hence has to be elected by the people

title: Down with the King
text: With this not said we would have someone we would all like, but that is the way it has to work in a democratic country

title: Down with the King
text: So to conclude my standpoint I have to say there can be no place for inherited monarchy in a democratic country like Sweden

title: Down with the King
text: A man in this position has to represent the people

title: Down with the King
text: It is not acceptable that a man possessing power as a direct cause by the fact that he is employed by the country of Sweden is not elected by us all

title: Down with the King
Allow homosexuals to adopt children
text: Homosexuals in Sweden can not adopt children

title: Allow homosexuals to adopt children
text: It does not matter how loving they are or how much the child needs them; the law does not give couples of the same sex the right to adopt children

title: Allow homosexuals to adopt children
text: This must be changed

title: Allow homosexuals to adopt children
text: The main reason I have for making this statement is that if you do not give homosexuals the same rights as heterosexuals it is discrimination and discrimination of any kind are against the law

title: Allow homosexuals to adopt children
text: Everyone should have the same rights to adopt a child; if you are gay or straight has nothing to do with your capacity to be a good parent

title: Allow homosexuals to adopt children
text: Moreover it should be said that adopting a child is nothing you do over night, not even if you are a heterosexual

title: Allow homosexuals to adopt children
text: The process of adopting a child is long, you and your partner will be studied to see if you are suitable for becoming parents and you will not be approved if you have not thought your decision to adopt trough

title: Allow homosexuals to adopt children
text: Adoptive parents have planned and prepared a long time for their child, they will love and care for it, no matter if they are heterosexual or not

title: Allow homosexuals to adopt children
text: Adoption, and the close study of you and your partner that comes with it, is for most homosexual couples the only way to get a child

title: Allow homosexuals to adopt children
text: Compare this with the fact that a lot of children today are brought up by parents who do not love them, who abuse them and who, in other ways, do not give their them what they need

title: Allow homosexuals to adopt children
text: In addition to this there are children all over the world that do not have a home, who are raised in orpanhages or in other terrible conditions

title: Allow homosexuals to adopt children
text: What would not these children do for a chance to be a part of a loving family, gay or straight

title: Allow homosexuals to adopt children
text: By not allowing homosexuals to adopt we let our prejudice get in the way of the welfare of the children

title: Allow homosexuals to adopt children
text: This is not the way it should be, and I think you all agree with me when I say that it is better for a child to grow up with homosexual, loving parents than to starve to death

title: Allow homosexuals to adopt children
text: One thing that many people uses as an argument against homosexual adoptions is that the children being brought up in an environment like this runs a greater risk to be teased and harassed than children that are being adopted by heterosexual parents

title: Allow homosexuals to adopt children
text: In today's society that may be true, but we can not overcome the prejudices if we bend for them

title: Allow homosexuals to adopt children
text: Racism is a problem in Sweden, like in many other countries, but that do not stop us from adopting black children even though there is a risk that they could be victims of racism

title: Allow homosexuals to adopt children
text: We can not let the prejudices stop us from doing what is right

title: Allow homosexuals to adopt children
text: Another argument that is sometimes given by people who do not want homosexuals to have the right to adopt is that a child needs both a male and a female role model in its life

title: Allow homosexuals to adopt children
text: This may also be right, but it does not have to be the parents playing this role

title: Allow homosexuals to adopt children
text: Far from all children today grows up with both a father and a mother, but that does not mean they do not have someone from both sexes to look up to

title: Allow homosexuals to adopt children
text: Role models in today's society can be grandparents, neighbors, teachers or anyone else that the child might have good contact with

title: Allow homosexuals to adopt children
text: Finally I would just like to say that even if we can not stop inappropriate individuals, such as drug addicts, from having children, we can, and we should, stop the discrimination of the homosexuals and give them the same right as the heterosexuals to adopt children

title: Allow homosexuals to adopt children
Fruit is evil
text: As we all know, bad health is one of the greatest threats to the wealth of the western world

title: Fruit is evil
text: Overweight, sickness associated with too high cholesterol values, constant tiredness and exhaustion are well-known problems most commonly caused by inappropriate manners in eating

title: Fruit is evil
text: Many blame fast food and lack of descent cooking for this, but I'd like to point out another, much worse felon: fruit

title: Fruit is evil
text: Most people claim that this is an essential part of a nutritious diet, but I will prove such is not the case

title: Fruit is evil
text: 15 months ago, I deliberately ceased to eat all kinds of raw fruit

title: Fruit is evil
text: The result: I feel great

title: Fruit is evil
text: I do agree that fruits contain many vitamins that are necessary for physical well-being, but these could easily be found elsewhere (in vegetables and pills for instance; the latter is by the way a very rational source, since a pill a day is all you need to swallow)

title: Fruit is evil
text: What made me an opponent to fruit eating, however, was a profound consideration of certain human aspects

title: Fruit is evil
text: Almost all fruit consumed here is grown in gigantic plantations, in many ways similar to Nazi concentration camps

title: Fruit is evil
text: Bananas and oranges are forced to grow up in a totally unnatural environment, where intoxication of both themselves and the people collecting them is common due to the implementation of chemicals

title: Fruit is evil
text: After reaching desirable sizes, the fruits are transported in such great misery it makes the shipping of slaves in the 1700s look almost luxurious

title: Fruit is evil
text: Apart from being intoxicated, plantation workers suffer seriously because of hazardous wages, working and living conditions

title: Fruit is evil
text: One might wonder whether those working at the plantations really have a choice

title: Fruit is evil
text: At the moment, I'm afraid they don't, since the countries they live in are mostly poorly developed ones

title: Fruit is evil
text: The underdevelopment of fruit producing countries is of utmost interest

title: Fruit is evil
text: May it not be that these countries are poor because they grow fruit? You might think that this isn't a realistic thought, but I dare say, it is surely a thrilling one

title: Fruit is evil
text: Of course, all exporters of fruit aren't poor

title: Fruit is evil
text: New Zealand and Israel, for instance, are wealthy nations that sell a considerable amount of oranges and apples

title: Fruit is evil
text: I reckon this has two major reasons: most importantly, there are a lot of foreign workers here, who don't think getting well paid is a prerequisite (that probably goes for the typical Kibbutz worker)

title: Fruit is evil
text: Furthermore, wealthy fruit-growers were already in possession of a highly developed infrastructure before they started exporting the controversial goods

title: Fruit is evil
text: Poor exporters have hardly got anything one could call infrastructure, and therefor get locked into a pattern

title: Fruit is evil
text: In order to break that pattern the country needs new industries, something that often requires foreign investments

title: Fruit is evil
text: Such are usually hard to attract if your infrastructure is poor

title: Fruit is evil
text: An evil circle, indeed, and fruit is to blame

title: Fruit is evil
text: However, the actual sinner isn't the fruit itself, but us, eating it without having a thought of what we're really doing

title: Fruit is evil
text: Celebrating the suffering of others, that is

title: Fruit is evil
text: Undemocratic, corrupted governments get our support

title: Fruit is evil
text: In fact, we are paying for the imprisonment of fruits and workers

title: Fruit is evil
text: This is obviously unknown to most fruit-eaters; at least I hope so

title: Fruit is evil
text: Otherwise, nearly everyone in the western world has got a certain amount of fascistic sympathies

title: Fruit is evil
text: If that is the case, I am deeply terrified of what shapes this could take in the future

title: Fruit is evil
text: Who is nothing but a fruit-eater today, might be the Himmler of next decade

title: Fruit is evil
text: This terrible future scenario could easily be avoided

title: Fruit is evil
text: Human beings do not need fruit

title: Fruit is evil
text: I know this for sure, since no fruit whatsoever has passed my throat for over a year

title: Fruit is evil
text: My intellect is at its peak, and I hardly ever get a cold

title: Fruit is evil
text: There might be people out there who couldn't give up fruit eating because of the taste, but as I recall, there are no tasty fruits

title: Fruit is evil
text: What strikes me is that many vegetarians have stopped eating cows because of the same reasons that stopped my eating fruit

title: Fruit is evil
text: I find this rather curious, since it's obvious that a cow pacing the rich fields of Scania suffers less than a trapped banana in a miserable Latin American plantation

title: Fruit is evil
text: By now, I really hope I've convinced you that eating fruit is simply wrong

title: Fruit is evil
text: There is no point in it, and it causes pain

title: Fruit is evil
text: Please join me in my struggle

title: Fruit is evil
text: Do not eat fruit!

title: It isn't all about laughs
text: When I was a kid I read comic books

title: It isn't all about laughs
text: Of course I did, who didn't? My parents thought I would stop when I got older since it was all nonsense anyway

title: It isn't all about laughs
text: But what they were unaware of, and so are most people I meet, was that there is a great world of literature in the comic form, hidden away from the public eye for different reasons that are the topic of another essay altogether

title: It isn't all about laughs
text: It is my opinion that comics should be put to use in education of children (and perhaps also adults but that also will be left out here)

title: It isn't all about laughs
text: My reasons are simply that all involved, children, comics and education, will benefit from such an arrangement

title: It isn't all about laughs
text: It may not be obvious to the uninformed but reading a comic book is not something that is necessarily the most banal form of escapism

title: It isn't all about laughs
text: In reading the comic book you take in the combined effort of image and text

title: It isn't all about laughs
text: This is obviously something that makes the reading easier

title: It isn't all about laughs
text: Illustrations are already used frequently in children's books, to lighten the reading, to enrich the reading

title: It isn't all about laughs
text: No one questions this

title: It isn't all about laughs
text: But if the text were to wander in to the image it is suddenly something silly, a "low" form of culture

title: It isn't all about laughs
text: The way I see it, it's the other way around

title: It isn't all about laughs
text: When you read text and image at the same time, the mind can assimilate more information, understand more on both a facts-level and an emotional level

title: It isn't all about laughs
text: In the comic, a medium with as much international variety as the novel, children can find education and information about the world and about human beings

title: It isn't all about laughs
text: Of course it is not in itself a very good technique in teaching math but even there it might be used as a supplement

title: It isn't all about laughs
text: Maybe someone feels like arguing that the larger gain is on the other side of exchange, the comic book will benefit the most

title: It isn't all about laughs
text: This may to the general public be a marginal argument for putting comics to use in schools

title: It isn't all about laughs
text: However, I hope to turn you all around and make you see that the world would be a little happier if the comic book wasn't such an obscured medium

title: It isn't all about laughs
text: "Obscured" I can hear someone muttering, "They're always in the papers

title: It isn't all about laughs
text: " Certainly, the regular comic strip appears in newspapers every day but there is an abundance of comic books, little independent creations only read by a few

title: It isn't all about laughs
text: If the comic book was used in schools, they would soon rise in status and more people would read all kinds of comics

title: It isn't all about laughs
text: This would result in more money to publishers and creators of course, which isn't necessarily a good thing

title: It isn't all about laughs
text: But I believe that when money and a rise in status is combined there is a good chance in even greater work being done

title: It isn't all about laughs
text: Because there is indeed some grounds to present status of the comic book, much of what is produced and sold on the newsstands lacks in quality

title: It isn't all about laughs
text: The situation would improve if people had another attitude towards comics, access to the good stuff would be better

title: It isn't all about laughs
text: Furthermore, I believe that even the education itself would be better

title: It isn't all about laughs
text: This might seem a daring statement but bare with me and see if you don't agree

title: It isn't all about laughs
text: Often enough to worry us all we hear reports on how difficult the situation is in our schools

title: It isn't all about laughs
text: Now, I'm not suggesting that I have the solution to the hardships of being a teacher but still, couldn't this be a tool? Let's say a teacher has a few troublesome pupils in class

title: It isn't all about laughs
text: They are likely to take up much of the teachers time and thus creating an unfair situation where quieter pupils find themselves unpriviliged

title: It isn't all about laughs
text: Perhaps the comic book, which I hope I have established here as a medium with information-qualities as well as being something that will fascinate readers, can be of use

title: It isn't all about laughs
text: In conclusion I would just like to say that it's odd to me how the comic book has been overlooked in educational environment

title: It isn't all about laughs
text: To me it has always been the joy of reading and experiencing one thing that led me to new endeavors

title: It isn't all about laughs
text: This is basically what made me sure that children will benefit from reading comics in school, they will find joy in learning

title: It isn't all about laughs
text: The fact that the comic medium will benefit from this is perhaps of secondary nature but a better education should at least capture the eyes of the teaching community

title: It isn't all about laughs
Shorter working hours - Higher quality of life for everyone
text: We live in a time, when most people are pressed for short of time

title: Shorter working hours - Higher quality of life for everyone
text: Many of us, I am sure, feel like they are running in a treadmill that never stops

title: Shorter working hours - Higher quality of life for everyone
text: My suggestion to solve this problem is a change-over from an eight-hour working day to a six-hour day

title: Shorter working hours - Higher quality of life for everyone
text: I believe that such change is relatively easy done

title: Shorter working hours - Higher quality of life for everyone
text: All that it takes is some schedulechanges, and maybe a slightly different distribution of the work

title: Shorter working hours - Higher quality of life for everyone
text: I am sure that a shortening of the working hours would give many advantages, both to society and to the individual

title: Shorter working hours - Higher quality of life for everyone
text: As a result of the shorter working hours, the individual will have more spare time, to do whatever he wants

title: Shorter working hours - Higher quality of life for everyone
text: For example, if he has a family he can spend more time with the children, who can get more help with their homework

title: Shorter working hours - Higher quality of life for everyone
text: And i am sure that everyone who has children, feel that they never have as much time to just sit down and talk to them as they would like

title: Shorter working hours - Higher quality of life for everyone
text: People will also get time to exercise their hobbies

title: Shorter working hours - Higher quality of life for everyone
text: I believe that a lot of people feel that they do not have time to do the things they really want to do

title: Shorter working hours - Higher quality of life for everyone
text: They keep thinking: "I will do it later, when I get time "

title: Shorter working hours - Higher quality of life for everyone
text: Doing things you really like to do is, as we all know, an important part of life

title: Shorter working hours - Higher quality of life for everyone
text: With the introduction of a six-hour working day, we will get more spare time and a higher quality of life for everyone

title: Shorter working hours - Higher quality of life for everyone
text: My second argument for a shorter work week is that it will lead to an increased number of vacant jobs, which means that many of the unemployed will get a job

title: Shorter working hours - Higher quality of life for everyone
text: That means that it will be a more fair division of labour and in a time when so many are unemployed, I think that it is only fair that we share the burden of work

title: Shorter working hours - Higher quality of life for everyone
text: Because just as well as it can be hard to find time when you have a full time job, it can be tough to be unemployed, with a constant lack of money and a feeling of being unneeded

title: Shorter working hours - Higher quality of life for everyone
text: There is no doubt that getting a job leads to a higher self-esteem and a higher quality of life

title: Shorter working hours - Higher quality of life for everyone
text: If we can attain this just by shortening the work, I can see no reason why we should not do it

title: Shorter working hours - Higher quality of life for everyone
text: My third argument for shorter working hours is that the number of repetitive strain injuries will be reduced

title: Shorter working hours - Higher quality of life for everyone
text: That will lead to fewer certificates of illness, which will be good, both for the companies and for the individual

title: Shorter working hours - Higher quality of life for everyone
text: The companies will save money, because they will not have to hire so many stand-ins

title: Shorter working hours - Higher quality of life for everyone
text: Furthermore, the companies will become less vulnerable because the staffs will be larger, and it will be easier for them to cover up for someone missing because of illness

title: Shorter working hours - Higher quality of life for everyone
text: The individual will probably get a fuller, healthier old age, if the body is not jaded

title: Shorter working hours - Higher quality of life for everyone
text: The queues to surgical operations, on for example hip joints, will be shortened

title: Shorter working hours - Higher quality of life for everyone
text: And that is, of course, a major advantage for society in general

title: Shorter working hours - Higher quality of life for everyone
text: Shorter queues in the medical service is, as we all know, a goal for all the political parties

title: Shorter working hours - Higher quality of life for everyone
text: I know that this labour market measure has been up to discussion several times, at least here in Sweden

title: Shorter working hours - Higher quality of life for everyone
text: Strangely enough, it has not come to a decision yet, but I am sure that it will happen soon

title: Shorter working hours - Higher quality of life for everyone
text: The advantages are, as anyone must understand, so overwhelming, that everybody must see that shorter working hours are inevitable in the future

title: Shorter working hours - Higher quality of life for everyone
text: Let us just hope that everybody involved in decision-making will soon make the only right decision on this issue

title: Shorter working hours - Higher quality of life for everyone
Laboratory Convicts
text: You're walking down an eerie aisle in a laboratory

title: Laboratory Convicts
text: On each side there are cages, hundreds of them, and it doesn't seem to have an end

title: Laboratory Convicts
text: Several pairs of sad, lonely eyes looks out on you from behind the bars

title: Laboratory Convicts
text: Some of the animals lay on their sides, shaking in some unimaginable pain

title: Laboratory Convicts
text: Their faces lights up with fear as you approach them, and they scream

title: Laboratory Convicts
text: The next thing you know, you're walking down a corridor in another building, and you hear laughter

title: Laboratory Convicts
text: The people in this place eat good food, sleep in nice beds, earn some money, watch television, work out in the gym and read good books

title: Laboratory Convicts
text: They have it all

title: Laboratory Convicts
text: They have to stay in the building, though

title: Laboratory Convicts
text: These men and women have all done terrible things

title: Laboratory Convicts
text: They have robbed people, mistreated animals, been dealing with illegal business or maybe they've even killed people

title: Laboratory Convicts
text: The animals in the beginning are laboratory animals, they are trapped in cages that is too small, they are being tied down and force-fed chemicals and poisons, just so that we humans will know the effects, and side-effects, of some drug

title: Laboratory Convicts
text: Why not do the experiments on the prisoners instead? Let's think about it; If the laboratory animal is in pain due to the experiment, you have to cut the animal open to see the effects of the drug

title: Laboratory Convicts
text: A convict, on the other hand, can tell you exactly when, where and how it hurts, and thereby help the scientists to do their work faster

title: Laboratory Convicts
text: Also, you wouldn't have to test the product once more to find out if it's harmless to people, because you would get the human side-effects at the same test

title: Laboratory Convicts
text: The animals are born into the world of pain, and it's not fair

title: Laboratory Convicts
text: They haven't done anything wrong

title: Laboratory Convicts
text: Why do humans treat their co-beings so badly? We're supposed to be the superior race of this planet! The people in the jails are, apart from the animals, not innocent

title: Laboratory Convicts
text: They have done many different things, but those are not good things

title: Laboratory Convicts
text: Some of the people are in jail for life, and some even for death

title: Laboratory Convicts
text: It is mostly these people I'm talking about

title: Laboratory Convicts
text: The ones who are sentenced to death could be given a choice; either die, or let science use their body

title: Laboratory Convicts
text: I'm not suggesting that the testing should be painful or humiliating, the convicts would be treated kindly

title: Laboratory Convicts
text: It would be a great way to make up for the damage they've caused society

title: Laboratory Convicts
text: Why should murderers and rapists have a better life than little innocent animals? The tests should be performed on those who deserve it! The fact that something like that awaits you when you go to jail might make people more afraid, and not very eager to commit a crime

title: Laboratory Convicts
text: In this world, the jails are good

title: Laboratory Convicts
text: So good that some of the homeless people on the streets commit crimes just to have a roof over their head in the winter

title: Laboratory Convicts
text: I think that is absurd

title: Laboratory Convicts
text: The prison should be a dreaded place, a place you don't want to go to

title: Laboratory Convicts
text: But in our society I can understand that the crimelevel is very high, because you live a better life in jail

title: Laboratory Convicts
text: If we were to introduce this type of punishment, maybe it would discourage the minor criminals, and perhaps the major criminals too

title: Laboratory Convicts
text: Of course we will need animal testing as well

title: Laboratory Convicts
text: I have no problem with pharmaceutical use of the animals

title: Laboratory Convicts
text: It's the cosmetic tests I don't like

title: Laboratory Convicts
text: They pour mascara in the rabbit's eyes, force-feed the guinea pig with nailpolish, rub sunblock on the mice's backs and let them lay under a hot lamp until their skin boils

title: Laboratory Convicts
text: I love animals, it hurts me so much to know that they are suffering

title: Laboratory Convicts
text: These unnecessary tests could easily be done on convicts

title: Laboratory Convicts
text: Let them eat skinlotion and spray hairspray in their eyes

title: Laboratory Convicts
text: I'm for more severe punishments, and this is one of them

title: Laboratory Convicts
text: It sounds heartless, but think about what we are doing to the animals, if that isn't heartless, then what is? Next time you walk down that laboratory aisle, you may notice a big difference; the cages are almost all empty

title: Laboratory Convicts
text: And that's because the laboratories don't need as many animals as before

title: Laboratory Convicts
text: Thanks to the new project, millions of animals won't suffer, and the aisle won't be so eerie

title: Laboratory Convicts
The end of the monarchy
text: It is time to abolish the too long borne paradox of having a hereditary head of a democratic country like Sweden

title: The end of the monarchy
text: How can it be defended? As I see it, and as I will show here, there are no reasons why the monarchy should not be dismantled as soon as possible

title: The end of the monarchy
text: Firstly it is a hypocritical blot on our democratic to have a hereditary head of state

title: The end of the monarchy
text: Secondly it is stupefying not to recognise that the reasons for keeping it now are simply a romantic admiration for aristocracy and thirdly that there would be no damages or affections in a hypothetical dismantlement

title: The end of the monarchy
text: The most fundamental reason for abolishing the monarchy is of course the preposterousness of the post, as national and international representative for a democratic country, being hereditary

title: The end of the monarchy
text: It is a paradox which makes the entire democratic debate loose credibility

title: The end of the monarchy
text: The Swedish monarchy is of course no immediate threat to the democracy, but if no reasons are left for keeping it, then it seems strange not to follow the transition through

title: The end of the monarchy
text: Some may say that the monarch is only the ceremonial leader - but is it not a matter of principle rather than actual power, since the king/queen has no political influence anyway? This lack of power makes the monarchy superfluous

title: The end of the monarchy
text: Its uselessness and out-datedness can be seen through the screen of historic and fictional fascination, but in the real world this only leads to the kind of awkward position we are in today where a monarch without any power is still treated as superior because of old times sake

title: The end of the monarchy
text: In role-plays and fantasies- fine, but it does not belong in reality

title: The end of the monarchy
text: Keeping the monarchy shows a dullness and a stupidity

title: The end of the monarchy
text: I say stupidity, because what else has possessed us to keep it? It is kept due only to a romantic notion of an aristocratic system which has not been up to date since the dark ages and even then it symbolised tyranny and feudal repression

title: The end of the monarchy
text: It is time to take the step and admit that it no longer has a place in our society

title: The end of the monarchy
text: Being thus stupefying, the monarchy has nevertheless kept its foot in through this romantic want for tradition and perhaps also a misguided protectiveness towards the people

title: The end of the monarchy
text: But the truth is no one would really be affected, were the monarchy to repealed, except for the royal family itself, being deprived of the already humiliating task of cutting ribbons at openings, and parts of the older generation who enrich their lives with the latest society gossip

title: The end of the monarchy
text: The former might experience a passing feeling of being at a loss, but some representative commission could be organised for them as a transitional solution

title: The end of the monarchy
text: The latter group should be satisfied by all the new gossip ensuing from this upheaval of the family they associate themselves with to such an extent

title: The end of the monarchy
text: On the international level the results of an abolishment would be even pettier

title: The end of the monarchy
text: Seeing that these are very modest consequences, there is no real need for a substitute

title: The end of the monarchy
text: As far as international matters are concerned, the monarchs neutrality already limit him/her to dealing with humanity questions, something which could be handled by the appropriate minister

title: The end of the monarchy
text: In national matters the monarchs' role as ceremonial leader would have to go to either the prime-minister or some other (not necessarily political) Swedish authority, local or national, depending on the circumstances

title: The end of the monarchy
text: There reasons for abolishing the monarchy thus carries far greater weight than any arguments for keeping it

title: The end of the monarchy
text: There are, as I have shown, no defendable draw-backs to its dismantlement

title: The end of the monarchy
text: Getting rid of this hypocrisy would strengthen our moral conscience and amplify our belief in democracy

title: The end of the monarchy
text: Shall we allow a blot like this to make us if not liars, at least contradictory, simply because it is the way it has always been? The monarchy is long since outdated and remains now only as a romantic notion of past times

title: The end of the monarchy
text: It is not unreasonable to ask weather it is not time to take an active stand in the question of the monarchy's future and breaking the long passive acceptance of such a bizarre institution

title: The end of the monarchy
ABOLISH CAPITAL PUNISHMENT!
text: Even though we have now entered the 21th century the capital punishment is still being used in several parts of the world

title: ABOLISH CAPITAL PUNISHMENT!
text: Usually, this sentence is used when a murder has taken place (although, in some parts of the world, you can be sentenced to death for far less serious crimes), but what is such a penalty if not murder? Who gave us humans the right to decide over life and death? What exactly makes us think that we have the right to take another person's life? Some people might refer to the Bible, which confirms this kind of punishment

title: ABOLISH CAPITAL PUNISHMENT!
text: However, relying on the Bible may not be the best of decisions since it also considers it a right to sell your own children

title: ABOLISH CAPITAL PUNISHMENT!
text: We don't even know whether the Bible really is a historically correct production or just fiction

title: ABOLISH CAPITAL PUNISHMENT!
text: Even if it would turn out to be historically correct we can not follow the rules of a society that existed 2000 years ago

title: ABOLISH CAPITAL PUNISHMENT!
text: Today, many innocent people are sentenced to their death every year

title: ABOLISH CAPITAL PUNISHMENT!
text: In most cases the internee will not even be proven innocent until it's too late

title: ABOLISH CAPITAL PUNISHMENT!

EU - THE WORLD'S CHANCE FOR PEACE
text: In recent times the whole debate about Sweden's membership in the European Union has revived

title: EU - THE WORLD'S CHANCE FOR PEACE
text: The riot in Gothenburg in the beginning of this summer was only one of many expressions of this and how some people argue that Sweden should now leave the EU

title: EU - THE WORLD'S CHANCE FOR PEACE
text: The sad thing, though, is that the same people, who think they are fighting for democracy and against a control of a sovereign power, might actually be the ones who are the greatest danger against democracy in our country

title: EU - THE WORLD'S CHANCE FOR PEACE
text: The thirteenth of November 1994 Sweden decided, in a democratic way, that Sweden wanted to be a part of the European Union

title: EU - THE WORLD'S CHANCE FOR PEACE
text: So if now Sweden, through a democratic election, has come to the solution that we want to join the rest of Europe and together work for a better world

text: It's easy to be against something just for the sake of it

text: Out of this came the unity of nations that during history has changed its shape many times, but kept its core focus, and today is what we call the European Union

title: EU - THE WORLD'S CHANCE FOR PEACE
text: Through a political union of sovereign but united states Europe has the chance not just to hinder the outburst of war, but also to eradicate the very heart of conflict itself - division

title: EU - THE WORLD'S CHANCE FOR PEACE
text: I strongly believe that the European Union together with the United Nations is the strongest force at work today that is able and strong enough to be something of a key in the process of world peace

title: EU - THE WORLD'S CHANCE FOR PEACE
text: We must not forget that the two World Wars have taken place based on the European continent

title: EU - THE WORLD'S CHANCE FOR PEACE
text: Here the very force of evil itself has been centred

title: EU - THE WORLD'S CHANCE FOR PEACE
text: Surely the history has been cruel to Europe, but finally we seem to have learned from it

title: EU - THE WORLD'S CHANCE FOR PEACE
text: What was at that time caused by division can today be healed through unity

title: EU - THE WORLD'S CHANCE FOR PEACE
text: The European Union enables peace to be a reality and not just a good dream

title: EU - THE WORLD'S CHANCE FOR PEACE

Death Penalty - Legalized Murder
text: Death penalty is practised all over the world

title: Death Penalty - Legalized Murder
text: Half of the world is still using it as legal punishment

title: Death Penalty - Legalized Murder
text: It is mainly used in Asia and in Muslim countries but also in America

title: Death Penalty - Legalized Murder
text: There are many reasons why the death penalty should be abolished

title: Death Penalty - Legalized Murder
text: There are numerous arguments against the death penalty and it is difficult to point to any single fact or argument as the most important

title: Death Penalty - Legalized Murder
text: Below are a number of extremely valid reasons why the practice of capital punishment should be eradicated

title: Death Penalty - Legalized Murder
text: Capital punishment does not deter crime

title: Death Penalty - Legalized Murder
text: There are several scientific studies that has failed to demonstrate that executions deter people from committing crime

title: Death Penalty - Legalized Murder
text: People who commit crimes normally don't expect to get caught and therefore the threat of capital punishment hasn't got any deterrent effect

title: Death Penalty - Legalized Murder
text: If someone wants to commit a crime severe enough to result in a death sentence he/she would be most unlikely to regard any consequences of such an act

title: Death Penalty - Legalized Murder
text: Courts are unable to prevent accidental execution of innocent people

title: Death Penalty - Legalized Murder
text: On several occasions innocent prisoners have been executed

title: Death Penalty - Legalized Murder
text: There are countless cases where evidence has come up proving the executed person's innocence

title: Death Penalty - Legalized Murder
text: An execution is irrevocable and should absolutely not be carried through unless the evidences are hundred per cent positive

title: Death Penalty - Legalized Murder
text: Normally they never are

title: Death Penalty - Legalized Murder
text: It has occurred too many times that evidence or some witness has appeared after trial or in worse, after the sentence has been carried out

title: Death Penalty - Legalized Murder
text: Executions are sometimes torture

title: Death Penalty - Legalized Murder
text: Prisoners who have been executed in the electric chair (in the United States) sometimes didn't die immediately

title: Death Penalty - Legalized Murder
text: On some occasions the hair begun to burn or the eyes popped out of their heads

title: Death Penalty - Legalized Murder
text: It has happened several times that a prisoner's heartbeat has continued even after the power had been switched off Race plays a role in who gets the death sentence

title: Death Penalty - Legalized Murder
text: Death penalty discriminates

title: Death Penalty - Legalized Murder
text: If the victim is black or white often plays an important role of whom being charged with capital murder or receiving death penalty

title: Death Penalty - Legalized Murder
text: This means that those who murdered whites are more likely to be sentenced to death than those who murdered blacks

title: Death Penalty - Legalized Murder
text: It's also proven that black murderers killing a white person runs a higher risk of being executed than white killers murdering a black person

title: Death Penalty - Legalized Murder
text: Among the charged persons receiving a death sentence the majority are poor and they are usually members of an ethnic or religious minority

title: Death Penalty - Legalized Murder
text: Executions are very expensive

title: Death Penalty - Legalized Murder
text: It is actually more expensive to execute a prisoner than keep him/her imprisoned for life (which normally means 40 years)

title: Death Penalty - Legalized Murder
text: In Texas for example they can keep three persons in prison for life at the same costs as one execution

title: Death Penalty - Legalized Murder
text: The alternatives are preferable

title: Death Penalty - Legalized Murder
text: By ending a convict's life the state also eliminates the possibility of getting some important answers

title: Death Penalty - Legalized Murder
text: What is it that transforms a man into a killer? How has the convict been affected by his surroundings such as family, neighbourhood, work etc

title: Death Penalty - Legalized Murder
text: Maybe the answers would be to uncomfortable

title: Death Penalty - Legalized Murder
text: Perhaps they would point at social injustice and racial discrimination? Maybe a long-term psychological investigation in some cases would show that the perpetrator is also a victim

title: Death Penalty - Legalized Murder
text: Another argument for imprisonment instead of death is (maybe surprisingly) that it's an easy escape

title: Death Penalty - Legalized Murder
text: It's agonizing and maybe painful during a brief moment but then it's all over whereas imprisonment for life under poor conditions with no chance of ever getting out seems far worse

title: Death Penalty - Legalized Murder
text: Further, during the time of imprisonment convicts can be taught up as unskilled workers, giving them a chance to repay to society at least a small portion of the damage they've caused

title: Death Penalty - Legalized Murder
text: It's my firm conviction that the death penalty is neither a humane nor an effective way of dealing with crime

title: Death Penalty - Legalized Murder
text: It seems to me that this cruel punishment is a result of our desire of vengeance rather than to satisfy a need for justice and peace

title: Death Penalty - Legalized Murder
text: The death penalty is nothing but an evident confirmation of the old saying "violence begets violence"

text: The frequently repeated claim, that this reform would be too expensive for society, is easily countered by the fact that there is a considerable loss of public money on the large number of students who drop out of university - without completing their studies and thus getting their degrees - just in order to get jobs outright and be able to pay back their loans before they are eventually written off upon retiring

title: Relieve our burden!
text: In fact, there is a possibility that society as a whole would benefit from students getting grants instead of loans, when taking into account all the time that would be saved and better spent on successful studies instead of sheer anxiety

title: Relieve our burden!
text: There is no guessing as to how much time students spend on contemplating their outlook, and it goes without saying that much of this time could be put to better use

title: Relieve our burden!
text: Lastly, if students got grants instead of loans, this would probably encourage more people who lack an academic background to study at the university

title: Relieve our burden!
text: People who are, under the present system, afraid of taking loans would, with a generous grant-system, at least have a chance to see if university level studies have anything to offer, and in the long run perhaps level out the now existing, somewhat oblique recruitment to the university

title: Relieve our burden!
text: All this goes to show that society would almost certainly benefit a whole lot if students were given grants instead of loans to finance their studies

title: Relieve our burden!
text: The times have changed, and nowadays it is often a drawback to have spent several years at the university when considering how much money the average student owes the State and how many people can get a better-paid job without studying at the university

title: Relieve our burden!
text: This is hardly encouraging people to go to the university, which could, in the long run, be rather devastating to future academic achievements

title: Relieve our burden!
Why students should be given grants - not loans
text: To students money is of great importance, and in order to finance their studies at the university they must either have savings of their own or take loans - and by taking loans they commit theirselves to the life-long work of repaying them

title: Why students should be given grants - not loans
text: But if this was to be changed and students were to be given grants from the state government instead of loans, I believe that it would lead to great social improvments

title: Why students should be given grants - not loans
text: The grants would not necessarily have to be as large as the loans that are taken by the students today, but they should be sufficient enough to cover up for rent, books and some personal pleasures

title: Why students should be given grants - not loans
text: The most obvious and important reason to why students should be given grants is because it would give everybody - wealthy people as well as poor - a chance to further education

title: Why students should be given grants - not loans
text: In today's society the numbers of applications to the universities are decreasing, while at the same time the differences between social classes are increasing

title: Why students should be given grants - not loans
text: This shows that fewer young people can afford studying at a university and instead a lot of them choose a low-salary work, which does not require any education

title: Why students should be given grants - not loans
text: I believe that the prospect of future / life-long repayments is frightening to a lot of people and therefor they do not continue their educations

title: Why students should be given grants - not loans
text: For many people this is the question of fullfilling their dream or not

title: Why students should be given grants - not loans
text: In a democratic country like Sweden, the question of equal opportunity to education is of fundamental character

title: Why students should be given grants - not loans
text: A second and important reason is that a lot of professions in today's society require many years of studies at a university

title: Why students should be given grants - not loans
text: This means that huge loans must be taken - and repayed after the studies are finished

title: Why students should be given grants - not loans
text: In the future this may lead to difficulties in the society such as: Fewer applicants for these professions - which leads to a substantial lack of skilled labour

title: Why students should be given grants - not loans
text: Those who finish their studies may feel the need to repay their debts "as quickly as possible" and therefore overwork themselves, with stress and illnesses as result

title: Why students should be given grants - not loans
text: A third reason why students should be given grants is that it would give them the opportunity to try different educations at the university in order to find out which education that fits them the best

title: Why students should be given grants - not loans
text: That is, of course, possible today but the huge expenses associated with studying a few terms at each different education might be frightening, so instead many students apply for an education which they believe is "the right one" and continue with that one even though perhaps it was not the right one

title: Why students should be given grants - not loans
text: When reading this essay, one might argue that these grants would be just another great expense for the government, and of course that goes without saying

title: Why students should be given grants - not loans
text: But when considering the consequenses of "free" education and the equal opportunity for everybody to further education, I regard this expense as one well worth

title: Why students should be given grants - not loans
text: One of the problems that may appear is that more foreign students would apply for Swedish universities (because of the "free" studies), which would lead to harder competition for Swedish students

title: Why students should be given grants - not loans
text: But this could easily be regulated by some sort of legislation that would permit only Swedish students these grants

title: Why students should be given grants - not loans
text: Another aspect of this is, that an increasing number of foreign students would provide Swedish universities with a greater exchange of different cultures, languages and ideas

title: Why students should be given grants - not loans
text: Another problem could be that of students who tend to study their whole life (by changing courses and classes) and never reach an exam in order to enter working life

title: Why students should be given grants - not loans
text: But this could also be regulated by legislation which limited the number of years studying at a university

title: Why students should be given grants - not loans
text: As for the conclusion, I would like to point out the fact that everybody should have the same opportunity to further education

title: Why students should be given grants - not loans
text: In the society of today everyone is permitted to apply to the university, but the expenses that are associated with these studies make a lot of people hesitate

title: Why students should be given grants - not loans
text: I believe that the only way to ensure an educational system of equal opportunity is to ensure state funded grants

The insanity of monarchy
text: Sweden, a country that's been a democracy for almost a century

title: The insanity of monarchy
text: A country with a vivid peoples movement, with elections where over ninety percent of the population votes and with a domination of leftwing (supposed to be anti-royalist) governments for over sixty years - is a monarchy! And proud of it too! The people speaks highly of the beautiful and glamorous royal family and cheers happily and celebrates the monarch on his fiftieth birthday

title: The insanity of monarchy
text: Comparing this love of the royalties with the facts stated earlier you can't help but wonder: "How sane is this?"

title: The insanity of monarchy
text: The Swedish monarch only possess symbolic powers but still: The country has a chief of state that's not elected by the people

title: The insanity of monarchy
text: A fact that really should be distressing for most people but apparently isn't

title: The insanity of monarchy
text: Further, this person hasn't even chosen the job for himself, he or she has inherited it! If the monarch at least had been someone who had applied for or taken the post by a revolution, the people would at least know that the person who is the monarch actually wants to be a monarch and chief of state! Personally I can't imagine any other job in the Swedish society that one usually gets by inheriting it

title: The insanity of monarchy
text: That's probably mainly because of two reasons: First of all, it's impossible to judge from an infant if it's suitable for a certain job

title: The insanity of monarchy
text: And second: People in general prefers to make their own decisions considering their choice of carrier

title: The insanity of monarchy
text: People rarely feel good or do their best when being forced, most people tend to feel repressed by that

title: The insanity of monarchy
text: Considering this you can't help but feeling sympathy for this people who's forced to stand in the centre of attention as monarchs at all times

title: The insanity of monarchy
text: Being a monarch is probably a tough job and here this people are, with no choice but taking the job on! Another thing to consider is what the monarch and his, and in the future her, family cost the Swedish society

title: The insanity of monarchy
text: A society that's running under an increasingly tight budget and can do without the costs of the royal family

title: The insanity of monarchy
text: Think about all the parties that's being held in the honour of the royal family and what about the expenses involving the castles, education in foreign countries, security, expensive clothes a s o

title: The insanity of monarchy
text: Most of this is paid with the peoples tax money which is not reasonable

title: The insanity of monarchy
text: What do the Swedish society and the monarchs gain from this ancient system then? The Swedish society is awarded with a lot of publicity since royalties often is considered exotic in countries that don't have them

title: The insanity of monarchy
text: This publicity might generate some income through tourists and maybe ocasionally a Swedish company can be helped by this attention to get an order from a foreign company

title: The insanity of monarchy
text: To a certain extent they also play a unifying role within the country

title: The insanity of monarchy
text: Cultural symbols that help Sweden and it's inhibitors to withhold their national identity

title: The insanity of monarchy
text: What the monarchs gain is obvious: a lot of money, nice houses and the people's love

title: The insanity of monarchy
text: But seriously, wouldn't Sweden and the royal family be better off if the people had the power to elect or choose the person who possess the post of chief of state? In other words: a president? First of all, we would then get someone for chief of state who really wanted and had fought for the job

title: The insanity of monarchy
text: We also would get someone that would be educated, skilled and hopefully have talents that suited the job

title: The insanity of monarchy
text: Seriously, how well suited is our current king for the job as king? From a democratic view an end of monarchy would be a great victory that would put an end to a system that's kind of romantic but belonging to another era - Monarchs don't belong in democratic countries, elected presidents do! And last but not least: the persons that now are bound to be monarchs for the rest of their lives could start leading their own lives as people of free will

title: The insanity of monarchy
text: With all these arguments and facts given above, you have to agree when I say that the fact that Sweden still is a monarchy and loving it, is totally and absolutely insane and have to join in when I say "The monarchy is dead! Long live the republic!"

title: My thoughts about homosexuals right to adoption
text: A while ago I read an article in Dagens Nyheter in which six major Swedish political youth associations made a statement in the matter about whether or not homosexual couples should be allowed to adopt children

title: My thoughts about homosexuals right to adoption
text: The chairmen of the six major political youth parties all agreed that homosexuals should have the same rights as heterosexuals when it comes to adopting children

title: My thoughts about homosexuals right to adoption
text: They also thought that adoption by homosexuals should be allowed in Sweden

title: My thoughts about homosexuals right to adoption
text: I found this a bit awkward since my own opinion about the matter differs very much from what seems to be what most people in my age believes according to the news paper

title: My thoughts about homosexuals right to adoption
text: My intentions are to shed light on this matter and also clarify my own opinion

title: My thoughts about homosexuals right to adoption
text: It feels like the question about whether or not homosexuals should be allowed adoption of children other than their own is just another bump in the road on the way to total equality in the Swedish society

title: My thoughts about homosexuals right to adoption
text: We seem to strive so badly for equality that no one can really see the problems a "little" issue like this one can cause in the future

title: My thoughts about homosexuals right to adoption
text: To me this is scary

title: My thoughts about homosexuals right to adoption
text: It's obvious that we have to fight against oppression and prejudices, however it's wrong to use children as tools to reach our goals, furthermore to solve our problems at their expense

title: My thoughts about homosexuals right to adoption
text: Homosexual couples need to accept that they are different when it comes to the human procreative faculty

title: My thoughts about homosexuals right to adoption
text: Since they would not be able to produce children under any natural circumstances they should not qualify as adoptive parents

title: My thoughts about homosexuals right to adoption
text: But what about heterosexual adoptive parents, why should they be able to adopt? Well, since they theoretically would be able to have their own children they should have right to adopt, and they have

title: My thoughts about homosexuals right to adoption
text: It's a shame that most of the criticism against homosexuals' right to adopt children is neglected because it is said to be pure homophobia

title: My thoughts about homosexuals right to adoption
text: People should pay more attention to the criticism and examine it's content to gather information about the matter before making up their minds

title: My thoughts about homosexuals right to adoption
text: It's hard to tell what kind of problems a child who will grow up with homosexual parents will suffer from, if there will be any problems at all

title: My thoughts about homosexuals right to adoption
text: Surely we can think that an adoption in any form is for the best of the child, if the parents are accepted as adoptive parents and so on, because the child will most likely have a better childhood

title: My thoughts about homosexuals right to adoption
text: But the childhood of a child whose parents are homosexuals will most definitely be a tough one

title: My thoughts about homosexuals right to adoption
text: The ones in the Swedish society who differs a little bit from the average are often social outcasts, more or less, especially during the school age

title: My thoughts about homosexuals right to adoption
text: Therefore there's a risk that a child whose both parents are of the same sexual gender will have an unpleasant youth

title: My thoughts about homosexuals right to adoption
text: Most people are clever enough to realize that a child with homosexual parents will most likely be bullied for it sometime during its childhood

title: My thoughts about homosexuals right to adoption
text: Some people say that everybody should have the same rights no matter what

title: My thoughts about homosexuals right to adoption
text: In other words: of course homosexuals should be able to get married and have children as well as heterosexuals

title: My thoughts about homosexuals right to adoption
text: Thoughts like these don't pay any regards to the children what so ever

title: My thoughts about homosexuals right to adoption
text: If we want to know the children's point of view we either accept adoption by homosexuals or take a look at countries were it's already frequent

title: My thoughts about homosexuals right to adoption
text: Then, if the majority of the children adopted by homosexuals feel as good as children with heterosexual parents while a minority is suffering from different problems, is it defendable to accept adoption by homosexuals? I find it terrifying that a great deal of political youth associations in Sweden are so convinced about what is right in a matter were I and many others totally disagree

title: My thoughts about homosexuals right to adoption
text: I find it reasonable to let homosexuals adopt each others children, as in letting ones partner be guardian of children from earlier heterosexual relationships

title: My thoughts about homosexuals right to adoption
text: But I don't think that a homosexual couple should be able to adopt other children than their own, it's a totally different matter

title: My thoughts about homosexuals right to adoption
text: The chance of the children getting hurt is too great

title: My thoughts about homosexuals right to adoption
text: I think the matter should be put on hold for a while until we know more about the alternative damages it might cause

Echelon - Eavesdroppers Galore
text: Privacy, freedom of speech and freedom of opinion are some of the most jealously guarded rights of people in democratic countries all over the world

title: Echelon - Eavesdroppers Galore
text: Democratic governments, at least those in the 'western' world, are presumed by their citizens to adhere to those basic principles of democracy

title: Echelon - Eavesdroppers Galore
text: Citizens who have suggested that 'Big Brother is watching us', have generally been dismissed as paranoid conspiracy theorists

title: Echelon - Eavesdroppers Galore
text: As it turns out, they may not have been too far from the truth

title: Echelon - Eavesdroppers Galore
text: The last few years have shown news items about a global spy network, nicknamed Echelon, operated by the US National Security Agency with the co-operation of the UK, Canada, New Zealand and Australia

title: Echelon - Eavesdroppers Galore
text: Echelon is a fully automated intercept and relaying network that listens for certain keywords and catch phrases in Internet and telephone traffic, satellite communications and radio transmissions

title: Echelon - Eavesdroppers Galore
text: If a transmission contains a keyword that the system is set to look for, it will be forwarded to a human operator for further scrutiny

title: Echelon - Eavesdroppers Galore
text: The system was originally devised to gather signal intelligence from the east bloc during the cold war, but has grown enormously in scope since that time

title: Echelon - Eavesdroppers Galore
text: It can be used today for completely different tasks, including industrial, financial, and political espionage against virtually every nation, business or individual on earth that has access to a communications network of some kind

title: Echelon - Eavesdroppers Galore
text: The inherent dangers to such a system should be evident

title: Echelon - Eavesdroppers Galore
text: The dangers lie not so much in the way Echelon is used today (although it is hard to determine the extent of its use; the nations involved are very secretive about its functions and how they use it), but in how it could be used

title: Echelon - Eavesdroppers Galore
text: Claims are being made that the five nations trade intelligence information gathered through Echelon with each other, to the extent that they actually spy on one another's citizens

title: Echelon - Eavesdroppers Galore
text: In effect, this would mean that in the case of the NSA, the fourth amendment to the constitution of the United States has been completely bypassed

title: Echelon - Eavesdroppers Galore
text: A citizen of the United States should not be subject to investigation unless there is probable cause, and even then, he should not be subject to a search of his person or premises, nor should he be tapped unless so ordered by a court of law

title: Echelon - Eavesdroppers Galore
text: Echelon taps everybody, all the time, and there is no one to turn to with complaints

title: Echelon - Eavesdroppers Galore
text: The NSA does not spy on its country's citizens, but e

title: Echelon - Eavesdroppers Galore
text: g

title: Echelon - Eavesdroppers Galore
text: the UK does

title: Echelon - Eavesdroppers Galore
text: The UK then shares the information with the NSA, leaving the issue of legal jurisdiction muddled

title: Echelon - Eavesdroppers Galore
text: Should these allegations of crimes against the constitutional safeguards prove correct, one could argue that the totalitarian system of government in Orwell's '1984' is unpleasantly close

title: Echelon - Eavesdroppers Galore
text: We might not be controlled by Big Brother yet, but there are alarming tendencies

title: Echelon - Eavesdroppers Galore
text: The only way to foil the Echelon network is to encrypt any and all information that is transmitted electronically

title: Echelon - Eavesdroppers Galore
text: Strong cryptography is essential for online privacy

title: Echelon - Eavesdroppers Galore
text: The best known cryptographic software available to private consumers is PGP, Pretty Good Privacy, written by American programmer Phil Zimmerman

title: Echelon - Eavesdroppers Galore
text: PGP is free, easy to use, and offers good privacy for Internet communications

title: Echelon - Eavesdroppers Galore
text: When Zimmerman first released PGP to the public, he was sued by the American government on the charge that releasing such strong cryptographic software to the enemies of the United States was a threat to national security

title: Echelon - Eavesdroppers Galore
text: The charges were eventually dropped, but the international version of PGP does not offer as strong cryptography as the one for use in America and Canada

title: Echelon - Eavesdroppers Galore
Echelon - Eavesdroppers Galore
text: Apparently, the NSA does not wish to be impeded in its eavesdropping

title: Echelon - Eavesdroppers Galore
text: Echelon is designed specifically to eavesdrop on everyone that uses any form of electronic communication

title: Echelon - Eavesdroppers Galore
text: Its operators seem to be less than interested in following the laws of their respective countries

title: Echelon - Eavesdroppers Galore
text: It is a serious threat to individual as well as corporate privacy

title: Echelon - Eavesdroppers Galore
text: Should the allegations currently lodged against the Echelon operators turn out to be true, the only right thing to do is to move for immediate termination of the network in its current form

title: Echelon - Eavesdroppers Galore
text: The violation of privacy inherent in the system far outweighs any advantage

title: Echelon - Eavesdroppers Galore
