OLD PEOPLE'S HOMES - GOOD OR BAD?
text: The last couple of months we have heard reports concerning negligence of our elders who live in old people's homes

title: OLD PEOPLE'S HOMES - GOOD OR BAD?
text: We have read frightening stories in the newspaper where people haven't been taken care of properly

title: OLD PEOPLE'S HOMES - GOOD OR BAD?
text: Sometimes this have even led to death

title: OLD PEOPLE'S HOMES - GOOD OR BAD?
text: What can be done to improve the situation? How can we make the elders feel more secure? The scene is often that nurses and doctors are very busy

title: OLD PEOPLE'S HOMES - GOOD OR BAD?
text: They tend to have many people to take car of on a work day which can lead to that some elders don't get that much attention

title: OLD PEOPLE'S HOMES - GOOD OR BAD?
text: If an old person's needs aren't being taken care of, he or she may feel isolated and cut out from the outside world

title: OLD PEOPLE'S HOMES - GOOD OR BAD?
text: One also has to take into account that it may be difficult for them to express their feelings about a certain situation due to any illnesses or other problems

title: OLD PEOPLE'S HOMES - GOOD OR BAD?
text: Newly employed staff have in many cases not managed to ease the amount of work load that is required of them

title: OLD PEOPLE'S HOMES - GOOD OR BAD?
text: One of the reasons is of course that more people are getting older these days and that it is hard to take care of everyone's needs

title: OLD PEOPLE'S HOMES - GOOD OR BAD?
text: So how are the nurses supposed to know what a certain person's needs are if he or she is unable to tell what is really on his or her mind? Can we avoid cases where people suffer from malnurishment or negligence? This is why it would be better for the elderly if they could be taken care of by their own family

title: OLD PEOPLE'S HOMES - GOOD OR BAD?
text: They would then find themselves in the center of attention where everyone is looking out for their best interest

title: OLD PEOPLE'S HOMES - GOOD OR BAD?
text: They need to live in an environment where they know that someone cares and have the time for them and also where they feel that they belong

title: OLD PEOPLE'S HOMES - GOOD OR BAD?
text: Of course the family knows best what their special needs are and how to make them feel able to cope with what old age has in store

title: OLD PEOPLE'S HOMES - GOOD OR BAD?
text: Another good thing by having the family close by is in case they experience pain

text: The family would do everything to help ease it even if it might take a lot of time and effort

title: OLD PEOPLE'S HOMES - GOOD OR BAD?
text: If one compares this way of living to that of having an appartment at an old people's home this is of course a much better solution for the individual

title: OLD PEOPLE'S HOMES - GOOD OR BAD?
text: It would hopefully minimize boredom and loneliness that they may have experienced earlier to a great extent

title: OLD PEOPLE'S HOMES - GOOD OR BAD?

GIVE THE STUDENTS GRANTS - NOT LOANS
text: Students in most countries have to take loans to finance their university studies

title: GIVE THE STUDENTS GRANTS - NOT LOANS
text: In Sweden we have free education, but students still have to take loans to be able to pay for rent, food, course literature etc

title: GIVE THE STUDENTS GRANTS - NOT LOANS
text: during their time at university

title: GIVE THE STUDENTS GRANTS - NOT LOANS
text: As a result the newly graduated students start their working lives with considerable debts to the state

title: GIVE THE STUDENTS GRANTS - NOT LOANS
text: Is this really to everyone's best? I do not think so

title: GIVE THE STUDENTS GRANTS - NOT LOANS
text: In my opinion it would be more beneficial, not only to the individual, but also to our whole society, if students were given grants instead of loans

title: GIVE THE STUDENTS GRANTS - NOT LOANS
text: Firstly, I think that there is a risk that the current system conserves inequality

title: GIVE THE STUDENTS GRANTS - NOT LOANS
text: Not all people get the same opportunity to get an academic education

title: GIVE THE STUDENTS GRANTS - NOT LOANS
text: Let us have a look at the situation in Sweden today

title: GIVE THE STUDENTS GRANTS - NOT LOANS
text: To get a 'Master of Arts' degree you have to study for at least four years

title: GIVE THE STUDENTS GRANTS - NOT LOANS
text: You then owe the state approximately 170

title: GIVE THE STUDENTS GRANTS - NOT LOANS
text: 000 kronor, which you must start to pay back once you have finished your studies and started working

title: GIVE THE STUDENTS GRANTS - NOT LOANS
text: With this future in mind there is a rather strong risk that people from certain groups choose not to study at all

title: GIVE THE STUDENTS GRANTS - NOT LOANS
text: For example, I believe that people from families without an educational tradition hesitate to study when they have to finance their studies on their own, while people from academic families tend to see the education as an investment

title: GIVE THE STUDENTS GRANTS - NOT LOANS
text: Another discriminated group is the large amount of people who, from different reasons, want or need to start their studies relatively late in life

title: GIVE THE STUDENTS GRANTS - NOT LOANS
text: If you start your studies late you have less time to pay back your loans

title: GIVE THE STUDENTS GRANTS - NOT LOANS
text: Thus you have to pay a larger part each month

title: GIVE THE STUDENTS GRANTS - NOT LOANS
text: In many cases this might be such a big burden that you choose not to study at all

title: GIVE THE STUDENTS GRANTS - NOT LOANS
text: Moreover, we live in a world that changes fast

title: GIVE THE STUDENTS GRANTS - NOT LOANS
text: It is often claimed that in the future we will have to be more flexible

title: GIVE THE STUDENTS GRANTS - NOT LOANS
text: Because of the continuously changing needs of society we may have to change occupation at least once in our lives, often with a need of retraining as a result

title: GIVE THE STUDENTS GRANTS - NOT LOANS
text: Apart from what I have already mentioned about greater economical pressure when you take loans at a higher age, this also means that people might have to take loans for more than one education, again with the possible consequence of people choosing not to study

title: GIVE THE STUDENTS GRANTS - NOT LOANS
text: As mentioned above, I believe that a change of systems would benefit our society

title: GIVE THE STUDENTS GRANTS - NOT LOANS
text: If people choose not to study we run a risk of lacking people with certain professions

title: GIVE THE STUDENTS GRANTS - NOT LOANS
text: Knowing that your studies will result in great debts may be all right if you know that they also will lead to a well-paid job

title: GIVE THE STUDENTS GRANTS - NOT LOANS
text: There are, however, lot of professions that require rather high education, but are not well paid at all

title: GIVE THE STUDENTS GRANTS - NOT LOANS
text: One example of this is the teachers

title: GIVE THE STUDENTS GRANTS - NOT LOANS
text: What education will our children get if we do not have enough teachers? What is more, we need an educated and competent population to be able to compete properly in the fast development of science and technology in the world

title: GIVE THE STUDENTS GRANTS - NOT LOANS
text: Leading companies in Sweden claim that they already have a lack of educated personnel

title: GIVE THE STUDENTS GRANTS - NOT LOANS
text: We need people to study, and this does not only mean the young ones and people from families with academic traditions

title: GIVE THE STUDENTS GRANTS - NOT LOANS
text: In my opinion the only way to increase the number of students is to give them grants instead of loans

title: GIVE THE STUDENTS GRANTS - NOT LOANS
text: It can be argued that giving grant to students will be too expensive

title: GIVE THE STUDENTS GRANTS - NOT LOANS
text: However, we have to look at this in relation to the costs of a population without sufficient education

title: GIVE THE STUDENTS GRANTS - NOT LOANS
text: As the employers nowadays want more qualified employees, it becomes more and more difficult to get a job without a university degree

title: GIVE THE STUDENTS GRANTS - NOT LOANS
text: This might lead to severe costs for unemployment if we cannot rise the average level of education

title: GIVE THE STUDENTS GRANTS - NOT LOANS
text: To sum up, I believe it is time to rethink and revalue the importance of education

title: GIVE THE STUDENTS GRANTS - NOT LOANS
text: We do not only study for our own benefits

title: GIVE THE STUDENTS GRANTS - NOT LOANS
text: More important is the need of an educated population in our society

title: GIVE THE STUDENTS GRANTS - NOT LOANS
Smoking ban in restaurants, cafés and bars
text: Smoking is no longer a smokers own business

title: Smoking ban in restaurants, cafés and bars
text: It has shown after several researches that passive smoking is almost as unhealthy as smoking a cigarette

title: Smoking ban in restaurants, cafés and bars
text: Everyone should have the possibility to enjoy a smoke-free environment

title: Smoking ban in restaurants, cafés and bars
text: Most places which are exposed to a lot of smoke are restaurants, cafés and bars where innocent non-smokers inhale the smoke

title: Smoking ban in restaurants, cafés and bars
text: Jobs in the food and beverage industry includes late hours and a smoky environment

title: Smoking ban in restaurants, cafés and bars
text: If one could prevent the smoky working environment jobs in restaurants, cafés and bars would become more attractive

title: Smoking ban in restaurants, cafés and bars
text: This would be favouring the catering trade

title: Smoking ban in restaurants, cafés and bars
text: The food and beverage sector have always had a high turnover rate

title: Smoking ban in restaurants, cafés and bars
text: This change could lead to an improvement in the restaurant's recruiting-problem

title: Smoking ban in restaurants, cafés and bars
text: Since they could offer healthier working conditions

title: Smoking ban in restaurants, cafés and bars
text: The furniture in restaurants would last longer if they were not reeking with smoke and full of burn-marks from cigarettes

title: Smoking ban in restaurants, cafés and bars
text: Restaurants could cut costs for new furniture purchases or having the furniture frequently re-covered

title: Smoking ban in restaurants, cafés and bars
text: In regards to the cleaning issues the catering trade will save plenty of time when cleaning the floors which normally are covered in butts

title: Smoking ban in restaurants, cafés and bars
text: The washing-up would also be easier if there are no ashtrays and butts in glasses and on plates

title: Smoking ban in restaurants, cafés and bars
text: The restaurants, cafés and bars would increase the sale of snacks since the smokers can not light a cigarette after dinner and have to order snacks or perhaps a dessert to prevent their restlessness

title: Smoking ban in restaurants, cafés and bars
text: Purchases of ashtrays are not necessary

title: Smoking ban in restaurants, cafés and bars
text: The guests of the restaurants would be more satisfied when they are walking home with lovely smelling clothes, and not as the present situation, when clothes are reeking from cigarettes

title: Smoking ban in restaurants, cafés and bars
text: A smoking ban would not only favour the catering trade but also the society

title: Smoking ban in restaurants, cafés and bars
text: For many people smoking is an activity they do when they are socialising with other smokers in restaurants and bars

title: Smoking ban in restaurants, cafés and bars
text: The prohibition of smoking would decrease the "social smoking" in public places and could also result in an increasing number of non-smokers

title: Smoking ban in restaurants, cafés and bars
text: The society would be able to save costs spent on smoke related diseases

title: Smoking ban in restaurants, cafés and bars
text: The allergy sufferers would perhaps not have any symptoms of the allergy if they were not exposed to smoke in public places and therefor many hospital visits could be avoided

title: Smoking ban in restaurants, cafés and bars
text: Of course it exists counter arguments

title: Smoking ban in restaurants, cafés and bars
text: The government receives a lot of taxes from the cigarette sales and a prohibition of smoking in restaurants, cafés and bar could decrease the sale and would therefore decrease the amount of taxes to the government

title: Smoking ban in restaurants, cafés and bars
text: But the money the government spends on medical cost related to smoke disease would probably exceed the money collected from taxes

title: Smoking ban in restaurants, cafés and bars
text: Some smokers argue that it is their right to smoke if they want to

title: Smoking ban in restaurants, cafés and bars
text: But when it is proved that passive-smokers also run the risk of getting diseases related to smoke, it is no longer the smokers own decision

title: Smoking ban in restaurants, cafés and bars
text: The present situation makes it difficult for certain people

title: Smoking ban in restaurants, cafés and bars
text: Instead of having a smoke ban in restaurants and letting the smokers go outside when they feel tempted to smoke, they keep out allergy sufferer, pregnant women and people who can not put up with smoke

title: Smoking ban in restaurants, cafés and bars
text: Restaurants make small attempts to have smoke-free areas for the people who can not stand smoke

title: Smoking ban in restaurants, cafés and bars
text: But it is difficult to shut out smoke from one room/corner to another

title: Smoking ban in restaurants, cafés and bars
text: The smoke still bother the people in the designated non-smoking areas

title: Smoking ban in restaurants, cafés and bars
text: The city of Vancouver in Canada initiated the ban of smoking in western Canada three years ago

title: Smoking ban in restaurants, cafés and bars
text: It is still an issue under debate, since the people have not gotten used to it yet

title: Smoking ban in restaurants, cafés and bars
text: Spending two weeks in Vancouver gave a deeper insight of the smoking ban

title: Smoking ban in restaurants, cafés and bars
text: Barowners argue that they have lost sales because people visits the bar less, since they can not enjoy a cigarette while having a drink

title: Smoking ban in restaurants, cafés and bars
text: However, in the long run people will become used to the idea of smoke-free bars

title: Smoking ban in restaurants, cafés and bars
text: Since Sweden is such a health conscious country the idea to ban smoking in restaurants, bars and cafés should come as no surprise to the Swedish population

title: Smoking ban in restaurants, cafés and bars
Mars-A giant leap for mankind
text: Since the beginning of mankind we have always been curious and ready to endure extreme ordeals to discover new worlds

title: Mars-A giant leap for mankind
text: Take early explorers like the Vikings

title: Mars-A giant leap for mankind
text: They went out from Scandinavia as far away as the center of Russia to the East, as far as Greece to the South and all the way to North America in the West

title: Mars-A giant leap for mankind
text: Consider all expeditions to remote areas such as Antarctica, Mount Everest and the bottom of the oceans, to name but a few

title: Mars-A giant leap for mankind
text: We have thoroughly explored this planet, more than thirty years have passed since we set foot on the moon

title: Mars-A giant leap for mankind
text: It's high time for mankind to conquer our nearest neighbor in the planetary system: Mars

title: Mars-A giant leap for mankind
text: That's why I propose a large scale commitment to a manned mission to Mars

title: Mars-A giant leap for mankind
text: Let us establish a permanent colony on Mars! Sending a mission to Mars to establish the first extraterrestrial colony in the history of man would truly be an enormous project

title: Mars-A giant leap for mankind
text: Something like the 60's great Lunar Project in the USA

title: Mars-A giant leap for mankind
text: Though, what I'm proposing isn't a one-nation effort, but instead a project to engage the entire world community

title: Mars-A giant leap for mankind
text: A mission to Mars would be a giant project, and that means more cooperation among nations

title: Mars-A giant leap for mankind
text: The more people of different origin cooperates, the greater the possibility becomes of them recognizing their similarities rather than their differences, thus promoting understanding between the peoples of the world

title: Mars-A giant leap for mankind
text: In this respect a project like this can actually act as a preserver of peace, much like the cooperation among European countries in the European Union

title: Mars-A giant leap for mankind
text: Another aspect of the project has to do with the environment

title: Mars-A giant leap for mankind
text: Just like when man got his first view of Earth from the moon, I think that a settlement on Mars could open our eyes to see what a small and fragile planet we live on

title: Mars-A giant leap for mankind
text: I believe a new perspective on our planet would spark renewed effort to save it

title: Mars-A giant leap for mankind
text: As has been stated in recent years, saving the environment is a global issue

title: Mars-A giant leap for mankind
text: The new network of decision makers involved in the Mars effort would probably be of great help in finding new ways of cooperation in this issue as well

title: Mars-A giant leap for mankind
text: At this stage you might say, 'Hey, wait a minute, isn't this going to be unimaginably expensive? Won't a project like this divert scare resources from other important areas like healthcare, schools and the environment?' Firstly, I think that we must accept that an undertaking of this size will always cost a lot of money

title: Mars-A giant leap for mankind
text: However, I believe that it must be seen in contrast to the achievement

title: Mars-A giant leap for mankind
text: It is not possible to put a price tag on forwarding the boundaries of human civilization

title: Mars-A giant leap for mankind
text: Secondly, the money and other resources spent on this project would not be wasted

title: Mars-A giant leap for mankind
text: Great amounts of money would be spent on research that in the long run would benefit, not only the Mars effort, but also all sorts of different industries

title: Mars-A giant leap for mankind
text: An illustrative example from the Lunar Project is the new material: Gore-Tex

title: Mars-A giant leap for mankind
text: This material was first developed by NASA to be used in space

title: Mars-A giant leap for mankind
text: Later it has become an enormous industry with a multitude of products in a wide range of areas, such as ski clothing and artificial blood vessels

title: Mars-A giant leap for mankind
text: Finally, spending money on research would benefit education

title: Mars-A giant leap for mankind
text: More students would become interested in natural science and higher education in general

title: Mars-A giant leap for mankind
text: That would further promote hi-tech industries, which in turn would help raise productivity levels in the future

title: Mars-A giant leap for mankind
text: So schools and education would not loose recourses because of this project, quite the contrary

title: Mars-A giant leap for mankind
text: When summarizing the arguments, I recognize three different points of importance: First, our nature as explorers

title: Mars-A giant leap for mankind
text: Establishing outposts in space is the next natural step in the evolution of human civilization

title: Mars-A giant leap for mankind
text: Second, the 'unifying project

title: Mars-A giant leap for mankind
text: ' I visualize the project as being something that could help us humans to gain new insights and realize that we live on a small fragile planet, something to help save the environment and keep peace

title: Mars-A giant leap for mankind
text: Third, the economical argument

title: Mars-A giant leap for mankind
text: Whether or not the project would be profitable depends, I suspect, on how you define profitable

title: Mars-A giant leap for mankind
text: Personally I argue that there would be enormous synergy effects form this project and that the money would be well spent

title: Mars-A giant leap for mankind
text: In the end I would give the project an 'all systems go for launch

Why hunting is necessary
text: A never-ending discussion in Sweden these days is the question whether it is right to kill and eat animals

title: Why hunting is necessary
text: In the centre of this discussion is the production animals such as cattle, pigs and poultry

title: Why hunting is necessary
text: I am going to concentrate on another debate, a little more peripheral, which concerns the game and our right to hunt and kill it

title: Why hunting is necessary
text: Hunting has a long history in human evolution

title: Why hunting is necessary
text: We were hunters long before we became farmers

title: Why hunting is necessary
text: Today no one has to hunt to survive though

title: Why hunting is necessary
text: Instead hunters are often seen as a bunch of merciless murderers (primarily men) who kills innocent animals for their own pleasure

title: Why hunting is necessary
text: Even people who eat meat themselves can ask me how I can stand killing an animal in cold blood

title: Why hunting is necessary
text: The irony of that question sometimes makes me want to laugh since it is my opinion that all humans participate in killing the animals they eat

title: Why hunting is necessary
text: The only difference is that I, as a hunter, do it openly

title: Why hunting is necessary
text: One of the problems all hunters including me have is that we do it for fun

title: Why hunting is necessary
text: There is no denying it

title: Why hunting is necessary
text: For people who do not know hunting this may seem to be the same as enjoy killing

title: Why hunting is necessary
text: Before anything else this has to be straightened out

title: Why hunting is necessary
text: The killing of the game is only an extremely short moment of the whole hunt

title: Why hunting is necessary
text: The lifestyle of hunters includes so much more

title: Why hunting is necessary
text: I have a friend who crawled around on his stomach for several hours just so he could get a chance to shoot a goose

title: Why hunting is necessary
text: He failed and had to go home empty handed

title: Why hunting is necessary
text: If his only interest had been killing he could have chosen something easier to hunt

title: Why hunting is necessary
text: Bringing up a dog, watching it grow and training it to be able to use it as a hunting partner someday is also a part of many hunters life which involves no killing

title: Why hunting is necessary
text: Enjoying hunting may be an emotionally important issue in this debate, but practically there is something more important

title: Why hunting is necessary
text: While humans has taken over the land and used it for farming the predators in our land, bears and wolves for example, has been almost extinct

title: Why hunting is necessary
text: In many parts of Sweden there are no natural enemies left to balance the numbers of our bigger games such as elk and roe deer

title: Why hunting is necessary
text: Hunting is therefore an important part of the game-preserving

title: Why hunting is necessary
text: Economically it is very important because of the damages that wild animals make to the growing forests

title: Why hunting is necessary
text: Keeping an even and not to big fauna is also necessary to control different diseases, which can be spread both to humans and dogs

title: Why hunting is necessary
text: Practical and economical reasons are easy to discuss

title: Why hunting is necessary
text: The ethical part whether it is right or wrong to kill animals for food is harder

title: Why hunting is necessary
text: Personally I think we have that right

title: Why hunting is necessary
text: It has to be under good conditions though

title: Why hunting is necessary
text: In the society we live in today economy determines a lot of things and the value of a good life often comes in second hand, not only for animals, but in some cases even for humans

title: Why hunting is necessary
text: That is why hunting is very important for me

title: Why hunting is necessary
text: The animals I hunt have, for good or bad, lived their lives as natural as possible

title: Why hunting is necessary
text: My biggest responsibility is to kill them as clean as possible

title: Why hunting is necessary
text: That responsibility seems to be too much for some people to handle

title: Why hunting is necessary
text: There are always going to be persons who hurt animals when hunting because they are careless

title: Why hunting is necessary
text: The majority of the hunters in Sweden have a good education and a lot of common sense and care for their game, as they should

title: Why hunting is necessary
text: Personally I only hunt animals that I eat, but I do not object to people who doesn't follow this

title: Why hunting is necessary
text: The increase of tourist and business hunting frightens me because I am afraid those persons may not always have the right knowledge that is required for safe hunting

title: Why hunting is necessary
text: This argumentation will probably not convince the real anti hunters but I hope it can spread some light for the common people who never been in touch with the lifestyle of the hunters

title: Why hunting is necessary

text: Indeed we would be forced to deal with more bicycle crashes but they are rarely mortal

text: Thousand of lives would be saved

text: Eventually even the production in society would increase

text: If everybody were exposed to fresh air for half an hour each day before work, they would become much happier and could be able to work harder and more focused

title: Park your car
text: We would become much more creative at our jobs and in our spare time if we saw more of our town and nature every day of the year

title: Park your car
text: Today much talk is about thinking in environmental aspects

text: I believe we would feel pretty good with ourselves when we knew that each day we contributed to a cleaner world

text: However some new problems would occur in a bicycle dominated world

text: Many bicyclists today do not follow traffic rules

text: There is a possibility that some sort of traffic anarchy could be the result if too many bikes covered the streets

text: This should not have to be a problem if bicyclists were informed of their responsibilities against each other

text: When the number of the cars in the cities would be dropping the cyclists could move to the streets and since a bike is so much smaller than a car the expected chaos would probably never occur

title: Park your car
text: Another problem that many people would complain about is the fact that one cannot really pack so much things on a bike

text: This is really a problem if you have the habit of buying food on your way home from work

title: Park your car
text: We solve this with the cycle cart

title: Park your car
text: Do you not feel tempted to let your car be tomorrow morning? Think about all the things you can do for the money you will save

title: Park your car
text: Think about the nature you saves and think about all the fresh air you would be exposed to

title: Park your car
text: Naturally there would be some problems if we left our cars, but the arguments for the bicycle is so heavy that at least my car will be left in its garage tomorrow

title: Park your car
text: My advise is to dust of your bike, fill the tires with air and get out and stretch your legs

title: Park your car
Stop smoking!
text: Did you know that tobacco is one of the most common causes of premature death? Only in Sweden 8 000 persons every year die of diseases caused by smoking

title: Stop smoking!
text: Do you want to be a number in these statistics or do you want to get free from the devil that poisons your body? You may say that you cannot stop smoking, but I wonder why

title: Stop smoking!
text: Is it just because it is an old, bad habit, or do you actually like inhaling toxins, just as I once did? But, at last I did stop, and I will try to convince you in the following few paragraphs that you can gain a lot by stop smoking

title: Stop smoking!
text: I remember waking up with a terrible taste in my mouth and feeling the phlegm all the way from the bottom of my lungs to the tip of my tongue

title: Stop smoking!
text: I remember coughing all day long

title: Stop smoking!
text: Even when I tried to laugh the cough would stop me

title: Stop smoking!
text: I felt like an 80 years old lady whose best friend has been the cigarette for a quite some time

title: Stop smoking!
text: But still, I didn't quit

title: Stop smoking!
text: I will try not to discuss one major disease related to smoking, and that is cancer

title: Stop smoking!
text: I suppose that you have already heard and maybe even read a lot about it

title: Stop smoking!
text: Instead, I will give you some scary information about other afflictions

title: Stop smoking!
text: It is not just coughing and the extra production of phlegm, but also a number of other lung related affections and diseases that you can catch

title: Stop smoking!
text: When you get the chronic obstructive lung disease, which is a combination of chronic bronchitis and tissue damages in the lungs and which makes it very hard to breathe so that you eventually need the oxygen, you might wish that you had never begun to smoke

title: Stop smoking!
text: There are gases, particles and fumes in each puff from a cigarette that contain more than 4 000 different substances and chemical compounds

title: Stop smoking!
text: We can see only about five percent of the smoke and the rest is invisible to the eye

title: Stop smoking!
text: Some of the substances contained in the cigarette fumes were used to execute people in gas chambers (hydrogen cyanide)

title: Stop smoking!
text: Others are used as cleaning agents and fertilizers (ammoniac), preserving agents (formaldehyde) and nail polish removers (acetone)

title: Stop smoking!
text: I could round up a number of different substances, but I know that it would not mean a thing to you

title: Stop smoking!
text: It surely never meant anything to me

title: Stop smoking!
text: If I cannot scare you with the diseases and substances, maybe I can deter you by making you aware of how ugly you become when you are a smoker

title: Stop smoking!
text: Take a look at your fingers, the ones in which you hold the cigarette so gently, and see if your skin is turning orange or yellow

title: Stop smoking!
text: I used to scrub my fingers with a lemon hoping that the stains would come out

title: Stop smoking!
text: Of course, they never did

title: Stop smoking!
text: One more thing is the bad looking discoloration of your teeth, which you get whether you want it or not

title: Stop smoking!
text: Last but not least when it comes to your appearance, I do not know if you have noticed, but you are followed by the big, stinking smoke cloud

title: Stop smoking!
text: If you are still a smoker and you have not been discouraged, then my job is to continue by pointing out what you can gain if you quit smoking

title: Stop smoking!
text: After just a couple of days you will start to notice how your complexion is getting smooth and how the color comes back to your face, so that you do not look ill, pale or yellowish anymore

title: Stop smoking!
text: And you certainly do not go around dragging the big, stinking cloud and your breath is much fresher

title: Stop smoking!
text: If you sometimes felt that your hands or feet were cold, even if it was 25 degrees outside, then the reason to that might be the bad blood circulation

title: Stop smoking!
text: Without the cigarettes, all of a sudden, you can feel your toes and fingers even if it is cold outside

title: Stop smoking!
text: And it is such a pleasant feeling

title: Stop smoking!
text: To round off my arguments, I will throw the following figures in your face: imagine that you smoke one pack of cigarettes per day at a cost of 36 Swedish krona

title: Stop smoking!
text: This would mean that in one year you would spend approximately 13 000 Swedish krona

title: Stop smoking!
text: Can you imagine what you could do with so much money?
